Name: Climate Restoration Program
Description:
The Climate Restoration Program is startup nonprofit with a big mission:  Restore safe, preindustrial CO2 levels by 2050.  

We'll be using the full spectra of media to shift the climate conversation so that restoring a safe climate becomes the global goal of climate action. And to garner needed backing for projects that do the job. 

Official climate action aims only to reduce emissions.  

Most people don't realize that's not enough. But to restore a climate fit for humans, not dinosaurs, we also need to remove a trillion tons of CO2 from the sky.  That's the excess we've built up over the last 200 years. That's what's causing most of the climate chaos. That's what we need to remove.

Most aren't aware, but we know how to do it--through replicating natural processes.  Learn more at our website and PeterFiekowsky.com.

Name: North Wessex Downs Landscape Trust
Description: The North Wessex Downs Landscape Trust is an independent charity passionate about sharing our love of the natural environment, heritage and culture of the North Wessex Downs to inspire others to join us in making positive change.

Name: Vigingi Afrika
Description:
We are Pioneers of Environmental Stewardship and Innovative Solutions

Vigingi Afrika is a social enterprise that is committed to environmental stewardship and innovation. We believe that we can create a waste-free world by transforming plastic waste into ingenious solutions.

We turn plastic waste into valuable resources, creating innovative solutions and a diverse product range that includes fencing posts, roofing terraces, garden stakes, building posts, signposts, noise barriers, barrier posts, and synthetic wood. Our eco-friendly alternatives are durable and sustainable, paving the way to a greener and more responsible future.

We believe that everyone has a role to play in creating a sustainable future. 
Our FEnCED program teaches children about the importance of recycling and environmental conservation. 
Our apprenticeship model provides training and employment opportunities for marginalized communities.

Here are some of our key achievements:
	Recycled 2,384 tons of plastic: saving the planet an estimated 14,000 year of environmental degradation per week. 
	50 young people have gone through our apprenticeship program
	300 youths and 250 women gotten income from garbage collection: We're creating jobs and opportunities in the recycling industry.
	Planted 750 trees
	Nurtured 960 pupils as environmental champions
	Fenced 1 school
	Donated 247 eco friendly fencing poles to schools

We are committed to the following values:
	Innovation:
	Stewardship
	Social impact

Name: Fresh Water Net
Description: Fresh Water Net is an on-line community enhanced by the BIOEAST macro-regional Thematic Working Group Fresh Water Based Bioeconomy focused on fresh water related issues.

Name: Sistemas sustentáveis GSC-Luanda Hub
Description:
Uma iniciativa da Gobal Shapers Luanda Hub que tem como objectivo, contribuir para o desenvolvimento social e económico de Angola, através da criação de mecanismos que visam a protecção e conservação do ambiente e promoção da auto-sustentabilidade das famílias e comunidades rurais, dando origem às hortas orgânicas, domésticas e comunitárias (Nossa Horta).

Esta iniciativa abrange além da NOSSA HORTA, a Arborização, Protecção da Fauna Marinha, bem com Educação Ambiental por meio de Greentalks mensais.

JUNTE-SE À NÓS E SEJA A MUDANÇA QUE ALMEJA VER NO MUNDO.

Name: CO2 Solutions Living Lab
Description:
The CO2-Solutions Living Lab under Interbalkan Environment Center - Green Innovation Hub (I-BEC), brings together academia, industry, government, and civil society to address real-world environmental challenges and co-create innovative solutions focusing on advancing carbon farming practices to effectively reduce the carbon footprint and increase carbon sequestration.

We foster collaborative activities for problem-solving in real-life settings, emphasizing:
•	Active involvement of end-users (farmers, landowners, cooperatives, agronomist consultants, agricultural technology companies, certification bodies, Regional authorities & Municipalities)
•	Engaging end-users in the co-creation process
•	Multi-stakeholder participation including all the quadruple helix actors
•	Utilizing a multi-method approach rather than relaying n a single methodology.

CO2-Solutions Living Lab promotes: 
•	Nature-based Solutions (NBS) for ecosystem resilience
•	Nature-based solutions (NBS) for sustainable resource management
•	Carbon farming practices
•	Precision agriculture practices
•	Mapping and network orchestration within the agri-food sector
•	Information dissemination and educational programs to raise awareness

Demonstration value: Reference pilot stations in national level applying carbon farming solutions

Want to learn more?
Facebook: CO2 Solutions Living Lab, #CO2Solutionlivinglab #livinglabs #CarbonFarming

Contact: co2livinglab@i-bec.org

Description:
AIGIE AFRIQUE (Agence d’Études en Gestion des Infrastructures et de l’Environnement en Afrique) est une entreprise de conseil dédiée au développement durable et à la gestion des infrastructures en Afrique. 

Nous offrons des solutions innovantes en tenant compte des enjeux environnementaux et socio-économiques. Nos domaines d'expertise incluent :

 Eau & Assainissement : Optimisation des systèmes pour améliorer la qualité de vie.
 Routes & Voies Urbaines : Projets d'infrastructures durables et résilients.
 Infrastructures & Aménagement : Développement urbain et rural.
 Environnement & Changement Climatique : Solutions pour atténuer les impacts climatiques.
 Gestion des Déchets & Énergie : Systèmes efficaces et promotion des énergies renouvelables.
 Ressources Naturelles : Gestion durable et préservation.
 Assistance au Développement : Partenariats stratégiques et soutien technique.
 QHSE : Systèmes de management pour garantir qualité, sécurité, et environnement.
 Formations : Programmes de renforcement des capacités.

AIGIE AFRIQUE s’engage à accompagner ses clients avec une expertise technique et une approche centrée sur les résultats.

Name: Paryavaran Pragya
Description: Pragya Foundation has been an institution of national repute since 1999, working as a think tank for sensitizing, bringing in awareness among common people on national and global issues, through events, talks, debates and various publications. Pragya has found the need for working on #Mission LiFE, as announced by our Hon’ble Prime Minister during Glasgow COP Summit, under the C-20 India dimension of G-20 that is taking place in India, this year. “Paryavaran Pragya” is a series of events, that will have dialogues on development of the #MIssionLiFE philosophy

Name: Nicosia EfE
Description: The Environment for Europe (EfE) process, a unique regional platform of the highest level for dialogue on environment and sustainable development. Every four to five years, the EfE process organizes ministerial conferences.

Name: Flights For Their Future CIC
Description:
We are a reforestation CIC (Community Interest Company) not-for-profit, who focus on reducing CO2 Emissions caused by travel. 

Working Together for a Brighter Future. 
Flights For Their Future is not-for-profit CIC where people who need to travel frequently due to the nature of their business, can work with us to offset some of their carbon footprint caused by travel,
Many are extremely aware and concerned about the effect their essential travel has on the environment which is producing tonnes of CO2 emissions.  By working directly with us and supporting the work we do, you and our clients donations/purchases will help to ensure we can progress with our future projects to make a real difference towards combatting the effects of climate change. This will give peace of mind knowing you are doing what you can to contribute towards offsetting your carbon emissions and more.

You can help by donating, purchasing trees for us to plant, volunteering, or if you are a landowner, making a portion available to us for which we can use for our projects – large and small forests or woodlands

Nature is what keeps us and our planet alive and we are the last generation who can save it.  

Our work will initially start in the UK, but we plan to move further afield once established.

Name: MADÉMIR-Haïti
Description: MADEMIR-Haiti build a strong synergy between urban and rural areas in Haiti. we work with student, community organization, farmers, to provide an inclusive developement

Name: Concerned Citizens Of Montauk
Description:
Concerned Citizens Of Montauk is an environmental advocacy not-for-profit company based out of 6 S Elmwood Ave, Montauk, NY, United States.

IF YOU LOVE MONTAUK, YOU’RE ONE OF US.
From its magnificent beaches to its soaring bluffs and unique moorlands, Montauk remains one of the last unspoiled outposts on Long Island. For 50 years, the Concerned Citizens of Montauk have fought tirelessly against over-development, preserving over 70% of Montauk’s lands. Today, CCOM continues to lead the effort to protect Montauk's unique environment and ecology through education, advocacy and grassroots citizen action. Please help us protect Montauk’s unspoiled beauty.

Name: African green environment
Description: Champions of Climate change advocacy and implemetation. Environmental rehabilitation, Environmetal justice,Promoters of renewable energy and access to clean drinkable water. Urban greening, Ecosystem   restoration. Nature based solutions.

Name: N2OK
Description: We promote best practices in the management of fertilizers to mitigate the effects of excessive nitrous oxide emissions in the atmosphere.

Name: Wojewódzki Fundusz Ochrony Środowiska i Gospodarki Wodnej  w Rzeszowie
Description:
Działalność Funduszu polega na finansowaniu zadań ochrony środowiska i gospodarki wodnej określonych w ustawie z dnia 27 kwietnia 2001r Prawo ochrony środowiska (Dz. U. z 2008r. Nr 25, poz.150 z późn. zmian.)

Wojewódzki Fundusz Ochrony Środowiska i Gospodarki Wodnej w Rzeszowie działa na podstawie ustawy z dnia 27 kwietnia 2001 r. - Prawo ochrony środowiska (Dz.U.2018.799) jako samorządowa osoba prawna w rozumieniu art. 9 pkt 14 ustawy z dnia 27 sierpnia 2009 r. o finansach publicznych (Dz.U.2017.2077 z późn.zm.).

Zasady, organizację i tryb działania Wojewódzkiego Funduszu określa ROZPORZĄDZENIE MINISTRA ŚRODOWISKA z dnia 13 grudnia 2017 r. w sprawie trybu działania organów wojewódzkich funduszy ochrony środowiska i gospodarki wodnej (Dz.U.2017.2386) oraz „Regulamin Organizacyjny Biura WFOŚiGW w Rzeszowie”.

Środki przeznaczane na wsparcie realizacji zadań ochrony środowiska pochodzą m.in. z wpływów z tytułu opłat za korzystanie ze środowiska i administracyjnych kar pieniężnych pobieranych za nieprzestrzeganie warunków korzystania ze środowiska. Środki finansowe przeznaczone przez Wojewódzki Fundusz na dofinansowanie zadań z zakresu ochrony środowiska i gospodarki wodnej, są środkami publicznymi w rozumieniu ustawy z dnia 29 stycznia 2004r. - Prawo zamówień publicznych (Dz.U.2017.1579 z późn.zm.).

Name: LAKE STEWARDS OF MAINE
Description: Lake Stewards of Maine (formerly Maine Volunteer Lake Monitoring Program) protects Maine lakes through citizen participation in the gathering and dissemination of credible scientific information pertaining to lake health.

Name: ZOGI Nature
Description:
ZOGI nature macht sich seit 2017 für zukunftsfähige Nachhaltigkeit stark.
Wir fördern und gestalten mit ganzheitlichen Kampagnen die Transformation von Unternehmen hin zu mehr Nachhaltigkeit. Dabei unterstützen wir unsere Partner dabei zukunftssichere Strukturen aufzubauen, um auf Basis ökologischer Werte erfolgreich, unabhängig und wettbewerbsfähig zu sein.

Unsere Partner profitieren auf wirtschaftlicher, sozialer und ökologischer Ebene und werden Partner eines einzigartigen Micro-Factory Kreislaufsystems. 

Die Micro-Factories arbeiten als Kreislaufwirtschaft. Ressourcenschonend, minimal-waste-bewusst und nachhaltig nach Prinzipien von Recycling, Upcycling und Plastikvermeidung. 

In unseren Werkstätten und mit unseren leistungsfähigen Teams entstehen unverwechselbare und maßgeschneiderte Nachhaltigkeitskampagnen für unsere Partner*innen. Die Nähe und Direktheit bei uns im Haus nutzen wir zum Vorteil unserer Kund*innen: Zwischen den Gewerken ergeben sich immer wieder fruchtbare Synergie-Effekte, die wir für unser Partner*innen nutzen und direkt umsetzen können.

Unsere Werkstätten: Schreinerei & Produktdesign, Imkerei, Sämerei & Landwirtschaft sowie unsere Full-Service Agentur für Kommunikation & Marketing.

Name: Dynamic Waters LLC
Description:
Dynamic Waters is an Earth-centric company committed to adapting to a changing climate from design to build. We restore climate-resilient landscapes through eco-conscious watershed planning, leading the construction industry toward a harmonious balance where people, planet, and ecosystems thrive.

General Contractor and Landscape Contracting services 
Licensed | Bonded | Insured

Name: Friends of Creation
Description:
Friends of Creation is an environmentally focused non-profit based in Tigoni, Kenya. 
Our mission is to restore the beauty of Kenya one tree at a time. 
We run multiple services in the local community including: Tree Donation and Planting, Recycling, Upcycling, Volunteering Opportunities and much more.

Name: Ecovijay Academy
Description:
Ecovijay Academy – Learn. Act. Lead Sustainably.
Welcome to Ecovijay Academy, the learning and development initiative by Ecovijay Global Private Limited – a pioneer in sustainable consulting, carbon management, and ESG compliance.

At Ecovijay Academy, we believe that knowledge is the first step toward climate action. Our academy is built to educate, empower, and enable professionals, students, and businesses to build sustainable solutions for the world of tomorrow.

 What We Offer
 Diverse Sustainability Courses
From Circular Economy and Carbon Finance to Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) and Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), our expert-curated courses cover a wide spectrum of environmental, social, and governance (ESG) themes.

 Industry-Relevant Curriculum
Designed in collaboration with sustainability experts, our modules combine theoretical depth with real-world application to ensure you're ready to drive sustainable impact from day one.

 Flexible, Global Learning
Our courses are available online, making it possible for learners across the globe to access cutting-edge sustainability education anytime, anywhere.

 For Every Learner
Whether you're a student exploring green careers, a professional upskilling for ESG roles, or an organization training its team – Ecovijay Academy is your go-to platform for meaningful learning.

 Join the Movement
Learn with purpose. Grow with clarity. Act with impact.

Follow us for updates on new courses, webinars, expert talks, and sustainability trends.
Together, let’s build a future where profit, planet, and people thrive in harmony.

Name: Emory Ecological Society
Description:
Part student conservation corps, part biological monitoring organization, the Emory Ecological Society aims to engage the Emory community in order to raise awareness for environmental issues while also bringing about positive change on campus and in surrounding communities. We hope to serve as a forum for both ecology-focused students and the broader Emory community to come together to appreciate our natural spaces and understand the challenges facing them.

We are a chapter of the Ecological Society of America's SEEDS Progam.

Name: Stichting AnBeRo
Description: Stichting AnBeRo, Biodiversiteit in Diversiteit, streeft naar behoud, onderhoud en gebruik van de particuliere eigendommen in de Grensstreek -driehoek Antwerpen, Bergen op Zoom, Roosendaal- waarin de eigenheid en diversiteit van de landgoederen, domeinen en eigendommen een cruciaal onderdeel van zijn. Met samenwerking en commitment wordt actief gestreefd naar verbetering van kwaliteit van het beheer en het verhogen van biodiversiteit op bos-, weide en natuurgronden.

Name: The Woodlands G.R.E.E.N.
Description:
The Woodlands GrassRoots Environmental Education Network
is a 501 (c)(3) education organization that promotes natural resource conservation, recycling, solid waste reduction, safe and sensible care of our air and water resources, and other responsible actions that protect the environment and its inhabitants.

Name: Elk River Alliance
Description: Elk River Alliance is a non-profit charity working towards a healthy Elk River ecosystem through scientific monitoring of water quality and quantity, restoration and revegetation of stream-side areas, and community engagement and education.

Name: NextGen Green
Description: NextGen Green is a youth-driven environmental education initiative empowering the next generation of changemakers.

Name: MARION SOIL & WATER CONSERVATION DISTRICT
Description: MARION SOIL & WATER CONSERVATION DISTRICT implements a broad range of conservation services and programs. Our mission is to protect, conserve, and improve the quality of soil and water in Marion County through planning, technical assistance, and education.

Name: Clim@Villes - EUTOPIA
Description: Treize partenaires de France et de Belgique unissent leurs forces pour l’adaptation des petites villes du territoire transfrontalier, face au changement climatique.  Dertien partners uit België en Frankrijk bundelen hun krachten voor de aanpassing van kleine steden in het grensoverschrijdende gebied, in het kader van de klimaatverandering.

Name: GreenUs Project
Description: GreenUS is an Erasmus+ project dedicated to aligning higher education with the priorities of environment and climate change. We support digital and green capabilities, stimulate innovative learning, and foster a sustainable educational culture. Our mission is to equip educators and learners with the knowledge and skills to address future societal and ecological challenges.

Name: RecyTech Africa
Description:
RecyTech Africa est une solution technologique innovante qui installe des bornes de tri connectées pour aider les citoyens à trier, peser et valoriser leurs déchets.

Objectif : Réduire les déchets dans les villes africaines, éduquer à l’environnement

Name: Renewable Recycling, Inc.
Description: Renewable Recycling, Inc. is a NYS/ NYC Woman-Owned, DEC-Certified, 360 Mattress Recycling Facility. Located right off the outskirts of Queens on the Nassau County Border, we are convenient to most locations in the Tri-State area. Our unique process allows recycling of Mattress Materials and re-purpose of up to 90% of the materials.

Name: Clean Act Remediation and Environmental Solutions of Texas,
Description:
Clean Act Remediation and Environmental Solutions of Texas, Inc. (C.A.R.E.S. of Texas) is working to deliver real solutions that will benefit everyone. We will be recycling oilfield and municipal waste water for irrigation purposes. We will be helping farmers with their soil remediation by aiding them in crop rotation. We have a licensed hemp grower on staff and can really help replenish the nutrients in your soil. 

Our goal is to achieve our mission by eliminating waste. Check out our website for more information. We want to help you!

Name: Young Reporters for the Environment Bangladesh
Engineered Wood Company
Description:
Engineered Wood Company’s (EWC) patent pending E3Lumber is a novel group of advanced woody biomass composites and other new technologies that replace non-renewable materials highly efficiently. The result of their inventions and as developing technologies are still revealing themselves. The most recent reveal is Complete Mitigation Science, CMS. 
CMS promises to fix climate change permanently and economically. It can because CMS solved the climate change puzzle by defining climate changes actual cause and effect. In short, CMS provides mitigation of what really caused climate change, impeded terrestrial CO2 sequestration. 

The Earths Forrest's, are key to all life on earth. They alone can sequester more CO2 than humans can ever produce. Unfortunately, humans don’t allow forest’s to that. EWC’s technology allows forest’s to grow so they can sequester CO2 in abundance. In hindsight, if CMS knowledge and EWC’s technologies were implemented 50 years ago, climate change would have never happened. Name: مركز الجودة والتطوير - جامعة ال البيت
Description:
نحن، وحدة إداريّة من وحدات الجامعة، ترتبط إدارياً بالرئيس، وتهدف إلى تحسين وتطوير الأداء الأكاديمي والإداري وتحقيق التميّز العلمي والبحثي ضمن معايير الجودة، وبالتشارك مع الكليات، والمراكز، والدوائر الإدارية المختلفة في الجامعة.

نؤمن بالعمل المؤسسي والعمل بروح الفريق، وتحقيق مصالح أصحاب الشأن مع شركائنا في مؤسسات التعليم العالي المختلفة. يتضمن المركز أربع دوائر متخصصة وهي: دائرة ضمان الجودة، ودائرة الاعتماد الأكاديمي، ودائرة المعلومات والتخطيط الاستراتيجي، ودائرة التطوير الأكاديمي.

Name: EnviroQual Consultancy UK Ltd
Description:
Sustainability
-Helping companies to implement documentation, targets, reports and practices that fulfil the ESG (environment, social and governance) framework.
-Supporting companies with sustainability platforms and ratings such as Ecovadis and CDP. We can advise what evidence you will need to have and complete your assessment for you.
-Helping companies with their Net Zero journey, from measuring your footprint, setting SBTi targets and creating a decarbonsiation plan.

Environmental

-Creating procedures. 
-Training of staff.
-Carrying out internal audits.

Quality

-Creating procedures and templates.
-Training of staff.
-Carrying out internal and supplier audits.
-Hosting 3rd party audits from customers and certification bodies such as BSI.

Name: Bird Safe
Description:
Das Bird Safe Qualitätssiegel ist eine international anerkannte und geschützte Marke, bei der EUIPO registriert und eingetragen, zur Kennzeichnung von Produkten von und aus Oliven, wo kein Vogel gejagt, gequält oder durch mechanische Absaugverfahren ums Leben kommt. Die Gewährleistungsmarke wurde 2021 in Deutschland begründet und bietet eine einfache, sichere und auf dem ersten Blick erkennbare Transparenz der Ernteverfahren und Produktion. 
Unternehmen und Verbraucher: innen vertrauen dem Bird Safe Siegel. Das Bird Safe Siegel ist ein junges Unternehmen, was sich zur Aufgabe gemacht hat, den Vogelmord bei der Olivenernte zu stoppen. Jährlich kommen allein nur bei der Olivenernte durch u. a. Einsatz von sogenannten Absaugmaschinen und Fallen jeglicher Art über 2,3 Millionen Vögel zu Schaden. Laut BirdLife werden jedes Jahr 25 Millionen Vögel illegal im Mittelmeerraum getötet.

Wir arbeiten mit dem Engagement von Expert:innen in den Bereichen Qualitätsmanagement, Lebensmitteltechnologie und Marketing eng zusammen. Als solche arbeiten wir auch mit Unternehmen, Einzelhändler: innen und Verbraucher: innen zusammen.

Qualität und Service ist ein wichtiger Bestandteil unseres Unternehmens. Das Bird Safe Siegel bietet Unternehmen eine Zertifizierung an, die dem Verbraucher:inn anzeigt, das das Produkt auf gründlichen Kontrollen und einem guten Qualitätsmanagement basiert. 
Es ist für jedes Unternehmen geeignet, welches seine Olivenprodukte mit dem Bird Safe Siegel aufwerten möchte und sich an standarisierte Vorgaben exakt hält.

Olivenöl bereichert heutzutage nicht nur unsere Küche, Olivenöl wird bereits in vielen Produkten mit eingesetzt, wie u. a. Tiernahrung, Kosmetik- und Drogerieartikel, medizinische Produkte und viele mehr.

Name: Climannation
Description: Misją fundacji jest szerzenie świadomości zmian klimatycznych w immersyjny i atrakcyjny sposób.

Name: Future of Debrecen
Description: Our team consists of dedicated Environmental and Nature Conservation Engineers and professionals furthermore enthusiastic young people who decided to join their forces to help preserve the natural cityscape. With our team, we have launched a movement called Future of Debrecen, which aim to encourage urban citizens through awareness-raising and educative programmes to take action, thus ensuring the sustainable development of our city.

Name: MBOU Consulting
Description: MBOU CONSULTING est un cabinet de diagnostic, de conseil et de formation, crée pour accompagner les entreprises dans toutes les phases de mise en place d'un système de management d'hygiène, santé & sécurité, et ainsi que les particuliers dans plusieurs autres domaines.

Name: CHDT
Description: The Center for Healthy and Durable Transportation is a Tier 1 University Transportation Center to address the US DOT’s statutory research priority area of preserving the environment.

Name: Hai Moldova
Description:
Hai Moldova este un ONG din Republica Moldova, dedicat protecției mediului și implicării civice, care mobilizează comunități, instituții și companii pentru un viitor mai verde și sustenabil în Republica Moldova.

Prin proiecte concrete de împădurire, educație ecologică, gestionare a deșeurilor și promovarea economiei circulare, contribuim activ la dezvoltarea durabilă a țării. Credem în puterea colaborării și în importanța educației pentru a transforma atitudinile față de mediu și pentru a construi o societate responsabilă față de natură.

Cu peste 10 ani de activitate, Hai Moldova este partener de încredere în proiecte locale și internaționale, oferind soluții reale și implicare constantă în comunități.

Name: Green Moluccas
Description:
The Kamboti Foundation started as a community founded on February 11, 2011, under Green Moluccas.
Green Moluccas is present in Maluku to become a forum for solving environmental problems in Maluku. From time to time, the Green Moluccas program has increasingly developed towards Environmental Education and Community Empowerment, so it was felt necessary to form a foundation.

Therefore, on March 27, 2017, a foundation was established under the name Kamboti. This foundation is engaged in 3 fields: Environment, Education, and Community Empowerment. Currently, for every movement or activity, we often use the name "Green Moluccas" and Kamboti as legal standing. Until now, the Kamboti Foundation continues to develop and run according to its vision and mission. It is expected to become a foundation that cares about the environment and future generations.

Name: EnviroSage
Description:
At EnviroSage, we're dedicated to cultivating a more sustainable world through tree planting, environmental education, and community engagement. 

As a non-profit initiative, our mission is to empower individuals with environmental wisdom and inspire action for a healthier planet. Join us in sowing the seeds of change and growing a brighter, greener future together.

Name: Orientate.tn
Description: Orientate is a research project implemented by University of Sfax (Tunisia) and Alfred-Wegener-Instit

Name: EcoNexus LDCE
Description: EcoNexus is dedicated to fostering awareness and action on pressing environmental issues. We aim to promote sustainability through education, community engagement, and innovative projects. Our members collaborate on initiatives such as waste reduction, renewable energy, biodiversity conservation, and climate action, driving positive environmental impact both locally and globally. Join us in creating a greener, more sustainable future!

Name: Ministry of Environment and Climate Change
Comissão de Meio Ambiente Agrário e Sustentabilidade
Description: Principal objetivo é fomentar o estudo de questões agrárias, ambientais e de sustentabilidade.

Name: Daur Tanggung
Description:
Daur Tanggung is a platform dedicated to supporting Sustainable Development Goals 12: Responsible Consumption and Production. Derived from the words Daur (cycle) and Tanggung (responsibility), this platform focuses on education, collaboration, and innovation to promote sustainable lifestyles.

Through Daur Tanggung, we provide a space to connect individuals, communities, and businesses committed to making wiser choices in consumption and production. By offering information, programs, and practical solutions, we invite everyone to be part of the cycle of change toward a more responsible and sustainable future.

Name: Sue Taei Ocean Fellowship
Description: In honour of the late Suzanne Thelma Miller Taei, the Sue Taei Ocean Fellowship's purpose is to elevate the role of Indigenous women in ocean conservation, by developing a cohort of Indigenous women from the Pacific in becoming leaders within ocean spaces. Pacific Women are crucial to creating effective, sustainable and long-term solutions for their communities, cultures and environments and they are so often the last to be heard, their voices unsupported because of societal norms, colonisation, a lack of educational resources and respect for cultural knowledge. The Sue Taei Ocean Fellowship is committed to supporting Pacific women in navigating and creating effective solutions, to sustain their culture, communities and oceans for future generations.

Name: Kentucky Watershed Watch
Description:
Mission: We support water quality monitoring that informs, connects, and empowers volunteers and their communities for the improvement and protection of Kentucky's water resources.

The Kentucky Watershed Watch organization was formed in 1997 to support community engagement in the state's water quality program.  It has continued to serve as a helpful outlet for those with a special interest in Kentucky's natural waterways to remain engaged in learning about water quality and ways to help preserve and protect it. 

Our statewide nonprofit organization includes hundreds of volunteers who live across Kentucky and give their time to regularly monitor water quality.  By monitoring streams where state agencies do not have the staff or funding resources to visit, their contributions help supplement our understanding of Kentucky stream health.

Name: SOCIEDADE DO MAR
Description: Sociedade do Mar - comunidade de preservação de costeiras e recursos hídricos fundada por Bêca Arruda (Bernardo Vaghi de Arruda Aniz) em 1999.

Name: Green for Good
Description:
The Green for Good (G4G) project aims to drive the transition towards a circular, low-carbon economy and strengthen climate resilience in the border regions of South-East in North Macedonia (Strumica, Gevgelija, Valandovo, Radovish, Dojran and Novo Selo) and Central Macedonia in Greece (Thermi and Thessaloniki). By combining renewable energy, green mobility, sustainable urban spaces and environmental education, the project supports local authorities, civil society and citizens in adopting resource-efficient practices and creating a more sustainable future.

This account has been produced with the financial assistance of the European Union. Its contents are the sole responsibility of the Project Partners and can in no way be taken to reflect the views of the European Union, the participating countries and the Managing Authority

Name: Democracy Green
Description:
Democracy Green has proudly served as the nation’s first Environmental & Climate Justice Conservation and Disaster Relief, Recovery, and Mutual Aid (RRMA) organization, guided by Afro-Indigenous leaders native to Western North. Carolina. 

Our vision is to be a community-informed and community-driven organization that pioneers transformative environmental justice, climate justice, conservation, and community-informed solutions. We work alongside marginalized and disadvantaged populations in frontline communities to propel towards a clean and sustainable future for all domestically and globally. 

We address natural disasters and human-made crises in nature and the halls of government at every level.

Name: CRECYCLE
Description: CRECYCLE is a pioneering sustainability consultancy unlike any other. We take pride in our innovative strategies, solutions, and initiatives aimed at fostering sustainable development while actively advocating for a greener future in every facet of our work.

Name: Re Generation Eolie
Description: Siamo un’associazione senza scopo di lucro con l’obiettivo di sensibilizzare la popolazione e gli enti locali sui temi delle economie circolari legate alla sostenibilità ambientale del turismo e gli effetti sul nostro territorio, potendone cogliere opportunità di sviluppo sul lungo periodo.

Name: Furat
Description: Furat is a smart water quality monitoring startup providing real-time, AI-driven insights for safer and more efficient water monitoring. Our plug-and-play system combines IoT sensors with a localized dashboard to enable continuous monitoring, instant alerts, and regulatory reporting. We're also developing bacterial contamination prediction to support proactive water safety across Saudi Arabia and the MENA region.

Name: ASTER
Description: Textile and plastic materials are crucial to the Alpine Region's economy, which includes major European producers of sports and outdoor clothing, equipment, and infrastructure. However, significant waste arises during production and at the end of a product's life. To address this issue, the project partners evaluate the current framework and solutions for waste prevention and management. They then develop common practices, policies, and regulations tailored for the Alps. By mobilising stakeholders with a shared goal, ASTER aims to improve the prevention and management of textile and plastic waste in the Alps by providing pathways to harmonise policies and regulations across the region.

Name: Oregon Association of Clean Water Agencies (ACWA)
Description:
The Oregon Association of Clean Water Agencies (ACWA) is a private, not-for-profit organization that serves Oregon wastewater treatment and stormwater management agencies and their consultants.

Our goal is to protect and enhance Oregon’s water quality. By cooperatively addressing the many water quality issues facing wastewater treatment and stormwater managers, we can be more effective advocates with our federal and state regulatory agencies, can identify areas of collaboration with other water quality stakeholders, and can pool resources to meet environmental standards more effectively.

Name: Natural Capital Madagascar
Description:
The Natural Capital Madagascar Network was created at the end of the first forum on economic valuation and accounting of natural capital, held in Antananarivo on March 18-19, 2021.

This initiative was born to give voice to financial institutions and the private sector, so that they can play a more proactive role in the sustainable management of natural capital. For which, exchanges of good practices and a dialogue with the Administration regarding incentives are highly desired.

Name: Waste to Wealth Initiative
Description:
Turning Waste into Wealth: Building a Vision for Sustainability

The Waste to Wealth Initiative is a growing movement with a bold vision: to transform waste into valuable resources while empowering communities and improving educational environments. Our project began as a response to broken ceiling boards in classrooms at Alaye High School, and we are steadily laying the foundation for change.

Where We Are Now

Laying the Groundwork: We are in the process of mobilizing resources, building partnerships, and conducting awareness campaigns to set the stage for recycling and production.

Empowering Students and Communities: Our team has begun training sessions and workshops, equipping students and community members with the knowledge and tools needed for recycling and sustainable practices.

Building Infrastructure: We are establishing a recycling center to process waste paper into durable ceiling boards, with the goal of transforming classrooms into more comfortable, inspiring learning spaces.


Our Dream

Improved Learning Environments: We aim to replace broken ceiling boards with sustainable ones, enhancing comfort and focus for students.

A Sustainable Community: By reducing waste and fostering environmental stewardship, we envision a cleaner, greener future.

Empowered Individuals: Through skills training, we hope to create a new generation of changemakers who see waste as a resource.


What Drives Us
The Waste to Wealth Initiative is built on the passion and determination of our team, our community, and the students we serve. We are committed to aligning our efforts with Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), including quality education, climate action, and sustainable cities.

Join the Journey
This is just the beginning. We are building momentum toward creating a replicable model of sustainability that will benefit communities beyond Alaye High School. Follow our progress, support our mission, and join us as we transform waste into wealth—one step at a time.

Name: Festival Obiettivo13
Description:
Il nostro obiettivo è far sentire la voce delle nuove generazioni ai governi europei attraverso eventi, workshop e iniziative di sensibilizzazione, vogliamo promuovere la consapevolezza e l’azione per un futuro sostenibile. Lo scopo è adottare misure urgenti per combattere i cambiamenti climatici e le loro conseguenze.

Il Festival Obiettivo 13 è uno spazio inclusivo: un luogo dove apprendere, condividere e mettere in pratica soluzioni concrete per un mondo migliore.
Insieme, possiamo costruire un futuro più sostenibile per noi e per le generazioni a venire.

Il Festival Obiettivo 13 è un invito all’azione per studenti, imprenditori e cittadini: insieme possiamo ispirare e mobilitare le nuove generazioni nella lotta contro il cambiamento climatico e per la salvaguardia del nostro pianeta.

Unisciti a una community appassionata di difensori dell’ambiente, partecipando a workshop, conferenze e progetti innovativi.

Siamo pronti a costruire un futuro sostenibile e tu puoi fare la differenza! Seguici e scopri le prossime tappe e unisciti a noi per promuovere iniziative concrete contro i cambiamenti climatici.

Name: KEEP WINTER HAVEN CLEAN & BEAUTIFUL, INC.
Description:
Keep Winter Haven Clean & Beautiful (KWHCB) organizational purpose is to encourage individuals to take greater responsibility and action to enhance their community environment.  By inspiring citizens to act regularly to improve the overall quality of life in their community through neighborhood and lake cleanup, revitalization and beautification projects, and allowing for protection and preservation of natural resources. 

KWHCB’s objective is to educate individuals about litter prevention; ways to reduce, recycle, reuse, and properly manage waste materials. Through education and social media, we want to heighten awareness of the lakes and incorporate litter prevention, recycling and environmental stewardship into our activities to keep the lakes clean and beautiful.  Local volunteers participate in cleanup events that remove and recycle approximately 4,000 pounds of litter annually with Project E.A.G.L.E.

Keep Winter Haven Clean & Beautiful works with a volunteer force to carry out its projects. It is governed by a Board of Directors comprised of community leaders and residents from the Winter Haven area. 

KWHC&B is funded through in-kind and financial contributions from individuals, businesses, industries, local organizations and is supported by the City of Winter Haven. We are a 501(c)(3) tax exempt organization. KWHC&B is a non-profit, community service organization dedicated to keeping our community clean and beautiful. Currently serving over 50,000 residents in the Greater Winter Haven area, KWHC&B forms partnerships with other organizations to promote cleaner and greener communities. 

KWHC&B enjoys great working relationships with the City of Winter Haven,  Keep America Beautiful & KFB with goal of reducing litter. and continues to actively engage residents of all ages, social-economic backgrounds, businesses and local organizations through our various cleanup projects, environmental educations programs, beautification efforts and collaborative efforts.

Name: European Marine Information
Description:
A better understanding of the oceans and a rational exploitation of their resources. That is what the European Marine Information (EMI) strives for. Description:
Learn more about us! AlbertaMoldPros has over a decade of experience in keeping your space safe and the inhabitants healthy, providing homeowners and business owners peace of mind knowing that their space is mold and asbestos-free.

Through mold and asbestos inspections and removals, indoor air quality testing, grow-op remediation, and a variety of other services, AlbertaMoldPros  is committed to clean air and clean spaces.

Our highly trained and certified technicians can respond quickly and effectively to all your residential or commercial needs. Our entire team at AlbertaMoldPros is certified in all aspects of mold remediation, removal, and testing in Calgary and all surrounding areas.

Name: Ecology Crossroads Cooperative Foundation
Description:
Ecology Crossroads Cooperative Foundation is a recognized 501(c)(3) non-profit public charity dedicated to the sustainable preservation of biodiversity, forests, habitat, land and natural heritage using Indigenous Philanthropy. Donations are tax-exempt under IRS EIN 61-1259384. Ecology Crossroads has served as an educational organization dedicated to promoting environmental awareness initiatives, protecting international forest resources and engaging in sustainable development activities involving the delineating, enhancing and provisioning ecosystem services on Indigenous reservations and uninhabited forest regions. 

The organization engages locally in Madison County, Kentucky in demonstrative activities from a leased property in Berea, Kentucky, a project on hold. The organization serves an authoritative and administrative role as a keystone for other associated initiatives for activities and projects it organizes and promotes in the area of sustainable development which are closely aligned with the policies of specialized agencies of the United States and the United Nations.

Name: ONG L'ETOILE DU BOUNKANI
Description:
L'ÉTOILE DU BOUNKANI : Un rayon d'espoir pour tous

Créée en 2014, L'ÉTOILE DU BOUNKANI est une organisation non gouvernementale dévouée à l'amélioration des conditions de vie des populations de la Côte d'Ivoire. Guidée par le slogan "Offrir un sourire, c'est donner la vie", notre ONG s'engage à agir sur plusieurs fronts :

Santé: Nous œuvrons pour l'accès aux soins de santé de base, en soutenant les structures existantes et en organisant des campagnes de sensibilisation sur les bonnes pratiques d'hygiène et de prévention des maladies.
Protection: Nous nous battons pour la protection des droits de l'homme, en particulier ceux des femmes et des enfants, des réfugiés et apatrides et nous luttons contre toutes formes de violence.
Promotion humaine: Nous encourageons le développement économique local en soutenant les initiatives entrepreneuriales et en favorisant l'accès à l'emploi.
Culture: Nous valorisons le riche patrimoine culturel de la région du Bounkani en organisant des événements culturels et en soutenant les artistes locaux. Nous espérons étendre cette vision à toute la Côte d'Ivoire.
Éducation: Nous nous engageons à améliorer l'accès à l'éducation pour tous, en soutenant les écoles et en mettant en place des programmes de formation professionnelle.
Environnement: Nous promouvons la protection de l'environnement et la gestion durable des ressources naturelles.
Notre vision: Un pays où chaque individu peut s'épanouir dans un environnement sain et sécurisé.

Notre mission: Améliorer la qualité de vie des populations Ivoirienne en agissant dans les domaines de la santé, de la protection, de la promotion humaine, de la culture, de l'éducation et de l'environnement.

Nos valeurs: Solidarité, respect, engagement, excellence, innovation.

Rejoignez-nous pour faire briller L'ÉTOILE DU BOUNKANI et contribuer à un avenir meilleur pour tous !

Name: Impulsion D
Description:
IMPULSION D accompagne les projets immobiliers dès les premières phases de programmation et propose, en ce sens, des missions de conseils et d'établissement de stratégies durables. 
Pour définir, avec vous, l'ambition environnementale de vos projets. Pour rédiger les cahiers des charges traduisant cette ambition. 
Pour vous accompagner lors de concours d'aménagement, de promotion immobilière ou de maitrise d’œuvre. 
En somme, pour donner l'impulsion vers un urbain plus durable.

Name: SCHEME R&D
Description:
SCHEME is a private lab providing R&D and expertise in modelling and environment.

Our area of expertise are:

- Predictive modelling of water quality/quantity at the catchment scale (hydraulics / hydrology / agronomy) and testing of change scenarios: we help stakeholders to design detailed action plans regarding water quality / quantities issues.

- Direct simulation of fluid mechanics and reactive transport in porous media: we help industrials to design and optimise new engineering processes such as waste management through composting and methane production

- Data mining and machine learning: we speed up model design by high level data analysis, and we deliver operational models directly to clients, based on their data and adapted to their needs, in a very short cycle.

Some References:

Evaluation of the different action plans for the green algae bloom reduction on Britanny coasts: Test of change scenarios over 14 river catchments using the spatialised agro-hydrological model TNT2 over a 25 year projection. (client: French government)

Design of an operational Nitrogen / Phosphorous simplified modelling tool. Application over all new Zealand, non-instrumented river catchments. (client: the National institute of Water and Atmospheric research (NIWA), New Zealand)

Design of an industrial waste composting model on OpenFOAM platform. (Client: SUEZ Environnement)

Multi-spectral signature analysis and back reconstruction using machine learning for post-process quality control. (Client: COFELY / SUEZ environnement)

Name: Plant NOVA Natives
Description:
Plant NOVA Natives is the joint marketing campaign of a grand coalition of non-profit, governmental, and private groups, plus hundreds of individuals, all working to reverse the decline of native plants and wildlife in Northern Virginia. Our strategy is to encourage residents as well as public and commercial entities to install native plants as the first step toward creating wildlife habitat and functioning ecosystems on their own properties. All are welcome to participate in this collective action movement!
 
Plant NOVA Trees is a focused drive of the Plant NOVA Natives campaign to increase native tree canopy in Northern Virginia by encouraging residents and businesses to plant new trees and preserve the ones we already have. www.plantnovatrees.org

Name: The Soul Letter
Description:
I believe sustainability isn’t a choice : it’s a responsibility. Through my projects, I aim to turn environmental awareness into action, creating practical solutions that inspire change. My focus is on building a culture of conscious living, where communities actively shape a greener future.

This page is a space to share that journey,one project, one idea, and one step at a time.

Name: TJM Select Investments Pty Ltd
Description:
TJM Select Investments is an impact investment company prioritising investments in the regenerative economy, prioritising alternative protein and food tech through Plant Based Fund, and other investment channels. We are using our investment income to acquire land for wildlife habitat. Our aim is to protect as many landscapes in Australia as we can in order to combat Australia's extinction, biodiversity and climate crises.  

Much of Australia's land is managed by private landholders and a significant amount of that land includes some of the country's most biodiverse, critically important and threatened ecological communities. While Australia is one of the most biodiverse countries in the world, it also has one of the highest rates of species decline. Despite this knowledge, land clearing continues to destroy much of our remaining wildlife habitat. TJM Select Investments Pty Ltd is a product of the commitment of a private landowner to do what is necessary for the protection of some of Australia’s remaining critical wildlife habitat. 

We are currently developing an agroecological program on Budjalung Country and are hoping to work with Bundjalung people on this venture.

Name: EcoLibria International
Description:
EcoLibria International’s mission is to promote sustainability and climate resilience through education, advocacy, and international partnerships for a more ecologically balanced future.

EcoLibria promotes sustainable development in the US and in the countries of Central Asia, the Caucuses, and Eastern Europe, by partnering with civil society organizations, governments, universities, international development agencies, and other stakeholders.

EcoLibria was founded by Elina Doszhan (CEO) and Tamara Kowalski (COO). See more at ecolibria.org/about.

Name: evabio.us
Description:
EVABIO.US is an innovative multinational company operating in the United States and Brazil, dedicated to developing sustainable polymer solutions and low-carbon industrial technologies. Our mission is to accelerate the transition to a circular economy, transforming plastic waste, biological sources, and conventional polymers into high-performance materials with a reduced carbon footprint.

 Our unique approach lies in our ability to redefine industrial and community waste, converting it into advanced engineering compounds—without the need for material separation or energy-intensive chemical recycling.

 Key Initiatives:
 Development of Advanced Polymeric Composites
 Sustainable Construction Materials
 Biodegradable Cleaning Solutions
 Transformation of Industrial Organic Waste

Beyond innovation in materials, EVABIO.US leads the conversion of waste into high-value functional raw materials, helping industries achieve ESG goals, reduce carbon emissions, and improve operational efficiency. Through sustainability certifications, carbon footprint assessments, and the implementation of advanced environmental management systems, we provide cutting-edge solutions that integrate science, technology, and corporate responsibility.

 We are actively seeking strategic partnerships to expand this sustainability revolution.
 Let’s work together to transform waste into value!

Name: Cosmotree

Name: MP SOLUÇÕES AMBIENTAIS
Description:
Na MP Soluções Ambientais, acreditamos que prevenção, rigor técnico e visão estratégica são os melhores caminhos para proteger empresas e gestores de riscos ambientais. Atuamos em todo o Brasil com perícia judicial ambiental, licenciamento e consultoria técnica especializada, oferecendo soluções que unem credibilidade e segurança jurídica.

Nossa equipe é formada por engenheiras ambientais com sólida trajetória e experiência em diferentes setores, incluindo indústria, mineração, construção civil, agronegócio e logística. Cada projeto é conduzido com imparcialidade, transparência e embasamento legal, garantindo entregas consistentes e confiáveis.

 Nossas principais áreas de atuação:

Perícia Judicial Ambiental: elaboração de laudos técnicos, respostas a quesitos, vistorias in loco, análises com imagens de satélite, valoração de danos ambientais.

Licenciamento Ambiental: RCA, PCA, PRAD, PGRS, CAR, RAPP e estudos ambientais em todas as fases.

Consultoria e Auditorias: gestão de resíduos, sistemas ISO 14001, auditorias ambientais e relatórios técnicos para empresas.

Treinamentos e Educação Ambiental: capacitação de equipes em conformidade legal e boas práticas ambientais.

 Resultados que reforçam nossa credibilidade:
— Mais de 300 nomeações periciais ambientais em processos judiciais.
— 200+ laudos técnicos concluídos em diferentes esferas (cível, criminal, administrativa).
— Experiência consolidada em empreendimentos de grande porte, incluindo projetos de energia limpa e inovação.

 Nossa missão é transformar riscos em soluções ambientais estratégicas, apoiando empresas, escritórios de advocacia e órgãos públicos a tomarem decisões mais seguras, sustentáveis e embasadas.

 Entre em contato para conversar sobre como podemos apoiar sua empresa:

 contato@mpsolucoesambientais.eng.br

Name: BNCCREDD+ : Bureau National des Changements Climatiques et de la REDD+
Description:
Le BN CCREDD+ est une direction du Ministère de l'Environnement et du Développement Durable chargé de coordonner, dans tout Madagascar, toutes les activités en lien avec l'atteinte des objectifs nationaux en termes de lutte contre les changements climatiques ainsi que les activités en lien avec la réduction des émissions carbones dues à la déforestation et la dégradation des forêts.

Il coordonne ces activités en collaboration avec les ministères sectoriels, les organisations de la société civile, les ONG, les partenaires techniques et financiers ainsi que d'autres parties prenantes. Cette collaboration signe le caractère intersectoriel des engagements nationaux en matière de changements climatiques et REDD+. 

Le BN CCCREDD+ élabore et met en place tous les cadres nationaux relatifs à ces missions ainsi que les mécanismes qui permettent leurs mise en oeuvre. Il est ainsi le garant du respect et du suivi de ces cadres et mécanismes.

Name: Rennes Coalescence
Description:
Gagnons du temps en faisant mieux avec moins ensemble !

Rennes Coalescence propose d'unir les acteurs du territoire rennais engagés au service des transitions économiques, sociales, environnementales et technologiques.
Transdisciplinaire, transssectoriel et intergénérationnel, ce réseau prône l'hybridation et n’a pas vocation à reproposer ce que des organisations existantes font déjà très bien, mais à fédérer des référents de réseaux et experts dans l’objectif de mutualiser les leviers et freins. C'est en effet en coopérant que nous pourrons accélérer et améliorer ensemble plus globalement la transformation de nos organisations, de nos modèles et nos méthodes, au croisement des compétences métiers et des secteurs d’activité.
Le collectif s'appuiera sur la dynamique des événements et rencontres déjà organisés régulièrement sur le territoire en entretenant des échanges, partages d’expériences et d’expertises tout au long de l’année pour encourager le transfert et le déploiement de projets concrets, justes, sains, souverains, robustes et donc réellement « durables », selon la définition initiale du développement durable du rapport Brundtland de 1987.
Think tank, laboratoire d'expérimentation et booster de démarches et projets, cette coalition de "faiseurs" permettra d'organiser un véritable réseau de solidarité faces aux limites planétaires et aux priorités économiques, sociales et environnementales du territoire métropolitain rennais.

Vous êtes prêt.e à coopérer et à vous démarquer au service de votre territoire de proximité ?

Réunion de préfiguration du projet :
Jeudi 26 juin 2025 - Salle des conseils de l'Université de Rennes (Face à la station métro Villejean Université)

Name: Centre of Excellence in Anthropocenic Chemical Ecology of Forests (ACE-Forest)
Natuurinclusief Water
Description:
#NatuurinclusiefWater

Nederland kampt met serieuze wateropgaven. Deze problemen vormen steeds meer risico’s voor bewoners, drinkwaterwinning, landbouw, industrie, scheepvaart en natuur. Deze problemen zijn niet met technische maatregelen alleen op te lossen.

 

Wij stellen voor de wateropgaven – te veel, te weinig, te vies water - aan te pakken met een natuurinclusieve aanpak. Een aanpak waarbij de kracht van de natuur wordt benut. Dit is een strategische en structurele verandering van koers. Daarbij is water hét verbindende element tussen de diverse, grote, maatschappelijke opgaven. Door het watersysteem-denken centraal te stellen – bodem en water sturend – creëren we maatschappelijke meerwaarde voor klimaat, landbouw, biodiversiteit en leefbaarheid.

Eco Schools is one of the programmes of FEE - the world's largest environmental education organization recognized by UNESCO and UNEP. In Bangladesh, Probha Aurora is working to implement this programme as the sole National Operator. A pilot programme is currently being conducted with a certain number of educational institutions and this group is to share on regular basis the updates on the pilot activities with those educational institutions. In near future, we will extend this programme nationwide to other educational institutions.

Name: The Institution of Green Engineers- Young Professional Community
Description:
The Institution of Green Engineers (IGEN), connects green professionals worldwide, working towards SDG goals and providing solutions for a sustainable greener future through the 9 color nonagon VIBBGGYOR society.

It is a UNDESA NGO, 12A, 80G, CSR, and NITI Aayog accredited institution working on the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals. The core work of this society is more oriented towards SDG- 3,4,6,7,9,11,12,13 & 17.

The Young Professional Community within IGEN serves as an apex body with a specialized focus. This segment plays a pivotal role in advancing sustainability goals through three main pillars:

1.	Bridging the Gap between Academia and Industry: One of the foremost challenges in the field of sustainability is the gap between academic research and practical implementation. The Young Professional Community serves as a bridge, facilitating collaboration and knowledge exchange between the academic and industrial sectors. This ensures that innovative ideas from research are translated into real-world solutions.

2.	Climate Advocacy: Climate change is an existential threat, and effective advocacy is crucial. The Young Professional Community, with its fresh perspectives and passion, actively advocates for policies and actions that mitigate climate change. This advocacy extends to raising awareness among the public and influencing decision-makers to prioritize climate action.

3.	Energy Literacy: Energy literacy is essential to drive sustainable energy consumption and production. The Young Professional Community takes a proactive stance in promoting energy literacy, educating individuals and communities about energy-efficient practices, renewable energy sources, and the importance of responsible energy consumption.

Name: Coastal Carbon
Description:
Preventing the release of CO2 and other greenhouse gases to the atmosphere is crucial. Yet, lowering emissions alone will not be sufficient to meet the set climate targets. We must also investigate approaches that actively remove CO2 from the atmosphere.

Coastal enhanced silicate weathering as a negative emissions technology uses the natural process of silicate weathering for the removal of CO2 from the atmosphere. Not only does this technique increase the CO2 sequestration capacity of our oceans, it also counteracts ocean acidification and can be directly integrated into existing coastal management programs.

However, so far there has not yet been a rigorous assessment of the CO2 sequestration efficiency and environmental impact of enhanced silicate weathering. This project addresses these critical bottlenecks. The Coastal Carbon project investigates the potential of enhanced silicate weathering in coastal environments by studying the processes at those locations where silicate weathering is naturally occurring and by operation of a large scale mesocosm setup.

Coastal Carbon is an interdisciplinary research project executed in collaboration between three Belgian universities, Flemish and Belgian research institutes and commercial partners: University of Antwerp, Flanders Marine Institute (VLIZ), Ghent University, DEME, Sibelco, CO2-Logic, Royal Belgian Institute of Natural Sciences and the Research Foundation – Flanders (FWO) as our funding agency .

Name: The GreenFoot Project
Description:
We take action to mitigate the global impact of harmful emissions.
How could a company that is immediately unable to reduce its carbon footprint still able to have a positive impact on the environment? With Green Foot the answer is simple—what you cannot reduce, you offset. You can offset your carbon footprint by acquiring carbon credits. Carbon credits allow waste companies to impact the environment positively while remaining profitable and operationally sound. There are many benefits to becoming a carbon neutral company, such as:

• Increased competitiveness when bidding or retaining city contracts. 

• Mitigating risks associated with climate change and potential future regulations. 

• Positive public relations and increased customer loyalty. 

• Increased profitability.

Name: Only Rain
Description:
Stormwater runoff is the number one cause of polluted streams and rivers in Northern Virginia, which also are the sources of our drinking water. When it rains and snows, water runs off streets, driveways, yards and parking lots and mixes with pollutants, such as litter, fertilizer, pet waste, road salt, and auto fluids. 

These pollutants then enter storm drains on the street and are discharged directly into nearby streams.

Only Rain is a program of the Northern Virginia Clean Water Partners, which represents over 20 Northern Virginia local governments, school systems, independent water and sanitary sewer authorities, and local businesses that care about the quality of our waterways and the region's quality of life.

Our goal is to work together to keep local residents healthy and safe by reducing the amount of pollution that reaches local creeks and rivers. We use educational advertisements, publications, social media, and this website to alert the citizens we serve about how they can do their part - simple steps they can take to make sure there is enough clean water in local waterways for families to enjoy them and for fish and animals to survive and thrive.

The Northern Virginia Clean Water Partners program is coordinated by the Northern Virginia Regional Commission.

Name: The Carbon Footprints
Description:
Welcome to The Carbon Footprints an ESG Consultancy , Carbon sink projects, Carbon credits, EPR credits , a dedicated force driving sustainability, carbon neutrality, environmental conservation . Our comprehensive range of services is designed to guide both industries and individuals toward a greener and more sustainable future.

At The Carbon Footprints, we specialize in Carbon Neutrality solutions. For industries, our services encompass consultancy, manufacturing, and carbon offsetting. Our experts guide companies in achieving carbon neutrality by claiming carbon credits through MRV protocols under the global body UNFCCC and central body MOEF&CC. We also extend our support to urban projects, facilitating significant plastic offset by converting it into valuable carbon credits.

On an individual level, we offer products designed to reduce carbon footprints, such as our "Biodegradable sanitary napkins," sold not for profit but as part of our commitment to sustainability. Our innovative product, "Liquid Tree," is tailored for associations with industries and corporate services, allowing companies to sell any product after neutralizing its emissions.

As environmental warriors, our objective is to calculate and reduce carbon emissions, NOx, and Sox emissions, contributing to a healthier atmosphere. We are advocates for the harmony of our ecology, promoting a system where the economy and ecology coexist seamlessly. Proud providers of alternative products that are environmentally friendly, we are a rising ecology e-commerce entity, seeking attention to our cause.

Join us in our journey towards a greener, more sustainable future!

Name: Formex Zero Waste Industry Inc.
Description:
Formex Group A.Ş., sürdürülebilirlik ve sıfır atık yönetimi konusunda Türkiye’nin öncü teknoloji girişimidir. 2019 yılında kurulan Formex, döngüsel ekonomi prensipleriyle çalışarak, üretim ve tüketim süreçlerindeki atıkları yenilikçi yöntemlerle ekonomiye geri kazandırmayı hedefler. Başta FMCG ve CPG sektörleri olmak üzere gıda, tekstil, kâğıt, plastik, cam, ahşap ve metal gibi çok çeşitli atık kategorilerini dijital platformlar aracılığıyla analiz eder, kaydeder ve profesyonelce yönetir.

Formex’in sunduğu en önemli yenilik, yapay zekâ destekli atık yönetim sistemidir. Türkiye’de ilk kez gerçekleştirilen bu sistemle, iade ürünler ve üretim fazlası atıklar, dijital ortamda anlık olarak takip edilir ve veri tabanlı kararlarla ayrıştırılarak, yerinde geri kazanıma uygun hale getirilir. Böylece atıklar değerli hammaddelere dönüştürülürken, çevresel sürdürülebilirlik ve kaynakların etkin kullanımı sağlanır.

Formex, dijital izlenebilirliği uçtan uca sunarak, iş ortaklarının karbon ayak izi ve su ayak izi raporlarını detaylı olarak izleyebilmelerini sağlar. Ayrıca, israfa karşı etkin mücadele için bağış organizasyonları ve gıda bankalarıyla iş birlikleri yaparak toplumsal fayda yaratır. Üretim fazlası tüketilebilir ürünlerin ihtiyaç sahiplerine ücretsiz ulaştırılması ile Birleşmiş Milletler’in “Açlığa Son” ve “Sorumlu Üretim ve Tüketim” ilkelerine somut katkılar sağlar.

Kurumsal sorumluluk anlayışını tüm iş süreçlerinde benimseyen Formex, Bursa’daki 31.000 metrekarelik Sıfır Atık Entegrasyon Merkezi’nde atıkları modern raf sistemlerinde depolayıp, yenilenebilir enerji üretimi için biyogaz tesislerine yönlendirir. Name: SOBON FILTRATION
Description:
Welcome to SOBON, the leading manufacturer and supplier of filtration products.
SOBON specializes in the fabrication and supply of filtration and screening products since 2016. We are able to manufacture and processing a wide range of sifting and separation products, including a variety of filter meshes, screens, sieves, such as Polyester Wire Mesh, Precision Stainless Steel Woven Wire Mesh, Playground Wire Mesh,. Currently, our filtration and screening products are supplied worldwide and to numerous industries, including milling, mining, quarrying, sorting, refining, beer brewing, food processing, scientific & laboratory, rubber & plastic, ceramics, oil & gas, water desalination, chemical processing, pharmaceuticals, particle separation, marine technologies, construction & building, automotive, as well as other general industrial applications. 
 
With our experienced team of qualified engineers and experts, we are committed to developing and manufacturing high quality filtration, screening and sieving products to meet your needs. And we are ISO9001 certified, so it ensures that high level quality and service to our clients. In addition to standard market grade filtration products, we can also supply flexible solutions and custom made products required by your standard. It is our goal to improve the quality and range of screening and filtration products with best possible cost for the benefit of our clients, backed up by technical knowledge, specialists, and market requirements.

SOBON always persist in supplying high-quality products and high-standard service for customers. In just a few years, SOBON has become the leader brand in the wire mesh industry. The products have been exported to many overseas countries,such as the United States, Germany, Chile, Singapore and more than 10 countries.

Name: Projet d'Adaptation Basée sur les Écosystèmes
Description:
L’économie du Bénin repose sur l’agriculture, qui fournit environ 80% des revenus d’exportation et assure la subsistance de quelque 70% de la population. Malgré l’importance
économique considérable des forêts et des terres agricoles, celles-ci se dégradent rapidement en raison des effets néfastes des changements climatiques et de pratiques de gestion non durables des écosystèmes. En conséquence, la productivité agricole au Bénin a diminué de 10% entre 1983 et 2008 et reste faible : environ 15% des ménages ruraux au Bénin souffrent d'insécurité alimentaire sévère. L’augmentation des températures, la modification des saisons des pluies et la fréquence accrue des sécheresses et des inondations ont un impact négatif sur l’agriculture et les forêts du centre et du nord du Bénin, la zone constituant une zone de transition entre la savane soudanaise et la zone forestière située au sud du Bénin. Ces impacts des changements climatiques réduiront encore la productivité des paysages agricoles et des écosystèmes forestiers. Les communautés ciblées dans ces zones font partie des ménages les plus pauvres du pays et sont extrêmement vulnérables aux impacts des changements climatiques. La déforestation et les pratiques de gestion non durables ont contribué à une grave dégradation des sols, à une érosion accrue des sols et à des inondations qui ont un impact négatif sur les moyens de subsistance.

Le Bénin pour mener sa riposte face aux Changements Climatiques, a identifié plusieurs actions d’adaptation. Entre autres actions, il y a l’investissement dans une agriculture résiliente au climat par une approche EbA de la restauration et de la gestion des forêts. Afin d’investir dans les coûts supplémentaires de l’adaptation aux changements climatiques et de permettre un changement de paradigme dans la gestion des forêts et des terres agricoles adjacentes dans le centre et le nord du Bénin, le gouvernement du Bénin a sollicité et obtenu une subvention du Fonds Vert pour le Climat (FVC).

Name: Hydrometeorology and Monitoring Center state non-commercial organization
Description: “Hydrometeorology and Monitoring Center” state non-commercial organization (HMC SNCO) was established by the N 81-N decree (January 30, 2020) of the Government of the Republic of Armenia on the merger of “Environmental Monitoring and Information Center”, “Forest Monitoring Center” and “Hydrometeorology and Atmospheric Impact Services” SNCOs, and it is their legal successor according to the acts of transfer.

Name: Green Lands Blue Waters
Description:
Green Lands Blue Waters is a vision for profitable agriculture based on keeping the soil covered productively year-round: farming with Continuous Living Cover. 

Green Lands Blue Waters and partners are conducting essential research, improving the genetics of old and new crops, translating knowledge into Continuous Living Cover farming systems, developing new extension and outreach capacity, working in farm fields, shaping policy, building profitable markets for new crops, and changing the narrative around what’s possible through agriculture. The value of Continuous Living Cover farming comes in yields and profits, but also in improved soil health, cleaner water, new economic opportunities, more wildlife, reduced risk, and resiliency in the face of a changing climate.

Name: Ecoist Limited
Description:
Ecoist is a Climate Action-oriented Business Committed to shouldering its fair share in the ambitious decarbonization targets set towards Race to Zero. We are focused on pursuing climate-neutral business opportunities that promote action for climate empowerment.

We join the global initiative on reducing greenhouse gas emissions and transitioning the world to a sustainable energy future by empowering individuals and businesses to cut their carbon footprint and accelerate the decarbonization of the global economy.
