Informační platforma ESG Radar specializující se na témata udržitelnosti poskytuje všeobecný přehled aktuálních informací z byznysu, státních institucí i neziskových organizací. Cílí na všechny, kdo by chtěl zůstat v oblasti udržitelnosti v obraze  - u nás i ve světě.

ESG Radar vznikl na základě spolupráce mezi specializovanými odborníky z Ekonews, Media Tenor, a Impact Metrics.

Name: Center for Sustainability and Climate (CSC)
Description: Prince Sultan University’s Center for Sustainability and Climate (CSC) is committed to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs) through effective institutional resources management, innovative teaching and learning, research, national and international partnerships, continuous studies, and outreach.

Name: AuT
Description:
Welcome to our community, where we believe that everyone can benefit from nature's healing power, no matter their background or experience. Our group of like-minded individuals came together in 2020 to create a space where people can connect with nature and with each other.

As a sustainable community, we prioritize the well-being of the environment and people. We care deeply about preserving our planet for future generations and believe that by fostering a deeper connection to nature, we can inspire positive change in the world.

Whether you're an experienced outdoors enthusiast or someone who's never ventured off the beaten path, we welcome you to join our community and discover the beauty and serenity that nature has to offer. Let's work together to build a brighter, more sustainable future for all.


Bienvenidos a nuestra comunidad! En AuT, creemos que todos podemos disfrutar de los beneficios sanadores de la naturaleza, sin importar quiénes somos o de dónde venimos. Nos unimos en 2020 para crear un espacio donde la gente pueda conectarse con la naturaleza y con los demás.

Somos una comunidad sostenible que se preocupa por el medio ambiente y las personas. Queremos preservar nuestro planeta para las futuras generaciones y creemos que al tener una conexión más fuerte con la naturaleza, podemos inspirar un cambio positivo en el mundo.

Si eres un entusiasta de los deportes al aire libre o simplemente quieres escapar de la ciudad por un rato, te invitamos a unirte a nuestra comunidad y descubrir la belleza y la tranquilidad de la naturaleza! Trabajemos juntos para construir un futuro más brillante y sostenible para todos!

Name: Serbian Environmental Protection Agency
Description: The Environmental Protection Agency is part of the Ministry of Environmental Protection, with the status of a legal entity. The competence of the Environmental Protection Agency is to develop, coordinate and manage the national environmental protection information system, collect and consolidate environmental data and prepare reports on the state of the environment in the Republic of Serbia.

Name: WATR Alliance
Description: The Water, Access, Treatment, and Reuse (WATR) Alliance is a nonprofit organization dedicated to reshaping water management through advocacy, partnerships, and innovation. With a commitment to sustainable practices, WATR Alliance promotes access, advanced treatment solutions, and the reuse of water resources, aligning with principles of economic development and ecological stewardship. For more information, visit www.watrnm.com

Name: Microbio
Description: Precisão em análises de água, solo e produtos biológicos. Além de análises especializadas em microbiologia clínica.

Name: Earth Again
Description:
Earth Again, a groundbreaking 60-day movement organized by the Sambad Group, is dedicated to educating the public and enhancing the environment and sustainable culture of Odisha. Spanning from August 9th to October 10th, it aims to promote environmental stewardship, raise awareness about global issues, and address local challenges. Over the next twelve years, Earth Again will foster sustainable practices, enhance community engagement, and tackle pressing environmental concerns. Through events, workshops, and educational campaigns, this initiative seeks to inspire positive change and drive long-term sustainability efforts. Join us in our mission to foster sustainability, empower youth, and drive impactful climate solutions for a greener future!

Earth Again: Renewing Our Commitment to Sustainability and Conservation
Join us at “Earth Again,” a transformative event focused on tackling the pressing environmental challenges of our time. This gathering will unite leading experts, passionate activists, and influential community leaders to exchange innovative strategies and implementable solutions for safeguarding our planet. Be part of this crucial dialogue and contribute to shaping a sustainable future for generations to come. Together, we can create a build a greener Odisha!

Name: Interreg BUFFER+
Description: Wet and healthy peatlands have a strong natural potential to save carbon and, due to their water buffering capacity, play an important role in managing periods of excessive rains or droughts. Yet, in NWE regions large areas of peatlands are drained for peat mining, agriculture or forestry, which makes them CO2 emission sources rather than sinks. By restoring the capacity to buffer carbon and water, BUFFER+ partners aim at climate change adaptation and mitigation in NWE regions, while at the same time restore biodiversity and create new revenue streams. BUFFER+ involves 21 partners and 7 Associated Organisations from regions which represent all peatland types across NWE. Knowledge-based organisations, land management authorities, private companies, network facilitators and public authorities join their capacities and expertise, when building on previous projects’ results. Jointly they will work on: 1) Sustainably rewetting, restoring and preserving peatlands and shaping new landscapes to create buffers for carbon and water and increased biodiversity. 2) Developing new or scaling up existing business models, to boost sustainability transitions in order to mitigate and adapt to climate change, while stimulating a sustainable local economy. 3) Improving governance of peatlands by involving and engaging stakeholders from industry, academia, public authorities and citizens in decision-making processes and in taking responsibility for co-creation and scaling up of new found solutions.

Name: CarbonWorks
Description: Best-in-class technical expertise in the carbon market with top-tier consulting and project delivery experience to ensure our clients achieve their long term carbon and GHG emission reduction goals

Name: Energy Voices - 2025
Description: As part of the programme – Energy Voices 2023 – a campaign to promote the use of refillable water bottles will also be rolled out simultaneously to instill the responsibility of sustainability among young nationals for a carbon-neutral future. Under this initiative, students across five universities in Abu Dhabi will be provided with re-fillable water bottles to support the UAE Government’s endeavor to ban single-use plastics.

Name: Sangha “Estidama Hub”
Description:
Sangha is a regenerative innovation hub founded in 2021 with a simple belief: every seed holds a system. In a world facing climate breakdown, social injustice, mental health decline, and outdated education, most solutions treat symptoms rather than root causes—the broken relationship between humans, nature, and systems. At Sangha, we go deeper. Rooted in nature, culture, and inner transformation, we design and deliver creative, context-driven solutions that heal this disconnect. From wellbeing and nature based programs in schools to community gardens and craetive community programs, we cultivate resilient leaders, restore balance in ecosystems and cultures, and reimagine systems for a thriving future. Change, we believe, takes root from within—when we plant differently, we grow differently.

سانقا هي مركز ابتكار تجديدي تأسس عام 2021 على قناعة بسيطة: كل بذرة تحمل نظاماً كاملاً.نحن نعيش اليوم في عالم يواجه أزمات مترابطة وعميقة: انهيار مناخي، ظلم اجتماعي، تدهور في الصحة النفسية، وأنظمة تعليمية قديمة لا تواكب التحديات الحقيقية. أغلب الحلول تركّز على معالجة الأعراض بدلاً من معالجة الجذور، والجذر الأساسي هو انقطاع العلاقة بين الإنسان والطبيعة والأنظمة من حوله.
 في سانقا، نغوص أعمق. من خلال الارتكاز على الطبيعة والثقافة والتحول الداخلي، نصمم ونقدّم حلولاً إبداعية ومناسبة للسياق تعالج هذا الانفصال. من برامج التطوير الذاتي والارتباط بالطبيعة في المدارس، إلى حدائق مجتمعية ومبادرات إبداعية يقودها المجتمع، نعمل على تنمية قادة مرنين، واستعادة التوازن في النظم البيئية والثقافات، وإعادة تصور النظم لبناء مستقبل مزدهر. نؤمن أن التغيير ينبت من الداخل — فعندما نزرع بطريقة مختلفة، ننمو بطريقة مختلفة.

Name: +ZOO Mantenedouro de Fauna Silvestre
Description:
O mantenedouro de animais silvestres +Zoo foi criado com a missão de resgatar e cuidar de animais que sofreram maus-tratos, abandono ou que foram apreendidos de traficantes de animais. Nossa missão é proporcionar um ambiente seguro, adequado e saudável para que esses animais possam viver com dignidade e respeito.
Nós acreditamos que todos os animais merecem viver sem sofrimento e, por isso, trabalhamos para sensibilizar a sociedade sobre a importância da proteção dos animais silvestres e da preservação do meio ambiente. 
Nosso objetivo é contribuir para a construção de um mundo mais justo e harmonioso para todos os seres vivos.

Name: BEREDO
Description: BESTE is moving forward towards a new direction, taking actions aimed at reintegrating textile waste into the production cycle of fashion or related sectors. The recycling process of textile waste is a significant contribution to the development of social and environmental responsibility. An internally cultivated culture Beste hopes to share with the partner companies.

Name: Ecological Benefits Framework
Description: Climate change presents our planet with existential challenges. Biodiversity loss, desertification, and water scarcity should be of equal concern—they’re all connected. Instead of seeking singular solutions within the confines of carbon markets, ESG scores, SDGs, impact investments, or philanthropy, we must develop a holistic approach to channel our collective energies and achieve positive impacts where they matter most. To maximize our collective impact, EBF focuses on six ecological benefits: air, water, soil, biodiversity, equity, and carbon.

Name: RuraLTHINGS
Description:
Our research aims to explore remote, rural locales nestled within mountainous regions, specifically in Cova da Beira, Fundão municipality, and Pinhel municipality, Guarda district. 

The project aspires to establish a sustainable system that not only fosters but also informs governance decisions, thereby effectively enhancing the quality of life, health, and overall well-being within these areas.

The integration of Internet of Things (IoT) solutions in such rural and secluded areas holds promise in monitoring and predicting potential environmental and climatic hazards, including the detection of hazardous levels of toxic gases in the atmosphere.

Moreover, the systematic monitoring of air quality and other natural resources serves to safeguard and conserve the environment and its inherent resources, thereby augmenting the environmental and scenic value of these territories.

Name: FSD Team
Description:
Who are we?
We are an accredited team (student activity) from the faculty of Economics and Political Science Cairo University, who is mainly working on spreading awareness about the sustainable development case proposed by the United Nations, it is the first students activity at Cairo University And the Egyptian universities who is concerned about SDGs.

من نحن؟
نحن فريق معتمد من كلية الاقتصاد والعلوم السياسية جامعة القاهرة، هدفه الأساسي نشر التوعية بقضية التنمية المستدامة التي طرحتها الأمم المتحدة، وهو أول نشاط طلابي في جامعة القاهرة والجامعات المصرية متخصص في هذه القضية.

Name: Green Jobs Academy
Description:
NEW ENGLAND'S REGIONAL PREMIERE WEATHERIZATION TRAINING FACILITY
"Serving the Community and the Environment"
Green Jobs Academy located in Marlborough, MA - established to create real job and career opportunities in the growing field of weatherization and energy conservation.

Name: RAMATA – Rafiki wa Mazingira Tanzania
Description:
Rafiki wa Mazingira Tanzania (RAMATA) ni harakati ya kizalendo chini ya Green Beacon Community Reform (GBCF) inayolenga kuifanya Tanzania kuwa kinara barani Afrika katika utunzaji wa mazingira. RAMATA inawaunganisha wananchi, serikali na wadau mbalimbali katika kutatua changamoto za uharibifu wa mazingira kwa vitendo.

Kupitia mfumo wa ushiriki kuanzia taifa hadi ngazi ya shina, kila mjumbe wa jamii anakuwa balozi wa mazingira anayehamasisha na kusimamia uhifadhi katika eneo lake. RAMATA inatekeleza miradi ya kijani kama Benki ya Taifa ya Miche ya Miti, ikilenga kuongeza upatikanaji wa miche bora na kuhamasisha kila kaya kutumia nishati safi ili kupunguza ukataji miti holela na athari za mabadiliko ya tabianchi.

Mradi huu pia unakuza miradi ya kiuchumi rafiki kwa mazingira, ikiwemo kilimo hai, utalii wa kijani, na urejelezaji wa taka, ili wananchi waweze kupata kipato huku wakihifadhi mazingira yao. Kupitia elimu endelevu ya mazingira, kampeni za kijamii, na ushirikiano na serikali, RAMATA inalenga kujenga jamii yenye ufahamu, uwajibikaji na uzalendo wa kimazingira.

RAMATA ni zaidi ya mradi - ni mwamko wa kizalendo unaounganisha nguvu za Watanzania wote kulinda urithi wa asili wa taifa letu. 
Panda Mti Leo, Linda Kesho.
#RAMATA #TanzaniaKijani #RafikiWaMazingira

Name: Syndicat du Bassin Versant de l'Arques
Description:
Le Syndicat du Bassin Versant de l'Arques est une collectivité territoriale de Seine-Maritime, qui exerce ses missions sur un territoire cohérent : un bassin hydrographique, celui de l'Arques. 
Le territoire compte 1050 km2, s'étend de Gaillefontaine à Dieppe, en passant par Neufchâtel-en-Bray, Envermeu, et Saint-Saëns. Il comprend 118 communes et 473 km de cours d'eau (Eaulne, Béthune et Varenne). 

Ses missions : 
• prévenir les inondations 
• limiter l’érosion des sols et le ruissellement
• préserver les rivières et les milieux aquatiques 
• communiquer et sensibiliser
• préserver la qualité de l’eau

Name: Keep Nebraska Beautiful
Description:
Keep Nebraska Beautiful is a nonprofit dedicated to ensuring every Nebraska community is a clean, green, and beautiful place to live.  KNB's programs focus on waste reduction, litter reduction, community beautification, and recycling.  Since its inception in 1964, KNB has worked to educate and empower the citizens of Nebraska to improve their communities.

KNB is the statewide affiliate for Keep America Beautiful and works closely with the 20 local affiliates located in the State of Nebraska.

Name: Scal'Air
Description:
L’Association de Surveillance Calédonienne de la Qualité de l’Air (Scal'Air) a pour mission de surveiller la qualité de l’air en Nouvelle-Calédonie, d’informer et de sensibiliser la population à ce sujet.

La Nouvelle-Calédonie, qui connaît un fort développement industriel et urbain, subit de fait les multiples impacts environnementaux et sanitaires liés à cet essor.

Les préoccupations des calédoniens en matière de qualité de l’air « local » ne font qu’augmenter, avec l’inquiétude croissante liée au réchauffement climatique au niveau planétaire.

Face à ce constat, c'est en 2006 que Scal'Air a vu le jour, pour mieux connaître et suivre ces effets sur l’air. Afin de prendre, en temps utile, les mesures d’information, de correction et de prévention nécessaires.

Name: EIT Climate-KIC Slovakia
Description:
Regionálny inovačný program EIT (RIS) urýchľuje inovácie v oblasti klímy v celej Európe. Sme presvedčení, že aktívna účasť na regionálnej a nižšej ako národnej úrovni je kľúčom k tomu, aby Európa naďalej zostala lídrom v boji proti zmene klímy. EIT RIS aktívne pôsobí v regióne a naďalej rozvíja svoje aktivity v nových krajinách. Portfólio RIS sa nedávno rozšírilo o slovenské centrum.

Slovensko sa k rodine EIT Climate-KIC pripojilo začiatkom roka 2020. Novozaložený slovenský EIT Climate-KIC Hub spravuje Civitta Slovakia - poradenská spoločnosť s hlbokým záujmom o udržateľný rozvoj a podnikanie. Partnerom projektu je Technická univerzita v Košiciach (TUKE).
Medzi naše aktivity patrí:
- budovanie povedomia o zmene klímy a naliehavosti tohto fenoménu  v celej spoločnosti a podpora aktivít na zvyšovanie povedomia.
- podpora vytvárania udržateľných regiónov a inteligentných mestských častí, ktoré slúžia ako konkrétne príklady dôveryhodných prechodov smerom ku klimatickej neutralite.
- organizovanie špecifických programov a podujatí z portfólia EIT Climate KIC, ako sú Akcelerátor a Climathon, s cieľom podporiť rozvoj a realizáciu nápadov riešiacich zmenu klímy na Slovensku.

Name: BENAQUA
Description:
BENAQUA est une société spécialisée dans la réalisation de station de traitement des eaux comme:
- Station d’épuration des eaux usées urbaine et industrielle
- Traitement des eaux potables...

Name: Louisiana Against False Solutions
Description: The Louisiana Against False Solutions (LAFS) coalition is a group of more than 20 organizations leading in Louisiana and nationally for environmental, racial, and social justice. LAFS includes expertise across a range of disciplines: law, environmental science, geology, steel and materials scientists, traditional and Indigenous knowledge-holders, experienced campaigners, fisherfolk, and frontline communities.

Name: BIOECO-UP
Description: The bioeconomy concept seeks to replace fossil resources with renewable raw materials in as many areas and applications as possible. The BIOECO-UP project widely establishes this concept across central Europe. The partners will design new circular value chains for the bioeconomy and change consumer behaviour. They will also support the policy level to push ahead with the transformation.

Name: DaSsK QMS Services
Description:
DaSsk is a multidisciplinary organisation committed to providing QMS Certification Support, IT Solutions, and Engineering Services to industries of all sizes. We specialise in helping organizations implement international standards like ISO 9001, ISO 14001, ISO 45001, ISO 22163 (IRIS), AS 9100, IATF 16949, and more. Our services are tailored to improve quality, efficiency, safety, and customer satisfaction across sectors such as automotive, railways, aerospace, and mechanical engineering.

Our QMS consultancy is delivered by highly competent, multilingual professionals with lead auditor qualifications and deep industry knowledge. We offer customised solutions that include gap analysis, process mapping, documentation, internal audits, certification support, and continual improvement planning — all delivered with patience, trust, and on-time execution.

Beyond certification, DaSsk is also a reliable partner for IT services, including:

Website & App Development

Graphic and PPT Design

Excel Automation & Application Development

Domain and Business Email Setup

SEO and Digital Marketing

Social Media Handling

Our Engineering Division supports:

2D & 3D Design and Drafting

Project Documentation

Engineering Project Management

We believe in a customer-friendly, flexible approach that combines practical consultancy with modern digital tools. Our clients benefit from enhanced productivity, cost savings, better compliance, and global competitiveness.

Whether you're looking to get certified, automate operations, improve your digital presence, or receive engineering documentation support, DaSsk is your partner for smart, noise-free solutions.

Name: Careers at Hills
Description:
Across Wiltshire and surrounding counties, The Hills Group of companies manages and recycles waste, produces essential construction materials through quarrying and ready mixed concrete, and builds award-winning homes in sought after locations.
Established in 1900 and family owned, The Hills Group has evolved over the past four generations into a multi-million-pound business, harnessing the latest technologies, pioneering major infrastructure projects, and employing over 600 people.

Whether extracting minerals, managing and recycling waste or building new homes, the same qualities of energy, enterprise, affability and confidence with which Hills was founded, still characterise the Hills business today.

Name: Ls Nutri Assessoria E Consultoria Nutricional Ltda
Description:
LS NUTRI Assessoria E Consultoria Nutricional 
A LS Nutri surgiu em 2010 inicialmente com o intuito de consultoria para o seguimento do varejo. Ao longo dos anos com o sucesso nos nossos serviços prestados, novos seguimentos foram aparecendo, até que de uma consultoria a LS Nutri se tornou uma assessoria para o seguimento de varejo e indústria de alimentos. Onde nos possibilitou alcançar algumas conquistas, desde ao seguimento de auditorias, fazer parte do grupo TC e implantação do primeiro SIM em Campinas. Hoje somos um time com mais de 20 nutricionistas, assessorando com eficiência e qualidade nossos clientes.

Name: Nature Dads
Description: Nature Dads is creating a movement to Normalize Environmentally Sustainable activities like Vermicomposting, Rainwater Collection, & Creating Pollinator Habitats with Native Plants at EVERY Corporate Facility as well as in EVERY Home.

Name: Indonesian Corrosion Week
Description: An annual event of INDOCOR ITS SC which is held to provide introduction, development, and innovation of corrosion on a national scale for high school students and college students in Indonesia through talkshow, company visit, also several competitions held such as essay, poster, and corrosion handling.

Name: Agrilab
Description:
Agrilab  is a leading provider of testing and consultancy services dedicated to empowering the agricultural sector. 
We specialize in soil, manure, water and pesticide analysis, offering farmers, exporters, and agribusinesses actionable insights to enhance productivity, ensure food safety, and meet global standards and certifications.  

Our mission is to drive sustainable agriculture by combining laboratory analysis with expert guidance. We focus on helping clients optimize resources, improve soil health, and adopt environmentally responsible farming practices. 

Whether it’s diagnosing soil deficiencies, assessing water quality, or ensuring produce compliance for export markets, we are committed to delivering tailored solutions that make a real impact.  

With a vision of transforming agriculture through science, Agrilab partners with clients to tackle modern challenges, from improving yields to safeguarding the environment.  

Harvesting Knowledge, Nurturing Growth.

Let us help you cultivate success, one sample at a time!

Name: SENAI IITM
Description:
SENAI research team consists of five verticals :
1. Data Science:
The data science line of research in the group attempts to bridge the gap between machine learning algorithms and their application to physical systems. At the same time, to improve the machine learning algorithms using insights from physical systems.

2. Systems Biology:
Biology is one field that is making incredible progress due to the availability of big data. Omics data at different information scales is revolutionizing this field. In our group, we explore the use of data science algorithms for understanding biological systems.

3. Kaatru:
Kaatru (/kAHtrə/) in Tamil stands for ‘air’. Kaatru aims to address the pressing issue of air pollution. The project leverages IoT and data science to deliver on the said goals. We use low cost, locomotive ground sensors to collect data at high spatio-temporal resolution.

4. Energy Systems Engineering:
Human development depends on energy. With increasing world population and developmental ambitions of all parts of the world, sustainable generation of energy becomes a critical need. Our research in this area is focused on improving the efficiency of energy conversion devices. 

5. Fluid System Engineering:
Fluids research is as relevant now as it has been for several decades past. Advancements in micro-fabrication techniques have triggered interest in studying fluid flows in small length scales. Our fluids research is focused on droplet microfluidics and applications of fluidic systems in particle synthesis. The droplet microfluidic studies we do, aim at developing functional devices that integrate various processes on a lab-on-a-chip device. For this, we develop algorithms to design microfluidic networks and work towards the experimental realization of these designs.

Name: Make it Zero
Description:
The global race to cut emissions to zero is a vital step in addressing climate change, and the DIY sector will rise to the challenge. 

EDRA/GHIN is recognised as the voice for the global DIY sector. It represents 230 DIY and home improvement companies operating over 35,000 stores in 78 countries, covering the entire spectrum of the industry, from local corner shops to digital players and big box retailers.  

Results from a survey conducted on EDRA/GHIN members show that Scope 3 emissions, can represent up to 98% of a DIY retailer’s total emissions. These encompass emissions that are not the result of activities from assets owned or controlled by a company but by those that it is indirectly responsible for up and down its value chain. Examples of Scope 3 emissions include those produced by the extraction and transformation of raw materials, manufacturing, distribution, use and end-of-life of products.

EDRA/GHIN partnered with Ricardo, the world-renowned strategic, environmental, and engineering consultancy, to create Make it Zero and help the industry identify and reduce scope 3 emissions. 

The Make it Zero initiative aims to develop clear and consistent methodologies for collecting and measuring Scope 3 emissions data. Members of the Make it Zero Scope 3 Taskforce will implement this information in their own operations and share best practices.

Objectives: 
> Clear and consistent emissions calculation methodologies
> Agree on common accounting and reporting standards and reporting platforms
> Engage with suppliers to drive action and change across the supply chain

Name: The Evergreen Exchange
Description:
The Evergreen Exchange is committed to restoring trust and integrity in the carbon market by addressing critical challenges such as double counting and greenwashing. Our holistic system combines technical rigor with ethical principles to ensure that environmental contributions are accurately represented and protected against fraudulent practices. 


We serve a diverse clientele, including:

Impact Producers: Organizations and projects aiming to transform their environmental initiatives into credible, tradable assets that reflect genuine ecological benefits.

Businesses & Enterprises: Companies seeking to integrate sustainability into their operations through reliable carbon offsetting, enabling them to offer carbon-neutral products or services.

Regulatory Compliance: We off our services to assist organizations in navigating and adhering to emerging carbon tax regulations.

Our suite of services includes:

Kinetic Anchoring Process: A proprietary method that transforms environmental impacts into verifiable digital assets, ensuring accurate quantification and secure representation.

Blockchain-Enabled Transparency: Utilizing blockchain technology as a self-auditing system, we provide an open and trustworthy registry for tracking and validating environmental contributions.

Embedded Impact Certification (EIC) Standard: Our EIC Standard ensures that verified environmental impact reductions are directly integrated into products, services, and operations, rather than treated as external offsets. EI enables companies to demonstrate measurable, transparent, and blockchain-tracked environmental benefits



At The Evergreen Exchange, we believe that meaningful collaboration, rooted in honesty and ethics, is key to addressing the environmental challenges of our time. By aligning the practical needs of both business and nature, we create pathways for mutual benefit, ensuring that progress in human prosperity goes hand in hand with the stewardship of our natural world.

Name: Proper Strand Lopers
Description:
Proper Strand Lopers mobiliseert burgers om stranden en kustgebieden zwerfafvalvrij te maken. Door directe actie werken we aan een propere en veilige maritieme leefomgeving. Als onafhankelijke en ongebonden community pakken we het zwerfafval, en overmatig gebruik plastiek, structureel aan door het creëren van bewustwording en gedragsverandering.
Wij inspireren en brengen mensen samen om natuurlijke hulpbronnen te beschermen en een circulaire samenleving te bevorderen. Door samenwerking met overheden, burgers, culturele en socio-economische organisaties bouwen we aan een duurzame toekomst voor volgende generaties. Als burgerinitiatief zijn we ontstaan op sociale media hen maken we op efficiënte manier gebruik van dit instrument om maximaal bereik te hebben.

Resultaten in 8 jaar tijd:

• Ruim 850.000 liter (850 m³) afval geregistreerd (250-300 ton), dit resultaat enkel op strand en in duinen
• Ruim 20.000 individuele opruimacties, meer dan 300 gezamenlijke acties, ruim 35.000 engagementen
• 110x Teambuildings, 60x klasbegeleidingen en/of workshops overal aan de Belgische kust
• Samenwerkingen en projecten met kustgemeenten: charter zwerfvuil strandfestivals, charter bouwafval, consulting, Trash Bingo, opleiding milieuteams, burgerwetenschap, exposities retroafval…
• Participatie aan beleid voor omgeving: werkgroep kustafval, werkgroep strand- en afvalbeleid Oostende, PLUXIN stuurgroep & advisory board, MARBEFES, impact op alle beleidsniveaus.
• Erkend als United Nations Ocean Action en UNESCO Green Citizens organization. Meerdere awards en erkenningen.

Name: Chatham Islands Landscape Restoration Trust
Description:
Our Trust is a group of islanders working collaboratively with our community to bring conservation and ecosystem restoration projects to life. This includes Predator Free Chathams.

The Chathams are a land apart. Our fertile islands are surrounded by productive seas, 800kms from mainland Aotearoa New Zealand. Isolation and a wild climate led to the evolution of some exceptional plants and wildlife: 25% of Aotearoa’s endangered species call this archipelago home. Some of those species are only found here.

We take a big-picture approach towards environmental restoration. We have a long-term focus, which means thinking about what we're doing right now and what we need to do over time to create the future we want. We also think at an ecosystem level, from the sea to the soil to the sky.

Description:
VEMA CARBON is a practical expert in climate solutions.
Delivering measurable results is our top priority.

Partnering with VEMA CARBON is a step toward achieving ESG goals and reducing emissions.

We implement energy efficiency and climate projects that help industrial enterprises and government institutions reduce greenhouse gas emissions and move closer to carbon neutrality.

Our team provides end-to-end services, including:

– Greenhouse gas (GHG) inventories.
– Implementation of monitoring, reporting, and verification (MRV) systems in accordance with international standards, including OGMP 2.0.
– Identification, development, and implementation of carbon reduction projects, as well as creation of low-carbon production solutions.
– Energy audits and efficiency improvements.
– Certification of carbon reductions and climate investment programs.

Operating across Central Asia, the Gulf region, and Europe, we promote the sustainable transformation of industry — helping clients achieve their ESG objectives, enhance resource efficiency, and meet international climate commitments under the Paris Agreement.

We believe that technology and measurable outcomes are the key to real climate progress and we collaborate with leading international partners such as ICA Finance AS and Carbon Limits AS to implement climate and energy transition projects.

Name: Ioannina 2030-Mission "Cities"
Description:
The Municipality of Ioannina decided to respond to the challenge of the European Commission and to submit a nomination file for the pilot program "100 energy neutral and smart cities".

Cities, due to rapid urbanization in recent decades, are at the center of attention for climate change mitigation and adaptation.

The right to clean and affordable energy is included among the 17 Sustainable Development Goals and should therefore be guaranteed to every European citizen. The right of future generations of Ioannina to enjoy sustainable cities should form the basis of today's decisions.

Through the goal and effort and participation in the program, the city of Ioannina will integrate experiences, funding opportunities and practices to strengthen sustainable urban mobility, save energy in buildings, mitigate climate change, but also to improve the standard of living for all of us.

A necessary condition for the success of the transformation of the city is the direct and active support of the state, the central administration, the agencies and the citizens of Ioannina.

Name: UWR Urban Water Retention
Description:
Modulopbyggede, underjordiske systemer til opmagasinering og håndtering af regnvand under og efter skybrud i byer og bynære områder.

Det innovative UWR-system repræsenterer en konsekvent ansvarsbevidst klima- og Co2-løsning med fokus på materialevalget og produktionen, der er fuldt sporbart, dokumenteret og verificeret af et anerkendt dansk forskningsinstitut, anlægsfasen og -tiden, logistikken samt det færdige produkt og dets garanterede levetid.

Den kortere anlægstid og dobbelt så lange levetid i forhold til sammenlignelige produkter gør UWR-løsningen til en mere rentabel investering på både kort og langt sigt og dermed også til en økonomisk bæredygtig løsning.

UWR-systemet bliver netop - fra oktober 2023 til april 2024 - installeret på Betty Nansens Allé på Frederiksberg, som den første lokation med den helt nye løsning. 

Urban Water Retention er en dansk virksomhed grundlagt af eksperter med mere end 35 års erfaring indenfor produktion, udvikling, anlæg og kloakering.

Virksomheden er i forvejen leverandør af forsænkelsesbassiner til Frederiksberg Kommune. Det nye UWR-system er derfor et supplement og en optimering af de eksisterende typer af skybrudsløsninger i kommunen.

UWR-systemet er patenteret og verificeret af dansk GTS-institut.

Name: Nationaal Park Scheldevallei
Description:
In Nationaal Park Scheldevallei wisselen machtige stukken riviernatuur af met pittoreske dorpjes, prachtige kastelen en weidse velden. Het is een gebied dat smeekt om ontdekt te worden.

Je kan hier terecht voor een bijzonder stukje natuur dat je nergens anders in ons land aantreft. En zelfs op de rest van het Europese continent is onze zoetwatergetijdennatuur met haar slikken en schorren – de mangrove van Europa – best zeldzaam. Dat die getijdennatuur met zoute, brakke en zoete zones ook nog eens zo diep landinwaarts terug te vinden is, is echt uniek!

De vele jaagpaden, het doorvlochten tragewegennet, de unieke veren, ... zorgen voor eindeloos fiets- en wandelplezier. En ontdek de typische belevingen aan het water: scheepswerven, authentiek vissersdorpjes, getijdenmolens, wijmenteelt, prachtige Kastelen van de Schelde, ...

Hier stroomt schoonheid

Name: BinGo
Description:
BinGo est une solution innovante développée par une équipe d’étudiants du programme Kesk’IA, mettant l’intelligence artificielle au service de la propreté urbaine. L’application permet aux utilisateurs d’identifier un déchet en le scannant, afin d’obtenir des informations sur son matériau, la meilleure façon de le trier et son devenir après recyclage.

En intégrant une dimension éducative et interactive, BinGo sensibilise les citoyens aux bonnes pratiques de tri et contribue à une gestion plus efficace des déchets. Notre objectif est d’accompagner les utilisateurs vers une démarche écoresponsable, en leur donnant les outils pour mieux comprendre l’impact environnemental des déchets et leur cycle de recyclage.

Notre ambition ? Faciliter l’apprentissage du tri, encourager des habitudes durables et participer à la construction d’une ville plus propre et plus respectueuse de l’environnement. 

 Actuellement en développement dans le cadre du programme Kesk’IA, BinGo vise à être testé et appliqué à la ville de Roubaix, avec l’ambition de s’étendre à d’autres territoires voire même à l'international.

 Rejoignez nous dans cette mission pour un environnement plus propre et plus durable !

Notre compte Instagram : @bingo_keskia

Name: Waters of LIFE
Description:
The Waters of LIFE is an EU LIFE Integrated Project (IP) which aims to help reverse the deterioration of Ireland’s most pristine waters.

The ongoing loss of high status waters is among the most concerning, protracted and persistent water quality trend in Ireland.  Other water quality trends have well-understood cause and effect, with detailed plans in place to mitigate impacts. More actions are necessary to protect pristine waters. Many of these waters are small, upland streams. The protection and restoration of these waters is one of the key underpinning principles of the Water Framework Directive.

The overall objective of the Waters of LIFE IP is to support the implementation of measures to protect and enhance High-Status Waters and thus to support the work of the Blue Dot Catchments Programme.

Description:

Notre vision:
Créer un Burundi propre, durable et innovant, en alliant l’action concrète sur le terrain et la réflexion stratégique pour construire des solutions écologiques adaptées à nos réalités locales.

Depuis sa création, Ecovert Burundi œuvre activement pour protéger l’environnement et promouvoir des pratiques écologiques durables à travers diverses initiatives innovantes.
Notre entreprise offre des services essentiels, tels que:
 1. la collecte et le tri des déchets, 
 2. le nettoyage professionel  écologique pour des espaces de travail et 
   des ménages, 
 3. la fabrication de poubelles recyclées à partir de matériaux récupérés 
  comme des tonneaux usagés.
 Nous cherchons constamment à apporter des solutions concrètes pour la gestion des déchets et la réduction de l'impact environnemental.

Nous avons également lancé le programme Génération Éco-responsable, qui engage les jeunes dans des activités de nettoyage, des ateliers de sensibilisation et des projets communautaires pour promouvoir la préservation de l’environnement au quotidien.

En alliant innovation et responsabilité sociale, l'entreprise aspire à devenir un acteur clé dans la transformation des comportements envers l'environnement et à inspirer d'autres initiatives écologiques au Burundi.

Name: OZY SYSTEM
Description:
Conveyor is a Swiss SME with expertise in R&D, mechanical and electronic design and assembly, software and web app development, data analysis, real-time diagnostics, and EU/international partnerships. These skills enable Conveyor SA to tackle global challenges and create innovative solutions.

A notable example is the OZY SYSTEM, designed to prevent the spread of AMR and HCAI through air and surface disinfection. This system enhances microbiological safety and reduces infections by using patented ozone and UV-C treatments. Scientifically validated, it has been tested on 10,000 samples of multiresistant pathogens in hospitals.

Conveyor SA partners in the JPIAMR 2024 project, collaborating with institutions like Policlinico Gemelli, Regensburg University Clinic, Fraunhofer Institute, SUPSI, University of Leeds, and Nofer Institute of Occupational Medicine.

Name: EPIC Africa
Description:
The ‘EPIC’ in the project name emphasises the impressive beauty, diversity, and potential of the African continent in its human and natural resource endowments.

An accelerated scale-up of renewable energy sources will bring many benefits. Climate resilient investments are vital for transition to renewable energy infrastructures. Success hinges on the policy environments and governance structures. In Sub-Saharan Africa (SSA), clean energy access and food security targets require significant infrastructure expansion. In this context, the EU-funded EPIC Africa project will build on transparent water-energy-food and resource modelling tools for integrated assessment. Overall, the project’s goal is to support the governance of sustainable development in SSA, which has the lowest energy access and irrigated agriculture levels in the world. Focusing on the Tana (Kenya) and Volta (Ghana-Burkina Faso) river basins, the project will co-design policy for the coming decades together with stakeholders and local research networks in the three basin countries.

Name: NextGreen
Description:
NextGreen wil de duurzame beweging significant verder brengen en werkt daarom met en voor gemeenten, bedrijven en financiële instellingen met groene ambities. We verbinden ze met elkaar en begeleiden hun samenwerking voor een klimaatbestendige leefomgeving en herstel van biodiversiteit.

Samen ontwikkelen en samen bewegen naar een nieuwe economie, waarin innovatieve duurzame producten en diensten de norm bepalen. Met een maatschappelijke context die deze economie stimuleert en in stand houdt.

NextGreen werkt aan de volgende generatie van groen. En die is volgens ons oranje: de kleur van passie en van samenwerking. Want dat is de basis die we nodig hebben om naar een werkelijk duurzame wereld te kunnen bewegen.

Transities lopen niet vanzelf. Met alleen een duurzame innovatie ben je er niet. Ook de markt en de context moeten mee veranderen. Voor een systeemverandering, ofwel een transitie, is samenwerking nodig. Ondernemers en overheden, kennisinstellingen en NGO’s, banken en burgers, ze hebben elkaar nodig om een werkelijk duurzame samenleving te bereiken.

De uitdagingen waar we voor staan vragen om een andere, creatieve manier van denken om tot nieuwe producten, verdienmodellen en samenwerkingsvormen te komen.

Daarbij hoort ook een vernieuwing van de eigen maatschappelijke rol. Bedrijven gaan maatschappelijk verantwoord ondernemen en streven naar positieve impact. Overheden nemen een faciliterende rol aan en NGO’s werken vanuit win-win samen met het bedrijfsleven.

Name: GMS Climate Change and Environmental Sustainability Program
Description:
The Greater Mekong Subregion (GMS) Climate Change and Environmental Sustainability Program (CCESP) is a regional technical assistance managed by Asian Development Bank (ADB) supported by Ramboll, and overseen by the GMS Working Groups on Environment (WGE).

Over a couple of decades, the GMS has experienced significant economic growth and poverty alleviation. Yet, this growth has been supported by an unsustainable use of natural resources, causing significant depletion on ecosystems. The GMS countries have acknowledged the need for subregional collaboration and have set a common vision to foster economic development while ensuring sound environmental management and practices.

In 2018, the environment ministers of the GMS countries endorsed the Greater Mekong Subregion Core Environment Program Strategic Framework and Action Plan. Building on the successes of the Core Environment Program Phase 1 (2006-2011) and Phase II (2012-2018), the Asian Development Bank approved the creation of the GMS Climate Change and Environmental Sustainability Program to support the implementation of the action plan. 
Through the key areas of support outlined below, CCESP helps develop climate-friendly projects in the GMS regional investment framework and help the GMS realize its overarching vision of an integrated, prosperous, and equitable subregion. 

Key areas of support:
•   Enabling policies & standards
•   Demonstrating innovative options 
•   Strengthening capacities 

Partners:
Working Groups on Environment of Cambodia, People’s Republic of China, 
Lao People’s Democratic Republic, Myanmar, Thaland, and Viet Nam.

Name: AquaBioSens
Description:
AquaBioSens develops handheld devices to measure aquatic hazards and pollution, supporting the EU Mission to “Restore our ocean and waters by 2030”. The devices use novel analytics, such as immunoassays, environmental RNA quantification, and whole cell biosensors, coupled with advanced sensors, such as acoustic biosensors, fluorimetry, and organ-on-chip devices. The devices are low-cost, accessible, and connected to the web. They will be tested and validated in coastal and freshwater sites in the UK, Ireland, and Greece, and disseminated to the international community. AquaBioSens aims to commercialize the new technologies.

Name: Terracert
Description:
Στην Terracert, είμαστε μία ομάδα με έδρα την Αθήνα, δημιουργηθήκαμε το 2022 και δραστηριοποιούμαστε ως φορέας ελέγχου και πιστοποίησης.

Η δράση μας είναι διαπιστευμένη από το ΕΣΥΔ και εγκεκριμένη ως Επίσημος Οργανισμός Ελέγχου και Πιστοποίησης Προϊόντων Βιολογικής Γεωργίας (GR-BIO-19)) από το Υπουργείο Αγροτικής Ανάπτυξης και Τροφίμων.

Διαθέτουμε ένα πανελλαδικό δίκτυο συνεργατών που καλύπτει τις διαρκώς αυξανόμενες ανάγκες για πιστοποίηση Βιολογικών Προϊόντων.

Βασικές αρχές της λειτουργίας μας, αποτελούν η ανεξαρτησία, η ακεραιότητα, η εμπιστευτικότητα και η αμεροληψία. Κατανοούμε τη σημασία τους και στις επιθεωρήσεις που εκτελούμε, διασφαλίζουμε την αξιοπιστία, με τεκμηριωμένες διαδικασίες και πιστή εφαρμογή της Νομοθεσίας.

Εάν σας ενδιαφέρουν οι υπηρεσίες μας, θέλετε να μαθαίνετε τα νέα μας, καθώς και να λύνετε απορίες που αφορούν τον κλάδο της βιολογικής παραγωγής, ακολουθήστε μας!

Name: Réserve de Biosphère Fontainebleau-Gâtinais
Description:
La Réserve de Biosphère Fontainebleau-Gâtinais est l'association qui coordonne la reconnaissance de l'UNESCO dans le cadre du programme scientifique intergouvernemental Man & Biosphere pour le territoire de Fontainebleau et du Gâtinais.

La Biosphère de Fontainebleau Gâtinais fait partie du réseau des 700 biosphères mondiales reconnues par l’UNESCO. 
Co-fondée il y a plus de 20 ans, entre autres, par l’ONF, le PNR du Gâtinais Français, les départements de Seine-et-Marne et d’Essonne, l’école des Mines et le Museum national d’histoire naturelle, nous menons, à notre échelle, des actions concrètes redonnant une place primordiale à la biodiversité.

Véritable acteur reconnu dans le programme Man And Biosphère, nous sommes plus de 40 partenaires locaux mobilisés et engagés dans la construction d’un avenir respectueux de notre écosystème.

Notre objectif ? 
Etre demain un territoire résiliant, où l’Homme et la nature vivront et évolueront dans un équilibre constructif.

Depuis 1998, nous avons choisi d’articuler nos activités autour de 3 missions : 
La conservation de notre environnement exceptionnel, le développement durable et l’innovation nourrie d’une approche scientifique. 

Les projets développés conjointement par des scientifiques, des entreprises, des collectivités et le grand public
permettent l’émergence de nouvelles solutions pour préserver localement notre planète, tout en s’inscrivant dans une dynamique mondiale.

La Biosphère de Fontainebleau Gâtinais est une véritable opportunité de devenir acteur positif de notre avenir.

La creazione di un sistema circolare basato sull´apporto degli associati abbinato alla tecnologia innovativa della Blockchain è una sfida sociale che coinvolgerà ognuno di noi personalmente attraverso la creazione di stili di vita più sostenibili siano essi nella sfera privata quanto in quella professionale e possono assumere molte forme:
-tutela del patrimonio ambientale (riforestazione, nuove piantagioni, gestione del verde),
-riorganizzazione delle condizioni di vita (eco-villaggi, eco-comuni, città sostenibili),
-rivalutazione di settori economici (bioedilizia, agricoltura sostenibile),
pratiche lavorative (architettura sostenibile, home office),
-nuove tecnologie (energie rinnovabili, eco-mobilità)
il tutto con il fine ultimo di progettare uno stile di vita, aperto, condivisibile, flessibile e in armonia con la conservazione delle risorse naturali.

Name: Sensoil Innovations Ltd.
Description:
Safeguarding Groundwater
Realtime Environmental Monitoring and Groundwater Protection

Real-time analytics, data and sampling from the vadose zone for data driven decisions. 
Water resource protection | Agritech | Dam safety | Mining & tailing dams | Remediation | PFAS

Sensoil's Vadose-zone Monitoring System: Real-time sensing of the unsaturated domain.

Real-time monitoring of the unsaturated zone is key for groundwater protection against pollution hazards. 

Sensoil's patented Vadose-zone Monitoring System (VMS) is designed to provide continuous real-time information on the hydraulic and chemical properties of percolating water in deep vadose zone through in-situ measurements of natural undisturbed conditions. 

Minimization of subsurface pollution and optimization of remediation efficiency depend on reliable and effective monitoring tools that provide real-time information on the chemical and hydrological state of the percolating water. 

Sensoil's VMS system is already installed in global locations on 5 continents.

Name: Oasis Park
Description:
Climate change is real.
We know it. You know it. But what can we do about it?

Oasis Park is the first step in creating a sustainable future for our planet and its inhabitants. It will house billions of trees and be powered by 100% renewable energy sources such as solar plants, windmills, and atmospheric water generators. This will ensure that each Oasis Park is self-contained, eliminating the need for groundwater and fossil fuels to power it.

Each Oasis Park will provide shade and water to local communities as well as support biodiversity preservation through its unique ecosystem—the first of its kind! By 2030 we hope to have multiple Oasis Parks across the globe, with the ultimate goal being one per country —and it can become the future of a sustainable planet.

Across Europe and the Middle East, EMFIS is collaborating with real estate developers and construction companies to ensure our low-EMF solutions are integrated into new building projects, as well as renovations. By systematically implementing the EMFIS Standard, builders and communities demonstrate their commitment to preserving our health and keeping our planet hospitable for generations to come.

Name: GreenBotanIQ
Description:
GreenBotanIQ ist eine modulare Biodiversitäts- und Kreislaufplattform für Kommunen und Forschung. Das System dient der Umsetzung und dem Monitoring urbaner Biodiversitätsmaßnahmen in real betriebenen Strukturen und verbindet modulare Begrünungseinheiten mit zirkulärer Materialnutzung und phänologischer Beobachtung.
Grundlage von GreenBotanIQ ist ein kreislaufwirtschaftliches Umschichtungsverfahren. Materialien aus Entsiegelung, Rückbau und Aushub werden nicht entsorgt oder klassisch recycelt, sondern vor Ort funktional neu geordnet und weiterverwendet. Ziel ist es, vorhandene Stoffe im System zu halten und ihnen neue ökologische Funktionen zuzuweisen. Dadurch werden Entsorgungsprozesse, Materialneubeschaffung und zusätzliche Transporte vermieden sowie Kosten, CO₂-Emissionen und Flächenverbrauch reduziert.
Aus diesem Verfahren entstehen modulare, mobile Biodiversitätsmodule. Diese sind rückbaubar, versetzbar und skalierbar und ermöglichen ökologische Aufwertungen auch dort, wo dauerhafte Eingriffe in den Boden nicht möglich oder nicht gewünscht sind. Die Module dienen nicht nur der Begrünung, sondern auch der vergleichbaren Beobachtung und Weiterentwicklung von Materialien, Vegetation und Pflegeprozessen.
GreenBotanIQ ist als offenes Verfahren konzipiert. Kommunen, Forschungseinrichtungen, Tiefbau sowie Garten- und Landschaftsbau werden entlang bestehender Arbeitsabläufe eingebunden. Pflanzenversorgung, Betrieb und Pflege integrieren sich in reguläre Prozesse, ohne zusätzliche Fahrten oder neue Verpflichtungen zu erzeugen.
Ein besonderer Fokus liegt auf einem frühen Systemstart vor dem klassischen Vegetationsbeginn. Durch frühaktive Vegetations- und Strukturmodule werden ökologische Lücken im Winter und Frühjahr adressiert und gleichzeitig phänologische Daten erhoben. Ökologische Wirkung und Datenerfassung sind dabei zeitlich und funktional gekoppelt.

Name: Oman Conference for Environmental Sustainability
Description: The “Oman Conference for Environmental Sustainability; Decarbonization” conference is a gathering of individuals and organizations from various sectors who are committed to achieving net-zero carbon emissions. The conference aims to promote the adoption of low-carbon technologies, strategies, and policies to achieve decarbonization, which is the process of reducing or eliminating carbon emissions from various sources. The conference provides a platform for sharing knowledge and ideas on how to achieve decarbonization in different industries, such as energy, transportation, and manufacturing. The participants typically include scientists, researchers, policymakers, industry leaders, and environmentalists who are working towards a common goal of reducing carbon emissions and mitigating the effects of climate change. The decarbonization conference is an important forum for advancing sustainable development and achieving global climate goals.

Name: Edmond Climate Network
Description:
A fully integrated climate value chain solution to help fashion and luxury companies in the ultimate purpose of fighting climate changes, by measuring, reducing and offsetting carbon footprint to achieve global decarbonization targets.

Our solutions allow companies in measuring Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions, delivering an unmatched data visibility across the whole supply chain.

Our softwares provide CO2e data at product level. Forget weeks or months with consultants, forget all related costs. 

Together with fashion industry experts, we have developed robust scientific solutions that our softwares use to properly map the specificity of fashion supply chain, providing results is seconds at a fraction of usual costs.

Our solutions are created together with fashion industry experts, for fashion and luxury industry experts.

Edmond
Engage | Reduce | Offset

Name: Plastic Free Certification
Description:
Attivismo, ricerca, permacultura sono i tre mondi che si sono incontrati, piaciuti e contaminati per confluire nel nuovo progetto denominato Plastic Free Certification Società Benefit.

Un Ente di Certificazione che unisce competenze tecniche, capacità formative e divulgative attraverso il veicolo più potente, quello della coerenza e della passione per il proprio lavoro.

Avere tra noi esperti delle norme Europee, rappresentanti del movimento Zero Waste, esponenti dell’alta ristorazione, menti aperte e cosmopolite, rende il gruppo un laboratorio d’idee tese ad un cambiamento individuale che porti ad un rinnovamento in chiave ecologica, ad una rivoluzione sociale.

“Può darsi che non siate responsabili per la situazione in cui vi trovate, ma lo diventerete se non fate nulla per cambiarla.” Martin Luther King.

Noi ci siamo, pronti con l'entusiasmo di creare nuove occasioni dalle crepe di uno scenario in trasformazione.

Name: UI SDGs Summit
Description:
UI SDGs Summit is a global initiative hosted by the Student Council (BEM) of Universitas Indonesia 2025, designed to raise awareness and understanding of the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), especially among students. It brings together participants from across the globe to take part in diverse activities such as international seminars, public forums, an essay competition, and a student conference.

UI SDGs Summit (UISS) aims to serve as a platform for both Indonesian and international students to actively engage in and contribute to issues related to the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). Specifically, UISS seeks to advocate for greater awareness and dialogue around the SDGs by providing extensive and comprehensive information. In addition, it strives to offer an inclusive space for the development of innovative ideas and solutions through a series of student-centered events.

Name: KLIMA-CONNEXION
Description:
Animés par une profonde conviction environnementale et le désir ardent de préserver la beauté naturelle du Pays Basque, nous avons décidé de former une équipe multidisciplinaire afin de mettre en avant les acteurs qui œuvrent pour la décarbonation sur notre territoire et permettre ainsi une connexion avec les citoyens.



Conscients des défis environnementaux qui pèsent sur notre territoire notre équipe hétéroclite a un objectif clair : déclencher la prise de conscience et susciter l’engagement et ainsi, œuvrer à la transition énergétique et écologique du Pays Basque vers un avenir plus durable et décarboné.



Notre première action est de sensibiliser la communauté locale à l'urgence climatique et aux avantages de la décarbonation. Organisant des événements éducatifs, des ateliers et des conférences, nous souhaitons mobiliser un large soutien populaire.



Avec cette base solide, l'équipe travaillera en étroite collaboration avec les associations et autorités locales, les entreprises et les institutions pour élaborer des stratégies de décarbonation adaptées au contexte spécifique du Pays Basque.



Nous mettons également l'accent sur la déculpabilisation, l’acceptabilité, la prise de conscience sans éco-anxiété afin de permettre à chacun d'entre-nous de passer à l'action.

Name: Vereint Mehr.Wert e.V.
Description:
Wir sind eine von Pionierunternehmen angestoßene Bewegung für alle, die Verantwortung für ihre Umweltauswirkungen übernehmen. Dafür entwickeln und etablieren wir zielgruppenspezifische Angebote, die Unternehmen, Städte, Gemeinden und ihre Stakeholder befähigen, nachhaltig zu handeln – wissenschaftsbasiert und praxistauglich. 

Unser ambitioniertes Ziel ist es, ein Wirtschaften und Leben innerhalb der planetaren Grenzen zu verwirklichen. Um das zu erreichen, geben wir der Umwelt einen Wert und setzen uns dafür ein, dass Nachhaltigkeit Standard wird.

Name: Terraforming LIFE
Description:
Terraforming LIFE is a European collaboration project carried out by First Water, Bændasamtök Íslands, Orkidea, Ölfus Cluster and SMJ. This project has received funding from the European Community’s LIFE program under grant agreement Nr. 101113811.

The Terraforming LIFE project aims to strengthen the regional circular economy by using domestically available resources, i.e. fish sludge and manure, to produce biofertiliser and energy. These are secondary resources that would otherwise be landfilled and/or end up as waste water that is pumped into the ocean. Utilising fish sludge and manure as source of renewable energy  and biofertilizer will also contribute to mitigation of green house gas (GHG) emissions  and reduction of carbon footprint. The project is aimed to design, build, optimise, implement, and validate a new technology to help overcome the challenges related to aquaculture and agricultural systems, climate change and waste reuse. 

The project is co-funded by the European Union. Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union or CINEA. Neither the European Union nor the granting authority can be held responsible for them.

Name: Česká krajina
Description:
Úspěšně obnovujeme biologickou rozmanitost a zmírňujeme dopady klimatických změn. Zachraňujeme stovky ohrožených druhů rostlin a zvířat a poskytujeme jim útočiště. Využíváme k tomu nejlevnější dostupné řešení - obnovu přírodních procesů s pomocí návratů klíčových druhů evropské a české přírody - velkých kopytníků. Divocí koně, zubři a pratuři pomáhají chránit a obnovovat stovky hektarů české přírody. 

Máme výsledky. Díky velkým kopytníkům se daří obnovovat degradovaná území plná černých skládek  na nové přírodní ráje.  Počty vzácných druhů se zvyšují o stovky i tisíce procent. Navíc velcí kopytníci, na rozdíl od hospodářských zvířat, jsou klíčovým nástrojem pro ukládání uhlíku. Vědecké studie prokázaly, že pastevní ekosystému velkých kopytníků vážou o 50 % více uhlíku, než veškeré lesy na planetě. 

Světová odezva. Naše projekty mají publicitu po celém světě, v prestižních titulech jako New York Times, Washington Post, BBC, National Geographic, Science a dalších. Náš nejznámější projekt, milovická rezervace velkých kopytníků, se stala první rezervací na světě, kde žijí všechny tři druhy evropských velkých kopytníků. V roce 2023 se stala stala jediným místem na světě, kde žil vzácný druh perloočky.  

Přinášíme systémovou změnu do české ochrany přírody. Zavádíme finančně efektivní a dlouhodobě udržitelný způsob péče o přírodu na základě nejnovějších vědeckých poznatků a zahraničních zkušenostíí.

Name: IGBC-CBIT
Description:
The Indian Green Building Council (IGBC) CBIT College Unit is a student-run organization dedicated to promoting sustainable practices and green building initiatives within the campus and beyond. As a unit of the IGBC, our mission is to create awareness and educate the community on the importance of sustainable living and its impact on the environment.

Through various initiatives and activities, we aim to encourage students and faculty members to adopt eco-friendly practices and promote sustainable building practices. We believe that by promoting sustainable living, we can not only reduce our carbon footprint but also contribute towards creating a healthier and greener future.

Our activities include organizing seminars, workshops, and guest lectures on sustainable building practices and technologies. We also conduct awareness campaigns on water conservation, energy efficiency, waste management, and other related topics. 

We are committed to promoting sustainable practices and making a positive impact on the environment. Join us in our journey towards creating a greener and more sustainable future for all.

Name: Circula-TEX
Description:
Circula-TEX is a Horizon Europe project that aims to support the EU strategy for Sustainability and Circular Textiles. The project seeks to redesign textile value chains by developing circular economy strategies aligned with Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) policies.

Through an international consortium of 19 partners from Italy, Belgium, Spain, Germany, the Netherlands, Estonia, Bulgaria, and Denmark, Circula-TEX addresses key challenges in the textile supply chain. The project analyzes current shortcomings, assesses the effectiveness of EPR systems, and proposes innovative solutions to improve textile recycling and reuse.

The main areas of intervention include:

•  Eco-design and sustainability, with strategies to facilitate the design of products that are easier to recycle and reuse.
•  Traceability and material identification, through the development of an advanced labeling system aligned with the Digital Product Passport and the ESPR regulation.
•  Harmonization of EPR policies across Europe, with the definition of management models that can be replicated in different Member States.
•  Stakeholder engagement, including producers, recyclers, retailers, and policymakers, to support the development of concrete and scalable solutions.

Circula-TEX goes beyond theoretical research by testing and validating its solutions through real-world case studies, experimenting with new models for textile waste collection, recycling, and management across different market segments in Europe. The project aims to make the textile sector more transparent, responsible, and sustainable, generating both environmental and economic benefits.

Name: Safety training Videos (EHS.HSE )
Description:
HSE Video Service Provider | Customized Video Solutions | Driving Safety & Compliance

 Delivering Engaging HSE Videos | Helping Companies Foster a Safe Work Environment 

With 3 years of experience in the HSE video service industry, I specialize in providing tailored video solutions that empower organizations to enhance their safety culture, promote compliance, and minimize workplace incidents.

 Customized HSE Videos: Transforming Safety Training Into Engaging Experiences 

I collaborate closely with clients to understand their unique safety challenges and objectives. From there, I design and create custom HSE videos that effectively communicate critical safety protocols, best practices, and regulatory compliance measures. By blending captivating storytelling, visual effects, and cutting-edge techniques, I ensure that safety messages resonate with employees at all levels of the organization.

Whether it's incorporating company branding, policies, or specific scenarios, I work closely with clients to integrate their unique elements seamlessly. Name: Banyula
Description:
Banyula is an integrative reforestation project which extends from Big Scrub rainforest remnants which border the property, across our agricultural pastures and orchards.

A family-owned business managed by locals, we see it as our responsibility to conserve and manage nature’s resources. We implement highly adaptable regenerative agriculture practices, aiming for happier and healthier soil, food, humans, farmers and planet.

We also partner with experienced regenerative stakeholders who help nurture the natural capital of our land so we can farm it with purpose. Part of our holistic farm management is to ensure biodiversity is valued, conserved, stored and wisely used.

Our underlying belief is that, by fostering a symbiotic relationship with our environment, we can heal not only the land itself, but each one of us in turn is nourished at a deeper level.

This goes beyond simple sustainability towards the creation and execution of a vision for our children and coming generations.

Name: EUDR Expert
Description:
Jesteśmy NGO specjalizującą się w szkoleniach, wdrożeniach i konsultingu związanych z EUDR - dyrektywą unijną dotyczącą wylesiania. Naszą misją jest wspieranie organizacji we właściwym zrozumieniu i stosowaniu przepisów dotyczących ochrony lasów oraz promowanie zrównoważonych praktyk biznesowych.
 Nasze szkolenia są dostosowane do potrzeb naszych klientów i obejmują zarówno podstawowe informacje na temat EUDR, jak i zaawansowane sesje dotyczące praktycznych aspektów jej wdrożenia.
 Wdrożenia przeprowadzamy w sposób kompleksowy, pomagając naszym klientom w adaptacji ich procesów biznesowych do wymogów dyrektywy unijnej. Dzięki naszej ekspertyzie i doświadczeniu zapewniamy biurokrację ograniczoną do minimum, oraz skuteczne rozwiązania, które przynoszą pozytywne rezultaty.
 Oferujemy wsparcie i doradztwo na każdym etapie procesu, zapewniając naszym klientom kompleksową pomoc w zakresie zrozumienia, interpretacji i wdrażania dyrektywy dotyczącej wylesiania.

Zapewniamy nie tylko wysokiej jakości usługi, ale także partnerskie podejście i indywidualne podejście do ich potrzeb. Jeśli Twoja organizacja poszukuje profesjonalnego wsparcia w zakresie dyrektywy dotyczącej wylesiania, to jesteśmy tu dla Ciebie!

Name: CECOP Afghanistan
Description:
Climate and Environment Coordination Platform (CECOP), formerly known as ENRMN, is a volunteer group of environment activists, experts, and social activists working towards the betterment of the environment and natural resources in Afghanistan. The platform was established in December 2012 in an initiative by 18 civil society organizations. 
CECOP envisions a safe environment, sustainable use of natural resources, and climate-resilient communities in Afghanistan. CECOP's mission is to create a safe environment, promote sustainable use of natural resources and build climate-resilient communities in Afghanistan through advocacy, awareness, research, and capacity building activities.

Name: Nano Infusion Technologies
Description:
Specializing in groundbreaking nanobubble technology, we're at the forefront of a revolution that's reshaping industries worldwide.

Nanobubbles are reshaping industries and applications, from water clarity, algae remediation, and aquaculture to agriculture, wastewater treatment, mining, pool health, and water body cleanups.

Our range of products is meticulously designed to harness the myriad benefits of nanobubbles. These microscopic marvels enhance water quality, improve nutrient absorption, and offer environmentally-friendly remediation solutions. In every industry we touch, our commitment remains the same: to deliver state-of-the-art, sustainable technology that drives performance and results.

Dive into the future with Nano Infusion Technologies and discover a world where cutting-edge science meets unparalleled efficiency.

Name: Cuyahoga River AOC
Description:
The Cuyahoga River AOC (Area of Concern) is identified as the lower 46.5 miles of the river impacting 4 counties and 76 municipalities in Ohio. An AOC is defined as an area of extreme environmental degradation.

As a Great Lakes AOC, the Cuyahoga River AOC is overseen by multiple government agencies and is dedicated to delisting the river as an Area of Concern through the elimination of Beneficial Use Impairments (BUIs). Beneficial Use Impairments (BUIs) are changes to the chemical, physical, or biological integrity of an area that are sufficient to cause restrictions on human use. Of the 10 determined BUIs in the Cuyahoga River, five have already been eliminated. 

Through the efforts and dedication of the Cuyahoga River AOC advisory committee and the citizens of Northeast Ohio, all BUIs can be eliminated to promote a healthy ecosystem where community and wildlife can thrive.

Name: GeCCo - Global Electric Cooking Coalition
Description:
The Global electric Cooking Coalition (GeCCo) is comprised of eCooking advocates who work alongside other existing global and national initiatives promoting higher-tier cooking transitions by providing leadership, integration, knowledge, and funding that is exclusively focused on the rapid global scaling of electric cooking. The coalition represents a working group of partners and provides a platform for engagement to unify work, avoid duplication and optimise output quality.

According to the latest 2023 SDG7 Tracking Report some 2.3 billion people globally still cook using traditional polluting fuels and technologies. In fact, the ESMAP 2020 report The State of Access to Modern Energy Cooking Services (our emphasis) identified 4 billion as not having access to modern energy cooking (higher tier stoves that have such low household air pollution that they don’t affect health). While black carbon emissions dissipate quickly, their impacts are far-reaching. The WHO estimates that premature deaths from indoor air pollution total nearly 3.2 million annually, including about 237,000 children under the age of five who are more prone to pneumonia due to smoke exposure. In addition, annually a gigaton of CO2 emissions comes from burning non-renewable biomass fuels for cooking (about 2 per cent of the global total and equivalent to the amount produced by the aviation sector), whilst the burning of residential solid fuels comprises 58 per cent of global black carbon emissions. As household smoke is therefore both an agent of climate change and air pollution, substantial scale up of electric cooking solutions.

Name: Controlled Environment Testing Association (CETA)
Description:
The Controlled Environment Testing Association (CETA) was established in 1992 to promote quality assurance in the controlled environment industry. The formation of CETA was derived from a need to collect data, network, bring a higher level of integrity to the industry, and improve testing quality. Additionally, the founders sought to aid in the understanding and practical application of the complex standards and guidelines to which we test by educating industry professionals and working with government and regulatory agencies on controlled environment and contamination control issues.

Today, CETA continues to operate based on these founding goals. Through conferences, educational series, and the Performance Review, the semi-annual journal, members exchange and disseminate information on testing and certification issues.

Name: Recell
Description:
Recell is a cellulose based resource for construction and chemical industries. Derived from unutilized residual streams, the Recell products have a highly sustainable profile and all the unique characteristics to fit the needs of various industries. Recell significantly greens production and therefore increases the competitiveness of it's current and future customers.

Recell is trademark by Recell Group B.V., an innovative company dedicated to building a sustainable, future proof economy.

Name: Federal Ministry of Environment, Nigeria
Description:
The Federal Ministry of Environment works to ensure environmental protection, natural resources conservation and sustainable development.

Since its establishment, the Ministry has impacted on raising the issue of environmental consciousness in the minds of Nigerians as well as the interface with the Global environmental best practices. It has focused on involving innovative strategies that emphasize the use of environmental re-engineering as a veritable tool for job creation, poverty eradication, ensuring food security, encouraging sustainable economic development and general improvement in the livelihood of Nigerian populace.

VISION
> To be a Nation that develops in harmony with its environment. 

MISSION
> To ensure environmental protection, natural resources conservation and sustainable development.

MANDATES
> Securing a quality environment conducive for good health and well being of fauna and flora.
> Promoting sustainable use of natural resources.
Restoring and maintaining the ecosystem, ecological process and preserve biodiversity.
> Raising public awareness and promoting understanding of linkages of the environment.
> Cooperating with relevant MDAs, the private sector, NGOs, and International organizations on environmental matters.

Name: Ecosphere Shift
Description:
Vision Statement To empower individuals and communities in Pakistan and beyond through sustainable development, fostering a future where quality education, clean energy, economic growth, innovation, responsible consumption, and environmental harmony are accessible to all.
. Mission Statement Our mission is to: 1. Provide accessible, high-quality education (SDG 4) that equips individuals with the skills and knowledge to thrive in the 21st century. 
2. Promote sustainable energy solutions (SDG 7) to ensure clean, reliable, and affordable energy for all, reducing our environmental impact. 
3. Facilitate inclusive economic growth (SDG 8) that creates decent work opportunities, reduces inequalities, and improves livelihoods. 
4. Foster innovation and infrastructure development (SDG 9) to build resilient communities, support sustainable industries, and promote technological advancements. 
5. Champion responsible consumption and production patterns (SDG 12) to minimize waste, conserve resources, and transition to a circular economy. 
6. Protect, restore, and sustainably manage life on land (SDG 15) to safeguard biodiversity, combat desertification, and promote sustainable land use practices.

Name: Carbon Credit Quality Initiative
Description:
The Carbon Credit Quality Initiative (CCQI) is an independent initiative to offer transparent and free scores on the quality of certain types of carbon credits. 

CCQI’s interactive online Scoring Tool provides scores on a scale from 1 to 5 to help users understand the nuances of carbon credit quality. By providing this Scoring Tool, CCQI aims to enhance the overall quality of carbon credits transacted in the market.  

CCQI was founded by Environmental Defense Fund (EDF), World Wildlife Fund (WWF-US), and Oeko-Institut.  

Connect with us on our mission to enhance the quality of carbon credits in the market. Check out our website for more information: https://carboncreditquality.org/.

Name: Związek Producentów Paliw z Odpadów i Biomasy
Description:
Głównym celem, jaki przyświecał nam podczas tworzenia i zakładania ZPPOB, a także który towarzyszy nam w trakcie prowadzonych przez nas działań, jest wzmocnienie i rozwój gospodarki o obiegu zamkniętym, a także szeroko pojęta ochrona środowiska, ze szczególnym uwzględnieniem gospodarki odpadami, inicjowaniem i wdrażaniem zasad racjonalnej gospodarki odpadami.
Celem ZPPOB jest zrzeszanie i reprezentowanie interesów producentów paliw z odpadów i biomasy z całej Polski w celu ugruntowania pozycji rynkowej pracodawców z branży paliw z odpadów i biomasy oraz aktywnego prowadzenia działań na rzecz ochrony środowiska z uwzględnieniem interesów społecznych.
ZPPOB chce przedstawić znaczący potencjał paliw alternatywnych (RDF) do gospodarczego wykorzystania i uświadomić, że mogą one stanowić substytut dla węgla kamiennego, którego zasoby sukcesywnie się wykorzystują. W związku niższymi dopuszczalnymi poziomami emisji innych substancji, paliwo to może być stosowane zarówno w dużych obiektach spalania, jak i w obiektach o mniejszej mocy.
Uważamy, że jedynie poprzez upowszechnianie wiedzy oraz prowadzenie otwartego dialogu z innymi podmiotami, jesteśmy w stanie wspólnie znaleźć łączące nas płaszczyzny, co umożliwi dążenie do zwiększenia poziomu ochrony środowiska i wzmacniania rozwoju zrównoważonej gospodarki.

Name: Coastal Ocean Environment Summer School in Nigeria and Ghana
Description: COESSING is focused on building collaborations in Ocean Environment in Ghana and Nigeria as well as with other international stakeholders that include Government, NGOs and Private organisations.

Name: Catholic Youth Network for Environmental Sustainability in Africa (CYNESA)
Description: Inspired by St. Pope John Paul II’s 1990 message for World Day of Peace, in which he called for the need to upscale ecological awareness and to find fitting expression in concrete programs and initiatives, young Catholics from Kenya, Ethiopia, Zimbabwe, Tanzania, Zambia, Rwanda and South Africa, drawn from and representing university chaplaincies and parish groups, joined up to respond to this invitation, and to set up the Africa-wide Catholic Youth Network for Environmental Sustainability in Africa (CYNESA) in January 2012. CYNESA is - the platform for all young Catholics in Africa, promoting responsible stewardship of the environment!

Name: O! Millionaire

O! Millionaire is a global movement redefining what it means to play and win. As the world’s first environmentally-focused draw, we unite the thrill of life-changing prizes with a powerful mission: to heal the planet one Green Certificate at a time.

Every Thursday at 8 PM GST, participants worldwide stand a chance to win millions while supporting real climate action. When you purchase a Green Certificate, you’re not just entering a draw—you’re funding the development of Oasis Park, a visionary project turning desert lands into lush green spaces through large-scale tree-planting and sustainable reforestation.

 Why O! Millionaire?

- First-of-its-kind green draw with a global impact
- Contributions go directly toward ecological restoration
- Weekly opportunities to win big while backing a meaningful cause
- Transparent, secure, and driven by a mission of planet-first progress

We're creating a future where winning and giving back go hand in hand. Be part of a worldwide community that's turning dreams into reality, both personal and planetary.

Join O! Millionaire.
Play for the planet. Win for your future.

Name: Carrefour d'Hygiène
Description:
