Notre engagement : qualité, transparence et amélioration continue.

Name: LandPrint
Description:
LandPrint measures the environmental quality of farms and develops economic and financial mechanisms to transition supply chains towards regenerative agriculture.  Our cutting-edge technology enables accurate assessment of the adoption of regenerative farming practices and provides a detailed overview of a farm or a group of farms' environmental quality.  Starting from our measurements, we transform the environmental quality in financial assets through certified environmental data output that serves as a valuable resource for multiple stakeholders, including farmers, corporations, financial institutions and consumers. This data assists in the strategic implementation, consistent monitoring, and responsible financing of regenerative transitions. LandPrint aims to resolve the primary roadblock to the scalability of regenerative agriculture - the lack of incentives and high-risk burden that currently dissuade farmers from transitioning from traditional to regenerative practices. Under the existing market structure, farmers shoulder the entire risk of transition to regenerative practices without a commensurate reward or recognition of the environmental benefits they provide. This imbalance is part of what LandPrint seeks to address. ///

LandPrint avalia a qualidade ambiental de fazendas e cria soluções econômicas e financeiras para promover a agricultura regenerativa. Com tecnologia avançada, faz uma análise precisa das práticas agrícolas regenerativas e transforma os dados ambientais em ativos financeiros, beneficiando agricultores, empresas, instituições financeiras e consumidores. Esses dados facilitam a implementação, monitoramento e financiamento de transições para práticas sustentáveis. LandPrint busca superar o desafio da escalabilidade da agricultura regenerativa, enfrentando a falta de incentivos e o alto risco que impedem os agricultores de adotarem práticas regenerativas, buscando equilibrar os riscos e benefícios dessa transição.

Name: Cassava Bags Australia
Description: Cassava Bags Australia was founded on the belief that businesses can be a force for good and that individual actions, collectively, have the power to change the world.

Catalyzing Collective Innovation for Systemic Change!

Name: Renatura Congo
Description:
Renatura est une association de protection de la biodiversité et de promotion du développement durable. Elle agit à travers quatre programmes :
- La conservation des tortues marines et de leurs habitats via le suivi et la surveillance des plages de pontes ainsi que la libération des individus capturés accidentellement dans les filets de pêche.
- L'éducation et la sensibilisation à l'environnement des enfants et du grand public à travers des animations scolaires, des clubs vacances natures, des émissions dans les médias et des événements

- L'appui à la création et à l'opérationnalisation de l'aire marine protégée de la Baie de Loango

Name: SANISPHERE
Description: Au service du soulagement durable

Name: Programme PAPBio
Description:
L’Union internationale pour la conservation de la nature (UICN) est une union de Membres composée de gouvernements et d’organisations de la société civile. Elle offre aux organisations publiques, privées et non-gouvernementales les connaissances et les outils nécessaires pour que le progrès humain, le développement économique et la conservation de la nature se réalisent en harmonie. Créée en 1948, l’UICN s’est agrandie au fil des années pour devenir le réseau environnemental le plus important et le plus diversifié au monde. Elle compte avec l’expérience, les ressources et le poids de ses 1.400 organisations Membres et les compétences de plus de 17.000 experts. Elle fait aujourd’hui autorité au niveau international sur l’état de la nature et des ressources naturelles dans le monde et sur les mesures pour les préserver. Nos experts se divisent en six Commissions, dédiées à la sauvegarde des espèces, au droit de l’environnement, aux aires protégées, aux politiques économiques et sociales, à la gestion des écosystèmes, et à l’éducation et la communication.
Dans le cadre de la mise en œuvre du Programme Indicatif Régional (PIR) de l'Union européenne en Afrique de l’Ouest 2014–2020 (11e Fonds européen de développement), dans le Domaine prioritaire 3 « Résilience, sécurité alimentaire et nutritionnelle et ressources naturelles », il a été retenu, en concertation avec la CEDEAO et l’UEMOA, un Programme d'appui à la préservation de la biodiversité et des écosystèmes fragiles, à la gouvernance environnementale et au changement climatique en Afrique de l’Ouest - PAPBio (ROC/FED/039-269).

Name: Delaware Center for Horticulture
Description:
The Delaware Center for Horticulture (DCH) was founded in 1977 by members of the Garden Club of Wilmington to promote a love of gardening and urban greening. As a non-profit membership organization, DCH's mission is to inspire individuals and communities through the power of plants. We cultivate a greener community, inspiring appreciation and improvement of our environment through horticulture, education and conservation.

We achieve our mission through Education and Outreach programs, including our Branches to Chances/Return to Work horticultural job skills training program for returning citizens, youth gardening education programs, trips, tours, lectures, and hands-on workshops. Through our Community Forestry programs, we have planted and cared for over 15,000 trees by partnering with neighborhood and community groups, schools, and municipalities across Delaware. Our Urban Agriculture programs include the creation and support of over 30 community gardens, including Wilmington's first urban farm. We beautify high-impact gateways and roadsides through our Public Landscapes program, integrating water management and urban-tolerant plants into sustainable landscape design. 

Our newly updated facility in Wilmington's Trolley Square neighborhood includes an accessible public garden, art gallery, and examples of sustainable building design, renewable energy, energy efficiency, and our new "infinity green roof," completed in October 2017. Events such as the Rare Plant Auction, seasonal plant sales, and events that integrate food, wine, craft beer, art, and music engage gardeners of all levels and interests. Join us and support our work as a volunteer, member or partner!

Name: Youth Green Society
Description:
YGS is an award winning youth led organisation inspired by The 2030 
Agenda for Sustainable Development. We are focused on implementing 
terrestrial ecosystem restoration, climate change reforms, achieving food 
security and reducing poverty among youth in Kenya using the Green 
Economy Strategy Implementation Plan (GESIP) to promote sustainable 
economic growth.

Name: Ville Éponge
Description:
Ville Éponge est une initiative lancée et coordonnée par le Conseil régional de l’environnement - région de la Capitale-Nationale depuis l’automne 2020. Il s’agit à la fois d'un réseau d'experts et une communauté de pratique qui rassemble une diversité d'acteurs pour traiter des enjeux de verdissement et de gestion des eaux pluviales dans nos milieux de vie.

Notre mission :
Favoriser l’essor des infrastructures vertes de gestion durable des eaux pluviales en milieu bâti partout au Québec, en unissant les efforts de la communauté.

LA solution aux enjeux urbains d'aujourd'hui : la ville éponge.

Un concept plutôt simple :
Il s’agit d’aménager la ville de façon à gérer l’eau de pluie à la source, là où elle tombe, pour que la ville agisse en quelque sorte comme une éponge, plutôt que de rejeter l’eau le plus rapidement possible vers les cours d’eau.

Comment?
Pour intégrer le concept de ville éponge dans le paysage urbain et rendre nos villes plus résilientes face aux changements climatiques, il faut favoriser la déminéralisation et le verdissement, en réduisant les surfaces asphaltées et bétonnées dans nos milieux bâtis, ainsi qu’en protégeant et augmentant les espaces végétalisés. Les villes doivent donc opter pour des aménagements qui favorisent l’absorption de l’eau, telles que les infrastructures vertes.

Nos actions :
- Sensibiliser ; informer sur les bénéfices des infrastructures vertes
- Outiller ; Créer, regrouper et partager les ressources et outils pertinents 
- Accompagner ; Assister dans l'idéation, la conception et la réalisation de projets 
- Consolider ; Renforcer et enrichir la communauté par la création d'un lieu d'échange et d'apprentissage
- Inspirer ; Promouvoir les réalisations et innovations en matière de gestion durable des eaux de pluie

Name: The Green Pillar
Description:
The Green Pillar is a global initiative to combat climate change and encourage sustainable living. TGP is founded by Prasiddhi Singh, founder of Prasiddhi Forest Foundation, India's youngest fruit forest creator, Prime Minister National Child Awardee, Brand Ambassador Beti Bachao Beti Padhao, by Tamil Nadu Government, Child Ambassador Green Tamil Nadu Mission. 

We are on a path to healing mother nature through the power of nature-based action and awareness solutions. Here you get a chance to become a natural climate leader by proactively learning under the guidance of our esteemed Global TGP experts. As a part of this initiative, we offer Four GREEN PILLARS for people to LEARN | ACT | IMPACT. These pillars include Social Impact and Solutions, Climate Education Courses, Global Tribe and Action and Awards. 

With The Green Pillar, our mission is to reinvent the planet Earth as a vibrant place for all living beings. If your heart ticks for the planet, join us to collaborate, campaign, engage, mentor or train. Together we can #HealOurEarth. Take the first step with The Green Pillar. Visit our website thegreenpillar.com.

Name: Ebkar for Environmental Services and Consultancy - شركة إبكار للخدمات والإستشارات البيئية
Description:
شركة إبكار ھي شركة لیبیة رائدة في مجال الاستشارات والخدمات البیئیة تقدم مجموعة واسعة من الخدمات والحلول الهندسية لقطاعات النفط والغاز , الطاقة, الصحة, إدارة المياه, البنى التحتية, البلديات والصناعات الرئيسة الأخرى ومعالجة المشاكل الناجمة عن ضعف الخدمات لتحسین ودیمومة نظافة البيئة لحماية الصحة العامة للمجتمع.

تقدم شركة إبكار خدماتها الهندسية والبیئیة من خلال فریق من ذوي الخبرة مجھزین بموارد عالية التقنية و شراكات قوبة مع حلفاء من كبرى المؤسسات الدولیة المتخصصة في ھذا المجال, ما یؤھلھا لأنجاز مشاریعھا بكفاءة وفاعلیة, لینعكس إلتزامنا بتقدیم أفضل الخدمات على نجاح الشركة وثقتها المكتسبة من عملائنا.

Name: LIFE Biodiv'Est
Description:
LIFE Biodiv’Est est un ensemble de 27 actions concrètes pour la préservation de la biodiversité dans les milieux naturels et agricoles de la Région Grand Est.
Les actions du projet sont soutenues par l’Union Européenne et ses partenaires. La Région Grand Est coordonne l’ensemble des actions avec l’appui de : 
-	la direction régionale de l’environnement, de l’aménagement et du logement (DREAL)
-	l’office français de la biodiversité (OFB)
-	les trois agences de l’eau du territoire (Rhin-Meuse, Seine Normandie, Rhône-Méditerranée-Corse)

LIFE Biodiv’Est développe une ingénierie opérationnelle et la connaissance fine des enjeux du territoire pour démultiplier la mobilisation des acteurs publics et privés autour des solutions de préservation de l’environnement et du climat. 

Fort de ses actions collectives autour de 14 partenaires engagés, les objectifs du LIFE Biodiv'Est contribuent conjointement à la mise en oeuvre de la Stratégie Régionale pour la Biodiversité et aux ambitions européennes du Cadre d'action Prioritaire Natura 2000. 

> préserver des espèces et des milieux menacés
> mobiliser des entreprises et industriels
> création de 10 nouvelles réserves naturelles
> planter 1000 km de haie
> former à la biodiversité 
> créer un réseau de 40 fermes vitrines pour améliorer les connaissances en milieu agricole
> mobiliser 8 000 élèves et enseignants autour de projets pédagogiques
> etc.

Name: Green Hurghada
Description:
Green Hurghada is a collaborative initiative implemented by the Egyptian Environmental Affairs Agency (EEAA) in partnership with the United Nations Industrial Development Organization (UNIDO) and funded by the Global Environment Facility (GEF).

We aim to reduce the environmental impact of tourism and conserve the region's rich biodiversity by integrating climate-smart technologies and promoting responsible practices.

Our Objectives:

- Promote climate-smart infrastructure and practices in tourism, energy, and transport.
- Integrate biodiversity conservation into tourism development and operations.
-  Reduce greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions.

Our Key Focus Areas:

- Renewable Energy
- Energy Efficiency
- E-mobility
- Nature-Based Solutions
- Climate-Smart Technologies

Project Components:

- Strategic Policy Development: 

Develop a Strategic Environmental Assessment (SEA) to guide sustainable tourism development and strengthen institutional capacity for applying Natural Capital Accounting (NCA) in tourism and related sectors.

- Green Technology Investments:

 Develop a climate-smart capital investment plan with a pipeline of green investments and develop a financial mechanism to incentivize the tourism sector to invest in climate-smart technologies and nature-based solutions.

- Long-Term Sustainability: 

Enhance stakeholder capacities, awareness, and partnerships to promote sustainable tourism practices and improve protected area management, community participation, and benefit-sharing from conservation and biodiversity-friendly tourism.

- Monitoring and Evaluation: 

Establish monitoring and evaluation mechanisms to track project implementation and impact and conduct a mid-term review and terminal evaluation to assess progress and outcomes.

Name: Dark Sky Ireland
Description: We are a voluntary organisation working to ensure Ireland's night skyscapes are celebrated, restored and protected for present and future generations of all living things

We're establishing a new benchmark for clean air – a set of transparent, science-backed standards that all nations and integrators can strive for. Join us on our mission to create a world where everyone breathes the same clean air.

Name: Mississippi Watershed Management Organization
Description:
The Mississippi Watershed Management Organization is a special-purpose unit of local government operating under a joint-powers agreement between seven cities and the Minneapolis Park and Recreation Board. We are involved in a variety of activities designed to protect and enhance water quality and habitat in the heart of the Twin Cities metropolitan area. Our program areas encompass such diverse activities as monitoring pollution levels in the Mississippi River, funding major capital improvement projects to manage stormwater runoff and providing environmental employment and education opportunities to youth.

MWMO member communities include Columbia Heights, Fridley, Hilltop, Lauderdale, Minneapolis, the Minneapolis Park and Recreation Board, Saint Anthony Village and Saint Paul. A map of our watershed boundaries is available on our website.

Name: SEAS بحار
Description: Environment, Gender Equality, Youth, Heritage

Name: Earth's Ants
Description: Earth’s Ants is a youth-led organization dedicated to advancing environmental sciences through impactful research, education, and innovative solutions. We strive to address global environmental challenges by empowering young minds with knowledge and hands-on experience. Through community projects, seminars, and collaborative research, Earth’s Ants promotes sustainable practices and fosters environmental awareness. Our team, passionate about creating a greener planet, works on issues like climate change, conservation, and renewable energy, while encouraging innovative approaches to solve pressing environmental problems. Together, we aim to inspire the next generation to take action and contribute to building a more sustainable and eco-conscious world.

Description: PIP consulting & Solutions est un bureau de consulting, de formation, d’audit et d’assistance QSE, transition énergétique et comptabilité carbone.

The Soil Valley ecosystem is committed to maintaining healthy soil. For food, climate, and spatial planning.

Name: Water Stewardship Assurance Services (WSAS)
Description:
Water Stewardship Assurance Services (WSAS) is the mission-driven assurance provider for the Alliance for Water Stewardship (AWS) System. We contribute to the AWS mission by providing robust assurance against the AWS Standard. 

After the initial certification, we assess sites’ continual improvement through our surveillance and re-certification processes. As the custodian of the International Water Stewardship Standard, AWS oversees WSAS performance to maintain the quality, integrity and credibility of the certification scheme.

Name: TREENET Incorporated

Name: Arun Duggal Centre of Excellence for Research in Climate Change and Air Pollution
Description:
Vision
To contribute to restoring Blue Skies and improving Air Quality in Delhi/ NCR and other cities in India through scientific research and as a Think Tank.

Mission
To identify initiatives and policies in India and internationally which have been effective for sustained ambient air quality improvement.
Provide scientific information and objective feedback on effectiveness of various clean air programmes to Government policy makers.
Assist in setting Goals and Pathways for achieving satisfactory ambient air quality in Delhi/NCR and other cities in India.
Develop practical and effective solutions for short, medium and long term for improvement in ambient air quality.
To support multidisciplinary and multi institution research projects for improving ambient air quality and Indoor air quality.
Help enhance public understanding and participation promoting Clean Air initiatives.
Exchange learnings and share knowledge with other countries facing air pollution problems.
Collaborate with Industry on Clean Air and emission reduction equipment initiatives and Indoor Air quality improvement programs

Values
Scientific Integrity and quest to enhance knowledge.
Collaborative, constructive and solution-oriented approach.

Name: دبين للتنمية البيئية Dibeen for Environmental Development
Description:

activists under the authorization of the Jordanian
Ministry of Environment. The association is

and upgrade the environmental reality, by

them to achieve their goals of living in a healthy

The Association seeks to achieve its objectives
within the available resources and support
available, and by developing and providing many

organizations and bodies concerned, taking into

mechanisms of sustainable environmental
development.

MISSION:
Provide consulting, research,
education and empowerment services
in partnership with the public and
private sectors and civil society
institutions as well as strengthen the

efforts to preserve the environment
among these stakeholders, which
would contribute to the achievement
of sustainable environmental
development in accordance with

resources

Biodiversity conservation.
Use of renewable energy.
Forest protection.
Reducing the effects of climate change.
Recycling.
Environmentally friendly consumption patterns.
Creating an environmental network of experts, researchers, students andvolunteers to monitor and document the environmental situation.

Name: Green Phenix
Description:
Green Phenix recycles PET, HDPE and PP plastic on Curacao and aims to do that in the whole Caribbean. Creating a circular revolution is the goal, so less plastic ends up in the environment. 

Green Phenix is a social enterprise aimed to create empoyment opportunities and to get a sustainable income stream for conservation activities in the Caribbean, starting with Curacao.

Name: ASPEN - Filtros e Purificadores de Água
Student Society for Climate Change Awareness
Description:
Our project aims to address one of the most pressing global challenges – climate change. The primary goal is to educate and mobilize the next generation of leaders, emphasizing the role of climate change as a justice issue.

We intend to equip over 1000 students across 25 universities in South Asia with the knowledge and skills to mitigate climate change, enabling them to become climate change ambassadors. These ambassadors will develop and implement climate-friendly policies, practices, and programs within their universities and communities.

Name: Local Compost Chile
Description:
Somos una empresa B especializada en la gestión sostenible de residuos orgánicos, centrada en la educación, recolección y revalorización de este desafío 

Ofrecemos un plan integral de diseño, implementación y operación de sistemas de compostaje con municipios y actores locales, articulados en busca de un triple impacto positivo: económico, social y ambiental

Name: VQT
Description:
We are VQT, a trusted leader in inspection, testing, verification, and certification services.
Operating with global standards of quality, integrity, and compliance, we empower clients to confidently access international markets.
With cutting-edge technology and expert teams, we ensure your products and processes meet the highest safety and regulatory benchmarks.

Name: Green Mentorship
Description:
A sub-entity of the TeraShift Sustainability Initiative

Green Mentorship nurtures passionate young minds committed to creating a sustainable future. Our cohort-based virtual mentorship program provides aspiring sustainability professionals with guidance, knowledge, and connections to thrive in their careers.

We bridge the gap between aspiring sustainability professionals and experienced industry leaders, fostering collaboration for knowledge-sharing, professional growth, and meaningful impact. We equip the next generation with skills, insights, and networks to drive positive change.

Green Mentorship offers a comprehensive cohort-based experience tailored to each participant's goals. Through one-on-one mentoring, interactive workshops, peer learning, networking opportunities, and valuable resources, we empower participants to develop expertise, refine leadership abilities, and understand the sustainability landscape.

We successfully completed our first cohort as of September 30, 2026 - a milestone reflecting our commitment to transformative mentorship. Building on this success, we welcome new cohorts of changemakers ready to accelerate their sustainability careers.

Whether you're a student, recent graduate, or young professional transitioning into sustainability, Green Mentorship helps you cultivate your potential and contribute to a greener world. Connect with us today and become part of a dynamic network of changemakers shaping the future of sustainability.

Name: JPR Ambiental
Description: Nossa missão é fornecer soluções inovadoras e sustentáveis para ajudar nossos clientes a reduzir o impacto ambiental de suas operações e promover um futuro mais verde. Através de nossos serviços, buscamos proteger e preservar os recursos naturais para as gerações futuras, mantendo os mais altos padrões éticos e de responsabilidade social. A JPR acredita nos três pilares da sustentabilidade: social, econômico e ambiental. Ao mesmo tempo em que nossa missão é contribuir para a preservação do meio ambiente, queremos impactar positivamente a vida dos nossos colaboradores e das empresas para as quais trabalhamos.

Name: Oath for Sustainability Network
Description:
We are a 501(c)(3), female- and minority-led organization and currently run a global virtual office structure with group operations and programs in the USA and Nigeria, with others in Kenya and Zimbabwe.
Our mission is to promote transdisciplinary efforts to improve planetary action across systems to protect the health of people in low-income settings through research, advocacy, and education. Young people have been at the core of our operations since 2019, championing advocacy, education, and research in the climate, health, and equity nexus. We currently have over 1900 young people from 54 countries who have been involved in our activities, such as training, fellowships, community engagements, etc.

Name: Junior Energiecoach
Description: Welke apparaten slurpen de meeste stroom? Hoeveel lampen branden er thuis? Junior Energiecoach is een educatief programma voor basisscholen en scoutinggroepen en daagt kinderen uit. Met weekchallenges, proefjes, geheime enveloppen, puzzels en spelletjes ontdekken kinderen (én ouders) hoe je kunt besparen. Kinderen worden benoemd tot Junior Energiecoach en de portemonnee van ouders blijft een beetje voller. Wedden dat jij straks ook zegt: ‘Met energie kun je lachen!'

Name: GreenTurGo
Description:
GreenTurGo ile bir adım önde olun
Turizm sektöründe karmaşık olan sürdürülebilirlik ortamında çözümler üretiyoruz.

Name: Forests With Impact
Description:
In 2019, a group of organisations working in Cumbria came together, with the desire to make a difference to the local community and environment. 

Looking at their available skills and resources, these pioneering companies decided they could make a significant impact on the social and environmental landscape of the area through a new, innovative collaboration that today has developed into the 'Forests with Impact' programme. 

We pave the way for a future where prisons are catalysts for positive change, eco systems flourish and communities thrive. Visit our website to learn more.

Name: VSAG TradeRoom
Description:
V Shield AG is a Swiss sustainability firm specializing in custom environmental integrity systems that help organizations transform environmental responsibility into measurable strategic value.

Our flagship solution — the Trade Room Platform — enables companies to measure, manage, and offset carbon emissions across their entire value chain with full transparency, accuracy, and compliance.
Through cutting-edge technology and verified carbon standards, V Shield supports Scope 1, 2, and 3 management, ESG alignment, and the monetization of verified climate action.

At V Shield AG, we combine Swiss precision, global sustainability expertise, and digital innovation to deliver tailor-made solutions for industries including:

Finance – Financed emissions & ESG compliance
Manufacturing – Operational decarbonization
Transportation – Logistics & fleet optimization
Technology – Data-driven sustainability performance
Retail – Multi-site emissions harmonization
Tourism – Sustainable hospitality and carbon reporting

Our mission is to make sustainability measurable, credible, and profitable — helping organizations lead with integrity in the era of global decarbonization.

V Shield AG is headquartered in Lugano, Switzerland, and operates globally as an independent carbon emissions tracking platform.


Sustainability, engineered for performance.

Name: PT. Restorasi Ekosistem Indonesia - Hutan Harapan
Description: Hutan Harapan is the remaining lowland tropical forest in Sumatra which represents about 20 percent of the biodiversity on the island of Sumatra. This forest area is the first Ecosystem Restoration concession in Indonesia. Located on the border of the provinces of Jambi and South Sumatra with an area of 98,555 hectares.

Name: Enarau Conservancy
Hydro Analyses Group
Description:
Chez Hydrag, on travaille sur le contrôle de la qualité des milieux naturels ( EAU ,SOL et AIR ).
On fournit des réactifs et des matériels de laboratoires de laboratoires d'assurance qualité.
On forme et conseille sur les techniques et stratégies de traitement et de maintient de la qualité de l'eau , du sol et des boissons .
Nous avons des partenariats publics privés a travers le pays et avec de grands services.
On évolue en continue sur les technologies de contrôle, de traitement et de maintient de la qualité.

Name: Almaty Air Initiative
Description:
Everyone has the right to health and clean air, regardless of their social status, income level, or nationality. The ability to breathe clean air and maintain one's health is a fundamental human right, not contingent on social standing. The idea that wealthier individuals live in areas with cleaner air, while poorer communities endure more pollution, is fundamentally unjust.

Almaty currently exemplifies this breach in environmental justice. For many of its residents, clean air is still a privilege rather than a universal right, severely impacting the health of numerous people, including children. Moreover, air pollution is detrimentally affecting the city’s economic growth. Almaty is losing ground in the global competition for human resources due to these environmental issues, which discourage both new talent and investment, and drive many capable citizens to relocate.

Embracing modern technologies, science, and the arts, along with engaging civil society, the media, thought leaders, and attracting experts and sponsors, are essential. Additionally, a productive dialogue with government officials can significantly purify Almaty’s air in the near future.

Our strategy to enhance air quality in Almaty includes the phased implementation of effective technological solutions; raising awareness among residents about the problem, its causes, and solutions to shift attitudes and behaviors; and collaborating with national and municipal authorities. By adopting new and leveraging existing, proven approaches based on international experience and empirical data, we can address substantial issues not only in other Kazakh cities but globally.

Our goal is to swiftly transform Almaty into a city that is both comfortable and attractive for residents, where every child grows up healthy, and everyone lives and works without risking their health.

Name: MAZINGIRA YETU MAGAZINE
Description:
Mazingira Yetu Magazine is an Environmental Education based publication first published in December 2012 by Mazingira Yetu Organization. It is registered with the Kenya Copy Rights Board, the Registrar of Books and Newspapers and is a member of the International Union of Conservation of Nature-Commission of Education and Communication (IUCN-CEC) as well as being recognized by UN Climate Change Learning Partnership (UN CC: Learn) as a publication that is on the forefront of educating communities on climate change.
The magazine is published in English language on a quarterly basis and is available on Google Play store and on order in print format. Mazingira Yetu magazine readership is across Africa and is one of the few environmental based publications in Kenya.

Name: Health & Environment   Research Center (HERC)
Description:
The "Health and Environmental Research Center" of Tabriz University of Medical Sciences was established in 2016 with the aim of producing, developing, and advancing knowledge in the field of environmental health and the impacts of the environment on health. This center, by bringing together experts from various fields and relying on up-to-date knowledge and a community-oriented approach, has the capacity to address the country's needs regarding the various aspects of environmental impacts on public health. Through the design and implementation of basic and applied research on the impact of environmental factors on human health, the center aims to provide credible scientific evidence for the implementation of intervention programs to address health issues at regional and national levels, making it useful for planners and policymakers. The Health and Environmental Research Center plays a key role in monitoring environmental pollutants, understanding the relationship between health and the increasing burden of diseases caused by environmenta

مرکز تحقیقات "سلامت و محیط زیست " دانشگاه علوم پزشکی تبریز با هدف تولید، توسعه و ارتقای دانش درحوزه بهداشت محیط و اثرات محیط زیست بر سلامت در سال 1395 تاسیس و درحال فعالیت می باشد. این مرکز با تجمیع متخصصین مختلف و با تکیه بر  دانش روز و جامعه نگری این امکان را دارد تا به نیازهای کشور از جنبه های مختلف تأثیر محیط زیست بر سلامت مردم پاسخ دهد. این مرکز با طراحی و اجرای پژوهش های بنیادی و کاربردی در زمینه تاثیر عوامل محیطی  بر سلامت انسان سعی دارد شواهد علمی معتبر به منظور اجرای برنامه های مداخله ای در جهت حل مسائل و مشکلات سلامت در سطح منطقه ای و ملی تولید نماید تا مورد استفاده برنامه ریزان و سیاستگذاران قرار گیرد. مرکز تحقیقات سلامت و محیط زیست از طریق پایش آلاینده های زیست محیطی، شناخت ارتباط بین سلامت و گسترش بار بیماری های ناشی از عوامل و آلاینده های زیست محیطی، توسعه و توانمندسازی منابع انسانی متخصص و کارآمد و ارائه برنامه های اجرایی و عملی در تحقق محیطی سالم برای زندگی سالم و شاداب مردم منطقه و کشور ایفا نقش نماید

Name: VQT
Description:
We are VQT, a trusted leader in inspection, testing, verification, and certification services.
Operating with global standards of quality, integrity, and compliance, we empower clients to confidently access international markets.
With cutting-edge technology and expert teams, we ensure your products and processes meet the highest safety and regulatory benchmarks.

Name: Saluvia
Description: Edukujemy, projektujemy i organizujemy spotkania, które sprzyjają harmonii człowieka z naturą.

Name: Green Fortis
Description:
Green Fortis is a climate project developer pioneering the next generation of high-integrity carbon assets and climate-positive investment solutions.

We specialize in the design, implementation, and registration of nature-based and Improved Forest Management (IFM) projects across Romania and Central & Eastern Europe, delivering carbon credits that meet the highest standards of environmental integrity and market transparency.

As the originator of the Verified Carbon Provenance (VCP) framework, Green Fortis is redefining how carbon benefits are measured, verified, and valued. Through our innovation—Structured Emission Offsetting Deposits (SEODs)—we link verified emissions reductions to structured financial performance, transforming traditional carbon credits into bankable, tradable instruments suitable for institutional and corporate climate strategies.

Our work spans the full project lifecycle:

Climate project origination and technical design

Robust Monitoring, Reporting, and Verification (MRV)

Registration under recognized voluntary carbon standards

Carbon credit issuance and custodial administration

Financial integration of carbon assets through SEODs

By bridging scientific integrity, on-the-ground impact, and financial innovation, Green Fortis empowers companies, investors, and governments to achieve net-zero goals while channeling capital into climate-positive, nature-based solutions.

Our mission:
To unlock the full environmental and economic value of natural climate solutions, accelerating global decarbonization through transparency, innovation, and high-integrity project development.

Name: UrbanBetter Nairobi Cityzens
Description: A part of the African-led UrbanBetter's Citizens Hub. Our aim is to harness physical activity and citizen science to create more live-able and healthier Nairobi.

Name: CzWA
Description: CzWA sdružuje odborníky, společnosti a instituce s hlavním cílem dosažení efektivního a udržitelného rozvoje v celé oblasti vodního hospodářství a ochrany vodního prostředí.

Name: Climate Action Center Karachi
Description: The Climate Action Centre (CAC) is a cultural center promoting climate awareness and advocacy. Through extensive public engagement involving citizens, youth, and local communities, CAC Karachi has significantly advanced public understanding of critical climate issues. With strong media relationships, academic collaborations, expert input, and partnerships with grassroots organizations, CAC advocates for climate justice and equitable access to energy. Emphasizing global solidarity, CAC fosters collaboration to address climate emergencies.

Name: Sustaim GmbH
Description: We are helping companies to achieve Net-Zero by providing access to highly qualitative and transparent CO2 offsetting projects via our marketplace. Through tokenization technology, we are validating the impact of companies' offsetting efforts and thus making sure that actual positive influence on our environment is achieved.

Name: InBestSoil
Description:
Soil is an important, yet often neglected, element of the climate system. It is the second largest carbon store or "carbon dioxide sink" after the oceans. Restoring essential terrestrial ecosystems and sustainable land use in urban and rural areas can help us mitigate and adapt to climate change. The loss of soil quality currently costs an estimated €50 billion annually.

Using an innovative business model, the objective of InBestSoil is to create a framework for investing in the conservation and restoration of soil health by developing a system of economic valuation of the ecosystem services provided by healthy soil, as well as incorporating it into business models and incentives. This enables public and private organizations to design strategies with local stakeholders and work collectively to deliver EU policies, providing data, evidence, tools, and models to assess how investments in soil health can contribute to the transition to a durable and long-term resistance of the soil.

This 48-month project, funded by the European Union through the Horizon Europe program, will involve twenty partners from ten countries with very different profiles (universities, small and medium-sized enterprises, consultancies, farmers, and NGOs, among others).

Name: KIMO International
Description:
We are international network of local governments with a shared concern for the seas that sustain us. With over 80 member municipalities in eight countries, we represent more than five million citizens in Europe. 

Founded in Denmark in 1990, our mission is to prevent pollution and to protect, preserve and enhance the seas and coastal waters of the North-East Atlantic and Baltic regions for future generations.

Our members are committed to finding, implementing and sharing positive solutions. We believe that through cooperation and collaboration, we can tackle the most pressing challenges facing the marine environment. Together, we are a powerful voice that influences decision makers at regional, national and international levels.

KIMO members also enjoy opportunities to exchange knowledge and experience nationally and internationally, keep up to date with important developments in laws and regulations and to develop and take part in projects with real local impacts.

Name: Atmo Occitanie
Description:
ATMO Occitanie est l’organisme régional agréé par le Ministère de l’environnement pour surveiller, évaluer, prévoir et informer chacun sur la qualité de l’air qu’il respire. Le fondement d’ATMO Occitanie est « le droit à Chacun de respirer un air qui ne nuise pas à sa santé » loi LAURE 1996 – Loi sur l’air et l’utilisation rationnelle de l’énergie.

Ces valeurs d’indépendance, transparence, compétence, expertise et d’efficacité sont mises au service d’un objectif associatif axé sur la transversalité Air, Climat, Energie et Santé. (https://www.atmoviz.org/ ).

Les équipes d’ATMO Occitanie à Toulouse et Montpellier assurent la prévision de la qualité de l'air et des pollens au quotidien sur le territoire de la région Occitanie et publient annuellement plus de 150 rapports (https://www.atmo-occitanie.org/ ).

Un engagement fort des équipes permet à notre structure indépendante, de rayonner sur tout le territoire au service de nos 200 partenaires collectivités, acteurs économique, associations et représentants d’état. 

Toutes ces données sont disponibles en Open Data (https://data-atmo-occitanie.opendata.arcgis.com/ )

Name: TOUR INSEE - Association IN-C Malakoff
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page de l'association IN C' Malakoff ! Engagée dans la lutte contre la démolition de la Tour INSEE, en faveur de sa restructuration. Suivez notre page Linkedin mais aussi nos profils sur les autres réseaux :
Facebook:  https://www.facebook.com/AssociationINCMalakoff   
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/in_c_malakoff_inseepasfini/?hl=fr

Name: The NELAC Institute | 501(c)(3) Non-Profit Organization
Description:
The NELAC Institute (TNI) was created on November 6, 2006 when a giant step towards achieving a long-term goal of the environmental laboratory and monitoring communities to have a national accreditation program was realized. After years of an evolving program under the auspices of the National Environmental Laboratory Accreditation Conference (NELAC) and the Institute for National Environmental Laboratory Accreditation (INELA), the respective Board of Directors took actions and formed TNI.

TNI is a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. 

MISSION-
TNI's mission is to foster the generation of environmental data of known and documented quality through an open, inclusive, and transparent process that is responsive to the needs of the community.

TNI's true vision is to create a national accreditation program, whereby all entities involved in the generation of environmental measurement data within the United States are accredited to one uniform, rigorous, and robust program that has been implemented consistently nationwide and focuses on the technical competence of the entity pursuing accreditation. TNI believes such a program will improve the quality and reliability of environmental data used by federal and state agencies.

TNI MEMBERSHIP-
Membership in TNI is open to any individual interested in laboratory accreditation in the private, public or academic sectors.

Types of membership available:
-Individual
-Partner
-Sponsor
-Patron
-Consulting Firm
-Corporate Sponsor

COMMITTEE MEMBERSHIP-
Most of the work of TNI is completed with the help of members working on Committees tasked with specific functions.

Name: Climate Action Week Mexico
Description:
Climate Action Week Mexico City | Liderando la transformación sustentable en LATAM 

Somos la plataforma que conecta empresas, gobiernos, emprendedores y sociedad civil para acelerar la acción climática en México y América Latina. En colaboración con Climate Group y Climate Week LATAM, reunimos a los principales actores del cambio para impulsar soluciones innovadoras, compromisos estratégicos y financiamiento sostenible.

 Nuestro objetivo:

Posicionar a México como líder en sustentabilidad y nearshoring verde.
Conectar empresas con oportunidades de inversión climática.
Desarrollar alianzas público-privadas para una transición sostenible.
 Súmate al movimiento y lidera la acción climática. Nos vemos en octubre 2025!

Name: Earth05.org
Description:
Earth05 is a social enterprise dedicated to advancing sustainable solutions for the Water, Energy, and Food Security Nexus in the "Age of AGI" (Artificial General Intelligence). With an ambitious goal to positively impact 500 million lives by 2030, Earth05 strives to enhance human well-being and environmental sustainability through transformative innovation and collaboration.

To achieve this, Earth05 launched the annual Co-Creation Prize in 2024—the world's first global challenge uniting scientists, entrepreneurs, and innovators to address critical challenges like water conservation and microplastics pollution. The prize is guided by a visionary framework for 2050, targeting 0% wastewater, 100% renewable energy, and the elimination of microplastics, while fostering open innovation and collective intelligence to accelerate impactful solutions.

Central to its initiatives is the Return on Lives (ROL) metric, designed by Earth05 to measure the holistic impact of innovations on human well-being and sustainability. Through ROL and purpose-driven partnerships leveraging AI and advanced technologies, Earth05 is unlocking access to vital resources and catalyzing systemic change for a sustainable future.

Name: نادي سفراء الجودة بالمنطقة الشرقية
Description:
رسالتنا:
من منطلق إيمان الهيئة السعودية للمواصفات والمقاييس والجودة بدور الشباب وسعيًا لاستثمار طاقاتهم في بناء المستقبل تم إنشاء نادي سفراء المنطقة الشرقة ويهدف إلى نشر ثقافة الجودة وتعزيز روح التطوع والمساهمة في مبادرات الاستراتيجية الوطنية للجودة التي يقوم المكتب  التنفيذي على تحقيق أهدافها ومبادراتها.

أهدافنا:
المشاركة في الانشطة المقدمة من برنامج سفراء الجودة مثل مجلة سفراء الجودة ، المشاركة في الأيام العالمية للجودة تقديم ورش عمل تصميم إنفوجرافيك أو أوراق علمية أو عرض تقديمي أو مقال.


نادي تابع لهيئة المواصفات والمقاييس والجودة - برنامج سفراء الجودة-

Name: Verantwortung – die Initiative für CSR, Nachhaltigkeit und innovatives Wachstum
Description: „Verantwortung“ ist eine Initiative der F.A.Z.-Gruppe und ein Netzwerk mit diversen Plattformen für rund 16.000 Entscheider aus Wirtschaft, Politik und Gesellschaft. Wir möchten zeigen, dass unternehmerischer Erfolg und Nachhaltigkeit keine Gegensätze sind und machen es zu unserer Mission, verantwortungsbewusstes Unternehmertum ganzheitlich zu fördern. Wir identifizieren wichtige Aufgabenfelder, stellen erfolgreiche Strategien vor und formulieren Leitsätze für die Zukunft. Als Forum für Top-Manager, Politiker und Experten ermöglichen wir inspirierenden Austausch und fördern den Blick auf nachhaltige Chancen. Schließen Sie sich uns an, entdecken Sie Best-Practice Projekte und gestalten Sie eine verantwortungsvolle Zukunft!

Name: Minnesota Biochar Initiative
Description: The Minnesota Biochar Initiative (MNBI) is dedicated to driving innovation and collaboration in biochar applications across the state. By connecting researchers, industry leaders, and policymakers, we work to unlock biochar’s potential in carbon removal, soil health, and sustainable materials.

Name: Long Island Sound Partnership
Description: The Long Island Sound Partnership is a collaboration between the U.S. EPA, the states of Connecticut and New York, interstate commissions, municipalities, academic institutions, environmental groups, industry, and citizens. We are working together to protect and improve the health of the Sound.

Name: H2Wielkopolska
Description: Działania na rzecz budowy nowoczesnej, niskoemisyjnej gospodarki opartej na technologii wodorowej. Organizacja wydarzeń krajowych i międzynarodowych, promocja współpracy sektora nauki, biznesu i administracji w ramach Wielkopolskiej Platformy Wodorowej oraz wspierani inicjatyw edukacyjnych, takich jak Wielkopolska Szkoła Wodorowa. Działania prowadzone w tym obszarze są integralną częścią wdrażania Regionalnej Strategii Innowacji oraz Strategii rozwoju Wielkopolski wodorowej do 2030 roku, z perspektywą do roku 2040, tj. dążenia do zrównoważonej transformacji energetycznej regionu.

Name: qprogcc_oman
Description:
QPRO is one of the leading consultancy and training service provider having head quarters in Muscat, Sultanate of Oman and having operations across all middle east countries including UAE, SAUDI ARABIA, KUWAIT, QATAR, BAHRAIN, JORDAN etc. 
QPRO services has been utilized by more than 250 client in various industries such as Oil & Gas, Construction & Contracting, Service Sector, Hospitality, Health Care Sector, Manufacturing and Trading sector. We have been servicing here for the past 10 years , all over the GCC Region.
Our Major Services include:-
ISO Consultancy & Audits | HACCP Consultancy & Audits | FSSC/BRC/HALAL Consultancy | Health & Safety Consultancy & Audits | ISO Training - All levels | Food Safety Trainings - All Levels | Risk Management/Compliance Assessment | QSR Kitchen Audits | Hygiene & Safety Products

Name: Gezonde en Duurzame Leefomgeving Utrecht Kennisconsortium
Description:
By 2050, the Utrecht region wants to be fully climate neutral and circular. At the same time, the population is growing, but the number of skilled workers is not. 
Out of this great challenge, GeLUK was born. GeLUK stands for "Healthy and Sustainable Living Environment Utrecht Knowledge Consortium". 

It is a partnership between the Data- en Kennishub Gezond Stedelijk Leven, Centre of Expertise Smart Sustainable Cities, KTC Zegveld, TechnoHUB, Kalsbeek College en Vakcentrum Duurzame Energie. In 2023, they joined forces to better connect education, research and business. 

By joining forces and better sharing knowledge, together we want to accelerate the transition to a healthy and sustainable living environment!  

Want to stay informed about project updates, webinars, events, new partners and partner news? Take a look at our website: https://wijzijngeluk.nl/.

Name: Crossover -
Description:
Crossover is a platform to address UN Sustainable Goals and to highlight green projects. We are witnessing one of our biggest crisis of all time – environment and climate, and takes therefore an action through talks/dialogues, advocacy and workshops. 
 We seek to inspire people from different sectors and businesses to work more effectively upon green projects, for a global cooperation – a crossover!

Name: Kenya National Association of Water Resources Users' Associations (KeNAWRUA)
Description: The Kenya National Association of Water Resources Users' Associations (KeNAWRUA) is dedicated to the sustainable and equitable management of Kenya's water resources. It acts as a unifying body that brings together 756 Water Resources Users Associations (WRUAs) working in the 6 basins areas in Kenya and various stakeholders, including local communities, government agencies, and NGOs, to collaboratively address water-related challenges. KeNAWRUA promotes best practices in water conservation, encourages active community participation, and supports policy advocacy to ensure the fair distribution and sustainable use of water resources. Through training, capacity-building initiatives, and conflict resolution efforts, KeNAWRUA plays a vital role in safeguarding the country's water future.

Name: Ehance
Description: De arbeidsvoorwaarde met impact

Name: LALLA
Description:
LALLA (Live and Let Live Alliance) is a purpose-driven organisation dedicated to designing, supporting, and championing sustainability initiatives across sectors and industries. Guided by the ESG principles and build on the SDG frameworks, we operate through four strategic desks—Environment & Climate, Entrepreneurship, Innovation & Technology, and Partnership & Impact—to drive meaningful, measurable change.
Through our diverse projects—those we design in-house, those we support, partner on, or showcase—we are building a powerful alliance of sustainability-minded individuals, organisations, and communities. Our commitment to the Our Mantra, "Live and Let Live" BOLD Agenda ensures that every activity is aligned with impact, accountability, and long-term stewardship of our people and planet.
We recognise the importance of individual action, yet we believe that collective, strategic partnerships exponentially amplify impact. That’s why we actively foster collaborations that accelerate the vision of a thriving, livable planet for all.
Our work spans:
•	Community engagement
•	Public sensitisation
•	Training and capacity-building
•	Project implementation
•	Monitoring, evaluation & impact reporting
Whether you're an individual championing sustainability, an organisation seeking direction for your ESG journey, or simply someone eager to contribute your time and skills—we want to hear from you. Our volunteer program is open to anyone ready to make a difference.
 Reach out: contact@lalla.africa
 Learn more: www.lalla.africa
Follow, like, share, and engage on our social media handles and be a part of our community to stay updated on our activities—and join us in shaping a sustainable future where everyone can truly live and let live.

Name: Hormane Green Clean
Description:
Nettoyage Écologique & Responsable à Djibouti 

Nous offrons un service de nettoyage professionnel pour sofas, canapés, voitures et climatiseurs, en utilisant des produits écologiques et sûrs. Notre mission : un intérieur propre, sain et respectueux de l’environnement.

 Produits non toxiques 
 Élimination des allergènes et bactéries 
 Service efficace et durable 

Un nettoyage éco-responsable pour votre bien-être ! 

 Basés à Djibouti – Contactez-nous !

Name: ISSC
Description:
Integrated Sustainable Solutions Company (ISSC) is an EGAC and IAF-accredited Verification & Validation Body, providing verification services for GHG inventories and product carbon footprints in alignment with the Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) and other international standards.


ISSC is also a leading sustainability service provider, supporting organizations on their journey toward net-zero emissions. The company offers technical support on sustainability reporting frameworks, including GRI and ESG reports, and conducts Environmental Product Declaration (EPD) studies helping clients assess the environmental impact of their products and meet global compliance requirements.

In addition, ISSC offers ISO certifications accredited by EGAC & IAF  in various fields including ISO 9001, 14001, 45001, 50001, 55001, 37301, 22000, 20000-1, and 27001.

ISSC delivers specialized training programs across multiple sectors including oil & gas, manufacturing, energy, and other industrial fields. Our training portfolio covers a wide range of topics such as the oil & gas industry, chemicals, petrochemicals, process safety, energy optimization, green hydrogen, GHG calculating & reporting and more

Name: Coco Sapiens
Description: CoCo Sapiens is a non-profit organization building a community of Conscious Consumers who want to transform our food system through their day-to-day food choices. Our main tool is our quality seal – we select producers and their products based on the highest sustainability and health standards. We evaluate the impact of food production on the environment and health in an empirical and demonstrable way for the final consumer. We want to be a tool for the practice of conscious consumption through our seal, the creation of training content, and the geolocation of consumption centers. Study parameters:  Health impact (e.g. presence of toxins)  Packaging, origin/recycling  Social/ethical impact  CO2 footprint  Animal welfare  Biodiversity  Sustainable practices/circularity  Water footprint

Name: Green Legacy Johor
Description: The Green Legacy Summit 2024, hosted by Green Legacy Johor, is a premier event dedicated to advancing sustainability and addressing key environmental challenges. Set against the backdrop of Johor Bahru’s iconic Persada Johor International Convention Centre, this summit will convene a diverse group of thought leaders, innovators, and practitioners from around the globe.

Name: REEF Refrigerant Emissions Elimination Forum
Description: REEF is a non-profit community of corporate sustainability leaders and industry partners using their collective expertise and buying power to accelerate action on super-polluting refrigerants, with a focus on HVAC applications.

Name: North Saskatchewan Watershed Alliance
Description:
The North Saskatchewan Watershed Alliance (NSWA) is a not-for-profit society and one of 11 Watershed Planning and Advisory Councils (WPACs) in Alberta. We join forces with experts, industry and stewards, sharing tools, knowledge and facilitating initiatives for community resilience across the watershed.

In the spirit of respect and reciprocity, we acknowledge that the lands within the North Saskatchewan River watershed are located in Treaty 6, Treaty 8, and the Métis Homeland. These lands are the traditional territories and gathering places of diverse First Nations, Métis, and Inuit peoples. We recognize the contributions of Indigenous peoples who have cared for this land since time immemorial and whose rich histories, cultures, languages, and presence continue to enrich these sacred lands we all steward as Treaty People.

Name: Football for Forests
Description:
Football for Forests (F4F) is a non-profit initiative on a mission to restore tropical forests through the power of football.

- Forest destruction is often depicted in football pitches. We are flipping this narrative: the football pitch becomes a symbol of forest restoration.

- We are targeting the biggest crowd in the world with our digital app - 3.5 billion football fans across the globe.

- We aim to restore 10,000 football pitches of forest, equivalent to ca. 7,000 hectares and nearly 12 million trees over the next five years.

- We deliver high-quality, long-term, community-led restoration programmes in the Amazon. Not just planting trees, but growing forests and restoring habitats.

- We track our impact through robust and transparent community-based monitoring and reporting system, enabled through our digital app.

Nos engagements depuis plus de 30 ans :
- Faire découvrir la vie de la ferme et de la campagne à travers un tourisme équitable et solidaire
- Défendre untype d'accueil qui privilégie la richesse et la qualité des relations humaines
- Permettre aux paysans de vivre décemment sur leur terre

Name: FU-TOURISM
Description:
FU-TOURISM: Future-Ready Business support ecosystem for Tourism SME Transition to green and digital resilience. 

FU-TOURISM is an innovative European project co-financed by the Single Market Programme (former COSME) with a budget of 4 million euros. Our goal is to empower SMEs in the tourism sector, facilitating their transition towards ecological and digital resilience to thrive in the new era.

Through a collaborative network spanning six European countries, FU-TOURISM offers funding of up to 30,000 euros and specialized expertise to 102 SME projects committed to transforming their tourism practices.

 The FU-TOURISM consortium comprises partners from seven European countries: EUPOLIS (Croatia), FINNOVA (Belgium, Spain), ENVOLVE (Greece), SYNYO (Austria), VESTB (Poland), and OPEN IMPACT (Italy). Additionally, two pilot projects will be implemented at the Destination Management Organization (DMO) level in two prominent tourist destinations: Valencia (Spain) and Porec-Parenzo (Croatia).

 Duration: 36 months | 09/2023 - 09/2026

APC supports farmers with sustainable whole-farm planning, which can include the incorporation of carbon farming projects under the Human-Induced-Regeneration Method (HIR) and the Beef Cattle Herd Management Method under the national Emissions Reduction Fund (ERF).

The parametric program aligns with the, internationally recognized, GHG Protocol from WBCSD, ISO 14034 (Environmental Technology Verification), ISO 59014 (circularity), UNFCCC (CDMs), Green EU taxonomy, Paris agreement Article 6 and other methodology framework and initiatives.

Veracity provides the trust needed by market players to accelerate the deployment of green solutions to avoid and eliminate carbon emissions at Gigaton scale.

Name: Riverwatch Institute of Alberta
Description:
Founded in 1995, the RiverWatch Institute of Alberta is a registered Canadian charity and the province's largest non-profit environmental/educational river rafting group.

Three Areas of Positive Impact:

1.	School-A-Float Science Floats – Riverwatch's award-winning education programs provide a valuable resource for secondary science classes in Alberta. Our programs offer immersive guided rafting trips and hands-on water quality data collection using portable labs. Targeted at upper-grade levels (grades 8 through 12), RiverWatch aligns directly with the Alberta education curriculum, covering various courses and units, including freshwater studies, biosphere dynamics, environmental chemistry, and watershed ecosystems. Annually, this program reaches approximately 10,000+ students.

2.	CreekWatch – Since 2014, our CreekWatch Citizen Science program has provided training and portable labs to empower watershed groups and communities to monitor the water quality of their local stormwater creeks. CreekWatch volunteers collect data on parameters like dissolved oxygen, phosphates, nitrates, chloride, pH, temperature, and turbidity. Our mission is to unite communities through science exploration, fostering sustainable behaviours to safeguard freshwater resources. Data comparisons are published annually on World Water Day, revealing stormwater impacts on creeks. 

3.	EcoFloats - In the summer of 2023, RiverWatch launched the Guided Urban River Rafting “EcoFloats” program in Calgary and Edmonton. The program's debut in the tourism sector in both cities was a success, with most float dates quickly selling out. RiverWatch hosted about 4,000 guests during the 60-day float season, offering unique 3-4 hour immersive nature rafting experiences that delivered fresh insights and a newfound appreciation for river health, historical importance, and biodiversity. The EcoFloats program aims to foster a stronger connection to nature and heightened awareness of environmental stewardship.

Name: Collarosta Technologies and Crafts
Description:
Collarosta Technologies and Crafts is a clean energy and circular economy enterprise based in Kenya, committed to transforming agricultural and organic waste into high-impact, sustainable products. Our core innovation is the production of eco-friendly briquettes that offer a clean, affordable alternative to charcoal and wood fuel for households, schools, and small businesses.

Driven by a mission to combat deforestation, reduce indoor air pollution, and tackle climate change, we operate at the nexus of clean energy, environmental sustainability, and community empowerment. Our solutions not only reduce reliance on unsustainable fuels but also create green jobs and improve livelihoods, particularly for women and youth in underserved areas.

In addition to briquettes, we are expanding into the production of biochar and activated carbon, unlocking new value streams in agriculture, water purification, and soil regeneration. These products support climate-smart farming practices and help restore soil health while contributing to our broader goal of environmental regeneration.

We are also actively pursuing carbon credit certification to quantify and monetize our climate impact. Through verified emission reductions from avoided deforestation and carbon sequestration via biochar, we aim to participate in global carbon markets—making clean energy not just sustainable, but also economically viable for communities and investors alike.

As we grow, Collarosta is leveraging digital tools for traceability, data collection, and distribution efficiency. We envision a future where every household in East Africa has access to clean, sustainable energy—and every kilogram of waste has the potential to power lives, regenerate ecosystems, and generate income.

Collarosta Technologies and Crafts — Turning Waste into Power. Restoring the Planet. Empowering Communities.

Name: HUAXING ENVIRONNEMENT DU GABON
Description:
Huaxing Environnement du Gabon est une entreprise chinoise spécialisée dans la production de charbon actif physique (sans procédé chimique) à partir des rebuts de bois. Elle est installée dans la Zone économique à régime privilégié (ZERP) de Nkok. Ce produit fini est utilisé pour la purification de l'eau, de l'air, par les sociétés pharmaceutiques, ... 

Cette usine permet de contribuer fortement à l’atténuation des effets du changement climatique et de réduire fortement aux émissions de gaz a effet de serre. 

Elle est également présente dans deux autres provinces du Gabon et compte s'installer dans chaque province du Gabon afin de collecter tous les rebuts ou chutes de bois de ce magnifique pays. 

La société sensibilise en étroit collaboration avec le ministère des Eaux et Forêts gabonais, les investisseurs dans le domaine du bois sur l’effet des incinérations des déchets de bois dans la nature.

Les deux nouveaux sites de Lalara et de Lastourville sont le fruit d'un accompagnement stratégique et sensibilisant des investisseurs avec des missions organisées par le ministère des Eaux et Forêts du Gabon.

Name: ClimatHub
Description:
Le Benin Youth Climate Lab est une initiative nationale qui vise à outiller les jeunes du Bénin pour devenir des créateurs de solutions climatiques durables, des acteurs de changement et des leaders informés sur les politiques, lois et mécanismes liés au climat.
Porté par une dynamique jeunesse engagée, le programme ambitionne de renforcer les capacités techniques, analytiques et stratégiques des jeunes sur des thématiques clés telles que :
•	L’adaptation et l’atténuation des changements climatiques
•	L’inclusion numérique et l’innovation verte
•	Les Contributions Déterminées au niveau National (CDN)
•	Les négociations internationales sur le climat
•	Le financement climatique et les pertes et dommages
À travers des ateliers, bootcamps, et laboratoires d’idées, le Benin Youth Climate Lab 2025 aboutira à la production d’un Engagement national de la jeunesse pour l’innovation climatique, couvrant les 8 secteurs prioritaires au Bénin, à savoir :
Agriculture
 Ressources en eau
 Santé
Zones côtières / Littoral
 Foresterie
 Énergie
 Infrastructures et aménagement urbain
Tourisme
Ce programme annuel constitue un espace unique d’apprentissage, de collaboration et de co-création entre jeunes leaders, experts, institutions publiques et partenaires internationaux.

Name: GROVE KE
Description:
GROVE - Green Remediation of Viable Ecosystems is an environmental initiative dedicated to addressing the growing challenge of ecosystem damage, which is a global issue. We are particularly concerned with the impact of heavy metal pollution in soil, water, and air ecosystems that threatens both environmental and human health.
We major on environmental education and community mobilization to combat pollution. Through scout-led initiatives, community workshops, and strategic partnerships, we work to increase awareness about environmental contamination and empower local action.
GROVE was founded by passionate University of Nairobi students, advocates of enviromental justice, with roots in scouting, GROVE bridges scientific knowledge with grassroots action. We believe lasting environmental change starts with informed communities taking ownership of their ecological health.

Description:
Národní síť záchranných stanic je jedinečným  a komplexním systémem péče o volně žijící živočichy v České republice.
Síť vznikla v roce 1998 jako program Českého svazu ochránců přírody.

Po celé České republice najdete 34 záchranných stanic, které se ročně postarají o více než 30 000 zvířat. Vzdělávacími aktivitami stanic projde za rok 300 000 lidí. Kromě stanic máme také Pražskou zvířecí záchranku, která pomáhá s odchytem a odvozem zraněných zvířat.

Name: in Climate Foundation
Description:
In Climate Foundation was established by a group of experts who have been working for many years in the field of green technologies, energy transition and building a sustainable economy.  
The mission of the Foundation is to raise public awareness, prevent climate change, work for ecology and sustainable development, as well as to promote and disseminate environmentally neutral solutions that improve the quality of life of the inhabitants. An important task of the Foundation is to reach out to the widest possible audience in order to increase ecological knowledge and introduce new technologies that minimize carbon footprint and pollution. We collaborate, educate, train, popularize knowledge about climate and biodiversity, promote pro-environmental attitudes and support initiatives to reduce and offset greenhouse gas emissions. For the sake of our planet!
The Foundation aims to achieve its goals by using modern communication tools and platforms to deliver messages to target audiences in a highly personalized, attractive and interesting way.

 One form of the message is to combine a theatrical performance with environmental education workshops aimed at younger school children. The audience will be placed in the center of attention and will be involved in a multi-spectral show in which they will be able to physically participate and become actors and even directors. The message will be conveyed through a play based methodically on t.

Name: Current Problems, Inc.
Description:
Current Problems. Inc is a 501(c)(3) environmental nonprofit that focuses on leading freshwater debris removal projects based in Gainesville, Florida. We are a women-led, grassroots organization that specializes in coordinating watershed restoration efforts across Florida through education, advocacy and waterway cleanups.

We facilitate cleanups in our rivers, creeks, lakes, ponds, springs, floodplains and even sinkholes with the goal of preventing trash and debris from reaching our downstream neighbors, affecting wildlife, and polluting our drinking water supply. 

Current Problems, Inc was founded in 1993 by a group of friends and artists who regularly paddled the Santa Fe River and decided to make conservation at the forefront of their recreation. 30 years later, we have helped over 22,000 volunteers connect with their local waterways with hands-on conservation resulting in the removal of over 1 MILLION POUNDS of trash and debris. Sign up today to become a sustaining water warrior for your local watershed!

Name: ESG Huset
Description:
ESG Huset (House of ESG), er en dansk rådgivergruppe som appellerer specifikt til SMV'er og arbejder med følgende strategier og tjenester:

Branchespecifikke ESG-Strategier: Udvikler skræddersyede ESG-løsninger for specifikke brancher inden for SMV-segmentet, som adresserer unikke brancherelaterede udfordringer og muligheder.

Lokal ESG-Integration: Tilbyd ESG-rådgivning, der fokuserer på lokale og regionale regler, kulturer og forretningsmiljøer, hvilket sikrer mere relevante og effektive løsninger.

Udvikling af Digitale Værktøjer
		
Brugervenlige ESG-Platforme: Skab intuitive digitale platforme, der forenkler ESG-rapportering og måling for SMV'er, med skræddersyede dashboards og analytiske værktøjer.
		
ESG-Dataanalyse og Benchmarking: Tilbyd avancerede dataanalyseværktøjer, der hjælper SMV'er med at forstå deres ESG-performance i forhold til branchestandarder og konkurrenter.

Personaliserede Tjenester
		
Personlig ESG-Rådgivning: Tilbyder dybdegående, personaliserede rådgivningstjenester, der tager højde for den enkelte virksomheds specifikke behov og ambitioner.
		
Interaktiv Uddannelse og Workshops: Organisere workshops og træningssessioner, der er skræddersyet til SMV'ers behov, og som hjælper dem med praktisk implementering af ESG-strategier.

Regional og Lokal Tilgang
		
Samarbejde med Lokale Organisationer: Etabler partnerskaber med lokale handelskamre, industriorganisationer og NGO'er for at tilbyde mere relevante og samfundsintegrede løsninger.

Støtte til Lokal Bæredygtighed: Tilbyd rådgivning og løsninger, der hjælper SMV'er med at bidrage til bæredygtighed i deres lokalsamfund.

Ved at kombinere disse tjenester og tilgange tilbyder ESG Huset en dybdegående, skræddersyet og holistisk ESG-service, der er særligt tilpasset SMV'ers behov og udfordringer.

Name: QHSE Excellence Consulting
Description:
Consultant Indépendant QHSE | Expert en Sécurité et Environnement

Bienvenue sur mon profil !  Je suis Cheikh, un consultant indépendant passionné par l'excellence opérationnelle et la durabilité dans le domaine QHSE.

 À PROPOS DE MOI
Avec une expertise approfondie dans les domaines de la Qualité, de l'Hygiène, de la Sécurité et de l'Environnement, je suis déterminé à aider les entreprises à atteindre et à maintenir les normes les plus élevées en matière de gestion des risques et de conformité réglementaire.

 DOMAINES D'EXPERTISE

Gestion de la Qualité : Mise en place de systèmes de gestion qualité, normes ISO, amélioration continue.
Sécurité au Travail : Élaboration de programmes de sécurité, formations, audits de sécurité.
Gestion Environnementale : Développement de politiques environnementales, réduction de l'empreinte carbone.
Hygiène Industrielle : Surveillance des agents chimiques, évaluation des risques sanitaires.
 MISSION
Mon objectif est d'accompagner les entreprises dans leur démarche d'amélioration continue, en identifiant les opportunités d'optimisation et en renforçant leur culture QHSE. Je propose des solutions sur mesure, adaptées aux besoins spécifiques de chaque organisation.

 COLLABORATION
Que vous cherchiez à mettre en place un système de gestion QHSE, à renforcer la sécurité au travail ou à intégrer des pratiques durables, je suis là pour vous accompagner tout au long du processus. La collaboration est la clé, et je suis prêt à travailler avec vous pour atteindre vos objectifs.

 RÉSULTATS
Au fil de ma carrière, j'ai aidé des entreprises à réduire les accidents du travail, à obtenir des certifications QHSE, et à améliorer leur performance globale. Mes clients bénéficient de solutions pragmatiques et innovantes qui ont un impact positif sur leur activité.

 CONTACT
N'hésitez pas à me contacter pour discuter de la manière dont nous pouvons travailler ensemble pour renforcer votre engagement envers la QHSE.

Name: wiedzieLIŚCIE?
Description:
Jakie są nasze cele? Do czego dążymy? – Odpowiedź jest prosta – chcemy pokazać,  że każdy może działać – niezależnie od posiadanych środków, wieku, czy sprawności. Dopóki jesteście, możecie wnieść coś od siebie, dodać cegiełkę do fortecy, którą budujemy. Wierzymy, że jeśli nie ma możliwości, to trzeba je stworzyć. Zatem tworzymy.

Chcemy inspirować, intrygować i ciekawić – bo właśnie tego potrzeba światu.
Nie jesteśmy kolejną grupą, która wciąż powtarza jak bardzo jest źle, ile nam czasu zostało do wyginięcia i tempa globalnego ocieplenia. Nie operujemy informacjami, które każdy zdążył już usłyszeć wiele, ale to wiele razy.
A co jak podsuniemy zarysy pomysłów, niektóre pytania pozostawimy otwarte, pobudzimy odbiorców do myślenia. Burza mózgów, analiza, tego nam potrzeba. Przecież dzięki obserwacjom zauważamy pewne zależności. Jesteśmy w XXI wieku, a podejście nie zmieniło się od lat.
Problemem nie jest to, że ludzie nie wiedzą o zagrożeniu, jakie na nas czyha-
Jeżeli coś wydaje się za trudne, poza naszym zasięgiem, to wiele osób zaniży poprzeczkę. Ale dlaczego?
Nasz cel, to pokazanie co i jak, ale nie podsuwając gotowych rozwiązań, tylko dbając o zapewnienie odpowiednich warunków do podjęcia wyzwań intelektualnych.

Description:
LFM is an organization designed to address the pressing issue of improper litter disposal, promote sanitation and cultivate a culture of responsible waste management within primary schools and communities across Malawi.

Our mission is to empower the youth of Malawi with the knowledge, skills and commitment to foster a cleaner, healthier and more sustainable environment through responsible waste management and proper litter disposal practices.

Our vision is to achieve a Malawi where every child and community takes pride in maintaining litter free surroundings, preserving the natural beauty of our nation and safeguarding the health of our people and ecosystems.
