Name: Wisconsin EcoLatinos
Description:
We are working to raise equity and increase participation in environmental quality and conservation efforts by empowering the Latino community and minorities to take action against environmental hazards affecting our community and reduce our carbon footprint. We pursue an equitable and sustainable environment by eliminating language and social barriers while advocating for the inclusion of our community in the transition to the clean energy economy and climate change adaptation.



Trabajamos para aumentar la equidad y participación en la calidad y conservación ambiental empoderando a la comunidad latina y minorías para que tomen medidas contra los peligros ambientales que nos afectan y reducir nuestra huella de carbono. Promovemos un medio ambiente equitativo y sostenible eliminando barreras sociales y de idioma, mientras abogamos por la inclusión de nuestra comunidad en la transición hacia la economía de energía limpia y la adaptación al cambio climático.

Name: Sogepi Servibois
Description:
Sogepi-Servibois, leader national dans la construction de pigeonnier et de mobilier urbain en bois depuis plus de 40 ans, vous propose des solutions qui se fondent parfaitement dans l'environnement.

Avec Sogepi, bénéficiez d'une étude gratuite réalisée par des professionnels de la dépigeonnisation sur le terrain : comptage du nombre de pigeons, nichage, nourrissage, etc. Il est important de préciser que nous ne tuons pas les pigeons, seules leurs fientes sont récoltées pour être placés dans des composteurs afin d'obtenir un engrais naturel de très haut niveau. Nous sommes agréés par la préfécture pour le transport des animaux vivants et sommes titulaires de diplômes DAPA.

- Construction de pigeonniers (Maisons des pigeons & Chalets des pigeons, marques déposées) et de mobilier urbain.
- Vente ou location de pigeonniers avec contrat de gestion et d'entretien.

Étude gratuite de dépigeonnisation réalisée par une équipe de professionnels.

Nos pigeonniers sont équipées pour gérer et réguler les naissances des pigeons des villes et des campagnes. Nous vous proposons une gamme complète de produits parmi plus de 500 références en France et en Europe.
18 modèles principaux : carrés, rectangulaires, hexagonaux et octogonaux sur 1 ou 4 pieds. 
Nos pigeonniers sont également classés investissement durable et peuvent être installés sur les terrasses des immeubles jusqu'à 6 étages.

Sur simple demande, nos pigeonniers peuvent être fournis avec un composteur grand volume (2,5 à 5 m³) qui permet d'exploiter les fientes récupérées dans l'habitacle.

Name: GOLL-GREEN OLYMPIC LIVING LAB
Description:
O Programa Piloto – Desporto para as Pessoas e o Planeta – representa uma nova abordagem à sustentabilidade através do desporto na Europa
Sport for People and Planet – a new approach on sustainability. through sport in Europe (PPPA-SPORT-2022-PEOPLE-PLANET)

Esta ação utilizará o poder do desporto para sensibilizar os cidadãos europeus para a importância da sustentabilidade e ajudá-los a compreender como podem contribuir para a coesão social e a proteção ambiental. Os objetivos do Programa proposto são sensibilizar, inspirar comportamentos e liderar o pensamento da sociedade europeia sobre como o desporto pode permitir e acelerar a transformação social e ambiental, bem como envolver os cidadãos da UE para participarem ativamente em medidas sustentáveis, utilizando o poder comunicativo. do desporto, seus principais eventos e principais embaixadores.

Cada projeto piloto é uma iniciativa de carácter experimental destinada a testar a viabilidade de uma ação e sua utilidade. A duração dos projetos está limitada a dois períodos consecutivos. Uma ação preparatória, é normalmente a sucessora de um projecto-piloto bem-sucedido na mesma matéria, destinando-se a preparar propostas com vista à adoção de ações futuras (como políticas, legislação, programas da UE e similares). Poderá receber financiamento até ao limite de três anos sucessivos. Para financiar ações desportivas que não sejam financiadas através do Capítulo Desporto Erasmus+.

Assim, o projeto GOLL representa uma visão progressista, onde a atividade desportiva e o ambiente, estão interligados através de um contexto sistémico e de um modelo pedagógico, com tecnologias mais modernas e sistemas de proteção ambiental e prática desportiva, com impacto e dimensão europeia.

GOLL - GREEN OLYMPIC LIVING LAB SPORT & ENVIRONMENT CHANGE designa o projeto candidato em 2023 pelo Municipio de Coimbra (MC) obtendo financiamento pela Uniao Europeia em 2024, através da Agência Europeia de Execução para a Educação e a Cultura (EACEA

Name: LizardShield.org
Description:
LizardShield is a community-powered conservation initiative dedicated to preserving Ibiza’s native Ibiza Wall Lizard (Podarcis pityusensis), a unique species with over two million years of evolution. The rapid spread of invasive snakes has decimated lizard populations—reducing numbers by ~75%, with lizards nearly extinct in most of the island—and disrupted local ecosystems.

Program Highlights & Impact

Grassroots-driven: Operates through partnerships with local businesses, venues, and volunteers

Field-proven results: Over 18years, 3,250+ snakes trapped using 650+ deployed traps, protecting 112 properties.

Aggressive scale-up goals: Aims to deploy 40,000 traps across Ibiza by 2027—targeting removal of 200,000 snakes per season to prevent ecosystem collapse .

LizardShield empowers Ibiza’s residents, businesses, and impact-minded allies to save endangered lizards, restore ecological balance, and strengthen long-term resilience. By scaling grassroots capacity with data-driven operations, LizardShield offers a replicable model for island-wide conservation.

Name: Net Zero Asia
Description:
The Net Zero Asia programme stands as a beacon of sustainability in the Asian corporate landscape, empowering companies to embark on their journey towards net zero emissions with confidence and clarity. By leveraging scientific methodologies and internationally recognized certifications such as the Greenhouse Gas (GHG) Protocol and the ISO 14064 global standards, this initiative ensures a robust framework for companies to measure, manage, and mitigate their carbon footprint.

At its core, the programme offers comprehensive consulting services tailored to the unique needs of Asian companies, guiding them through every step of their net zero journey. From conducting initial carbon assessments to developing bespoke roadmaps for emission reduction strategies, the programme equips businesses with the tools and expertise needed to navigate the complexities of sustainability transitions effectively.

Through the Net Zero Asia programme, companies gain access to a wealth of knowledge and resources, enabling them to make informed decisions that align with their sustainability goals and aspirations. By fostering collaboration and knowledge sharing among industry peers, the programme catalyzes collective action towards a low-carbon future, driving meaningful impact at both local and global scales.

Ultimately, the Net Zero Asia programme serves as a catalyst for positive change, empowering Asian companies to embrace sustainability as a strategic imperative and pave the way for a more resilient and equitable future for generations to come.

Name: cleanWaterTech
Description:
CleanWaterTech est une solution technologique innovante qui aide les populations à sécuriser l’eau qu’elles consomment. Grâce à une application mobile connectée à des capteurs IoT, notre système permet de diagnostiquer en temps réel la qualité de l’eau (pH, turbidité, contaminants…) et de recommander automatiquement la méthode de purification la plus adaptée (filtration, UV, bouillage, etc.).

	Notre objectif est de démocratiser l’accès à une eau potable sûre, en rendant le diagnostic et le traitement intelligents, accessibles et adaptés aux réalités locales.

Name: Proyecto Marea
Description:
PROYECTO MAREA es un proyecto con un alto impacto socio-ambiental sin ánimo de lucro, donde a través de actividades trabajamos por crear conciencia sobre el reciclaje versus el impacto del plástico en en el mar.

Basamos nuestra misión y meta principal en 5 de los Objetivos de Desarrollo Sostenible: Cambiar el comportamiento humano mediante la creación de una ética ambiental para el cuidado y la sostenibilidad de los ecosistemas marinos y zonas costeras, a su vez contribuyendo en minimizar el impacto ambiental a través de la recolección, separación y organización de todos los materiales que se pueden reciclar, con el fin de reducir la cantidad de basura que se encuentra hoy en día en las zonas costeras para la atracción turística.

Trabajamos con cinco ejes/actividades que se complementan entre sí, dependiendo las unas de las otras como un ciclo, estas son: 
1. Buceo con propósito
2. Ecoturismo y educación
3. Limpieza submarina
4. Centro de reciclaje
5. Productos/Tienda

La protección del medio ambiente es una tarea de todos. Únete a Proyecto Marea RECICLA y conviértete en un agente de cambio para un futuro más verde.

Name: CAFI Cameroun
Description:
Notre mission et notre impact
CAFI-Cameroon vise à contribuer à la mise en œuvre de la SND30 et des ODD30 en abordant les défis du changement climatique, de la déforestation et de la dégradation des terres. L'initiative met l'accent sur la préservation des forêts, la promotion de pratiques agricoles durables, le renforcement de la gouvernance, le partage de connaissances et la mobilisation de financements pour soutenir ces efforts.
Concrètement, CAFI agit comme catalyseur de transformation au Cameroun en mobilisant des ressources techniques et financières pour soutenir les efforts du pays dans la réduction des émissions de gaz à effet de serre issues de la déforestation et de la dégradation des forêts. Un exemple concret de cette action est notre appui au MINEPDED pour l'élaboration et la mise en œuvre du Plan National Climat (PNC) et de la Contribution Déterminée au niveau National (CDN), documents stratégiques qui guident l'action climatique du pays vers un développement durable et résilient.
Notre approche
Notre intervention s'articule autour de trois piliers stratégiques :
1.	Renforcement des cadres politiques et institutionnels - Nous soutenons le gouvernement camerounais dans l'élaboration de politiques climatiques ambitieuses et réalistes, alignées sur les objectifs de l'Accord de Paris et de la Stratégie Nationale de Développement 2030 (SND30).
2.	Mobilisation des financements climatiques - Nous facilitons l'accès à des ressources financières diversifiées pour la mise en œuvre des actions d'atténuation et d'adaptation, en combinant fonds publics, privés et innovants.
3.	Développement des capacités techniques - Nous investissons dans le renforcement des compétences des acteurs nationaux et locaux pour assurer une appropriation durable des initiatives climatiques.

Name: Green Syria Foundation for Sustainable Development and Environment Conservation
Description:
Our vision is a society where people enjoy a decent and dignifies, healthy and stable life, today, tomorrow and in the future, addressing the most urgent security need, “food security” and equal access to life resources where we seek to sustainable development and conserve the environment, and preserve our ecosystems, valuable variable culture and our sociality focusing always on human values and social justice. Our confidence in the capabilities and awareness of our Syrian human capital constitutes a major motive to overcome current challenges.
What distinguishes our institution's vision is that the ultimate goal is holistic sustainable development social, economic and conservation of the environment and natural resources all over the Syrian territories marine and terrestrial, and in cooperation all Syrians residing in Syria and expats alike, as there are no personal, regional or narrow factional interests. Our policy aims serve and benefit all, while being mindful of the rule of Syria regionally and internationally.

Our Mission:
Green Syria Foundation for Sustainable Development and Environmental conservation aims to build environmental stewardship promote the concept of sustainability, contribute to sustainable agricultural development, conservation of soil, raw land and biodiversity, preserve cultural and social diversity, and achieve socioeconomical justice. We are committed to working towards comprehensive development that achieves a balance between people and the environment.
In our adoption of the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), we recognise the role of the World Bank as the gatekeeper through a broad mandate, staff, budget and expertise in data collection, and we understand its role for data collection, aggregation and reporting.
We are pleased to invite you to join our foundation and participate in its work and activities. One hand cannot clap or build a country, but together we make a difference.

Through a science and technology-based approach, Bestari Inovasi Indonesia (BII) Foundation strives to create effective and sustainable solutions in facing environmental challenges and climate change.

Bestari Inovasi Indonesia (BII) Foundation merupakan institusi nirlaba yang mendukung kelestarian lingkungan yang berwawasan IPTEK, guna untuk memperluas akses kontribusi Indonesia ke dunia internasional lewat praktik riset dan pengembangan, edukasi dan kesadaran, penerapan teknologi lingkungan, advokasi kebijakan lingkungan, dan kolaborasi dan kemitraan. 

Melalui pendekatan yang berbasis ilmu pengetahuan dan teknologi, Bestari Inovasi Indonesia (BII) Foundation berusaha untuk menciptakan solusi yang efektif dan berkelanjutan dalam menghadapi tantangan lingkungan dan perubahan iklim.

Name: Carbon Clean Up
Description:
Carbon Clean proudly collaborate with certified carbon offset projects to help you remove your annual vehicle carbon emissions and fight climate change. Our projects, all based in Britain, are carefully selected for their ability to reduce the risk of the effects of climate change (flooding, drought and wildfire) while combating climate change by reducing the carbon in the air. 

At our core, we believe that offsetting carbon emissions is just one piece of the puzzle in the battle against climate change. That's why we go one step further by using our profits to invest in green infrastructure throughout the UK. We're proud to make a positive impact by helping businesses halve their energy costs through the use of solar power, and for every 100,000 products we sell, we're building 100 electric charging stations in the UK.  

By partnering with us, you can support these impactful projects and be a part of the solution to climate change. Join us on our mission to create a cleaner and more sustainable future for Britain.

Le Syndicat Mixte du Bassin Versant du Viaur devient l’EPAGE du bassin du Viaur : Pour plus d’informations cliquez ici

Name: Ecocivilisation in Bosnia and Herzegovina
Description:
Ecocivilisation represents a forward-looking societal model that places ecological sustainability and environmental harmony at the foundation of human development. It is based on the recognition that the well-being of humanity and the health of the planet are intrinsically interconnected.

In Bosnia and Herzegovina, our initiative is established as a purpose-driven cluster that promotes collaborative, knowledge-based approaches to sustainable development. By fostering inclusion, empathy, and diversity, we create conditions for cooperation across sectors and disciplines, enabling solutions that address complex societal and environmental challenges.

Our mission is to advance the transition towards an integrated, sustainable civilisation by aligning human activity with the principles of nature and by cultivating frameworks that strengthen ecological balance, social cohesion, and economic resilience. Through partnerships, research, and participatory dialogue, we aim to contribute to both national progress and global sustainability goals.

Ecocivilisation is not only a vision but a practical framework for action. It provides pathways for innovation, collaboration, and systemic change, positioning Bosnia and Herzegovina as an active contributor to building a resilient and sustainable future for all.
Location: Novo Sarajevo, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina

Name: HHWET - Hekeao/Hinds Water Enhancement Trust
Description:
The Hekeao/Hinds Water Enhancement Trust (HHWET) is a non-profit community led group bringing together agencies to enhance Hekeao/Hinds water systems for the environmental, recreational, cultural, domestic and agricultural benefit of the community.

HHWET Water Enhancement Projects include the Managed Aquifer Recharge project (MAR) which is New Zealand’s largest managed groundwater rehabilitation project, delivering ecosystem health and enhanced environmental, cultural and recreational values.

HHWET’s goals are to:

Target and protect drinking water supplies
Enhance groundwater quality
Improve baseflows to spring-fed streams and rivers for ecological, cultural and social values
Improve and sustainably manage groundwater storage (levels)
In order to achieve these goals, HHWET are involved in trialling and implementing several complementary tools to help address water quality and quantity issues. These include Managed Aquifer Recharge (MAR), Near River Recharge (NRR), Targeted Stream Augmentation (TSA), irrigation nutrient recycling, constructed wetlands, and bioreactors.

Name: Špirála
Description:
Špirála je celoštátna sieť organizácií venujúcich sa environmentálnej výchove a vzdelávaniu. Špirála je mimovládna, nezisková organizácia založená ako záujmové združenie právnických osôb. Vznikla v júni 2001.

Od roku 2004 je Špirála asociovaným a od roku 2010 riadnym členom Nadácie pre environmentálne vzdelávanie (FEE). Od roku 2004 Špirála úspešne realizuje program Eco-Schools so slovenským názvom Zelená škola.

Od roku 2009 je spustený program Young Reporters for the Environment, Mladí reportéri pre životné prostredie.

V rokoch 2013 – 2014 realizovala Špirála projekt “Koncepcia environmentálnej výchovy a vzdelávania v Slovenskej republike – kroky vpred“.

Poslanie a ciele Špirály
Špirála – sieť environmentálne-výchovných organizácií v svojej činnosti
zastupuje a presadzuje záujmy svojich členov vo vzťahu k orgánom štátnej správy, k partnerským organizáciám, nadáciám, sponzorom a darcom
podporuje vzájomnú výmenu skúseností svojich členov v oblasti environmentálnej výchovy
zabezpečuje šírenie aktuálnych informácii medzi svojimi členmi ako aj poskytovanie informácií širokej verejnosti
dbá na kvalitu vzdelávacích programov svojich členov a napomáha skvalitňovaniu ich činnosti.
implementuje vzdelávacie programy FEE na Slovensku a garantuje ich medzinárodný štandard
K naplneniu vyššie uvedených cieľov Špirála najmä:
zabezpečuje poradenskú a konzultačnú činnosť v oblasti environmentálnej výchovy, vzdelávania a osvety a v oblasti manažmentu mimovládnych neziskových organizácií,
usporiadava vzdelávacie podujatia, semináre a exkurzie,
zabezpečuje propagačné akcie, propagáciu členov, zverejňuje informácie prostredníctvom neperiodických aj periodických publikácií,
spracováva a realizuje projekty na podporu environmentálnej výchovy, vzdelávania a osvety,aktívne sa podieľa na príprave príslušných legislatívnych noriem, súvisiacich s predmetom činnosti združenia.

Name: EarthBank
Description:
Earth Bank 

- Våra värderingar

"På Earth Bank drivs vi av starka värderingar som genomsyrar allt vårt arbete. Dessa principer är inte bara ord för oss – de är grunden för varje beslut vi tar och varje initiativ vi driver."

Vi tror på att konkreta handlingar för miljön måste tas idag, inte imorgon. Genom vårt arbete med utsläppsrätter bidrar vi aktivt till att minska koldioxidutsläppen och bekämpa klimatförändringarna. Vi ser miljöansvar som en nödvändighet, inte ett val.

Utbildning för förändring

Vi är övertygade om att kunskap är nyckeln till en bättre framtid. Genom att stödja skolklasser ger vi unga människor verktyg att förstå miljöutmaningar och inspirerar dem att bli morgondagens problemlösare och miljökämpar.

Transparens

Vi värdesätter öppenhet i allt vi gör. Varje krona som doneras kan spåras - från insamling till slutdestination, vare sig det handlar om stöd till utbildning eller köp av utsläppsrätter. Vi tror på ärlighet och tydlighet i alla våra relationer.

Samarbete

Ingen kan lösa klimatkrisen ensam. Vi tror på kraften i samarbete - mellan individer, organisationer, skolor och företag. Tillsammans kan vi åstadkomma mer än vad vi någonsin kunde göra på egen hand.

Currently, we are pursuing our studies, both overseas and locally.

Name: The Kukang Rescue Program
Description: We are zoologists and conservationists fighting the illegal trade in wild animals and especially striving to protect the greater slow loris (Nycticebus coucang) and Sumatran slow loris (Nycticebus hilleri) - the only poisonous primates in the world that fall victim to their cuteness. We have been running a non-profit organization on the island of Sumatra in Indonesia since 2014, within which we have built a rescue and rehabilitation centre for confiscated slow lorises in order to return them to the wild. We work with local communities on several levels. We educate local children in whom we develop a positive attitude towards nature. We employ former poachers, who are now our field assistants. We are also transforming local farmers into conservationists by supporting the “Kukang Coffee” eco-friendly coffee project. In addition, we help them peacefully resolve conflicts with wild animals. The main purpose of all our efforts is to reduce the rate of illegal trade (not only) in slow lorises, and thus protect the population of (not only) these endangered animals in the wild.

Beberapa anggota KP3 Burung juga berperan serta pada berbagai penelitian untuk menambah keterampilan dalam pengamatan aktivitas burung.

Name: UCL Scuba Club
Description:
The UCL Scuba Club is a diving centre that addresses two pressing gaps in marine conservation; the lack of specialised action in conservation initiatives and the lack of general awareness of the importance of marine conservation. 
As a scuba club, we have noticed the increasing need for specialised volunteers in Marine Conservation projects. Being able to ‘dive’ is becoming increasingly insufficient for anyone who wants to make a real difference in this field. 
That is why we go beyond offering a simple diving certificate. By offering theoretical and physical marine conservation training at a minimised cost, we provide students with the opportunity to participate in global conservation expeditions at a professional level.

Through physical activity, citizen science, and data-informed advocacy, we empower young people to raise civic demand for clean air, inclusive urban spaces, and stronger youth participation in urban health policy decision-making.

Description:
Yayasan Lestari Mulia adalah organisasi sosial yang bergerak dibidang lingkungan dan kesehatan. Mengambil peran sebagai agen perubahan dalam lingkungan sosial masyarakat melalui kegiatan penelitian, pelatihan dan pendampingan dalam rangka mewujudkan masyarakat yang sehat, berdaya, tangguh dan lingkungan yang lestari.

Menjadi pelopor mewujudkan masyarakat yang tangguh, berdaya, sehat menuju lingkungan yang lestari.

Name: Aethify
Description:
Aethify is a clean environment technology company focused on improving Indoor Environmental Quality (IEQ) across the built environment. We develop non-toxic, sustainable solutions that address pathogens, mould spores, odours, and volatile organic compounds (VOCs), supporting healthier indoor environments while maintaining energy efficiency.

Our work is powered by proprietary technology designed for continuous air and surface treatment without ozone, harmful chemicals, or disruptive installations. Aethify supports commercial, healthcare, hospitality, education, and residential environments, with a long-term focus on indoor health, wellbeing, and environmental sustainability.

Name: Wildlife Wise
Description:
Wildlife Wise is a brand and team on the Suffolk Coast.

We are working with residents and visitors to prevent disturbance and damage to its internationally important wildlife and habitats.

The Suffolk coast is totally unique and with incredible habitats formed by its dynamic and ever-changing coast. We have vast estuaries of mudflats, saltmarsh, reedbeds and sea grass. Unusual shingle and sand beaches with highly specialised plants and curious creatures. There are lagoons, freshwater wetlands, heathlands and much more.

Le procédé de traitement du sol par apport massif de compost permet à l'écosystème d'atteindre rapidement un état de résilience indispensable aux évolutions climatiques.

Name: one.two.five Benefit Corporation
Description:
one.two.five Benefit Corporation is dedicated to enhancing environmental quality, advancing nature-based solutions, and improving land-use profitability across Ohio. We connect landowners with consumers who support soil organic carbon storage, while educating participating networks and applying rigorous, science-based methods to measure carbon sequestration. Our team is committed to empowering those trained in the latest scientific approaches to carbon storage and market development.

Through comprehensive evaluation and adoption of regenerative farming and land management practices, one.two.five Benefit Corporation helps Ohio landowners unlock the full potential of their soils for carbon storage and greenhouse gas mitigation. By engaging with global voluntary and pre-compliance carbon offset markets, we ensure premium value for farmers who achieve the highest standards in carbon stewardship.

Join us as we build a sustainable future—one acre at a time. 

To learn more please follow us here and contact hello@125benefit.com

Name: Ecology Union of Navoi Presidential School
Akademia Klimatu
Description:
Akademia Klimatu to innowacyjna platforma edukacyjna, stworzona z myślą o firmach, które chcą aktywnie uczestniczyć w zielonej transformacji i zrównoważonym rozwoju. Naszą misją jest dostarczanie przedsiębiorstwom najnowszej wiedzy i narzędzi, które umożliwiają skuteczne zarządzanie kosztami energii, zgodność z regulacjami ESG oraz realizację celów związanych z odpowiedzialnym biznesem.

W Akademii Klimatu oferujemy szeroki wybór kursów online, które obejmują kluczowe aspekty zrównoważonego rozwoju, takie jak odnawialne źródła energii (OZE), audyt energetyczny, zarządzanie emisjami CO2 oraz optymalizacja procesów zakupowych w firmach. Nasze kursy są dostępne w formie mikro-learningu, co pozwala na elastyczne dopasowanie nauki do indywidualnych potrzeb użytkowników.

Dodatkowo, platforma oferuje dostęp do społeczności profesjonalistów, gdzie uczestnicy mogą wymieniać się wiedzą, doświadczeniami oraz najlepszymi praktykami w obszarze zielonej transformacji. Dzięki temu tworzymy przestrzeń do nawiązywania cennych kontaktów biznesowych oraz uzyskiwania wsparcia od ekspertów branżowych.

Jednym z kluczowych elementów Akademii Klimatu jest program certyfikacyjny, który umożliwia zdobycie tytułu Menedżera Zielonej Transformacji. Program ten jest skierowany do osób, które chcą poszerzyć swoje kompetencje i odgrywać kluczową rolę w transformacji energetycznej swoich organizacji. Certyfikat potwierdza zaawansowaną wiedzę i umiejętności w zakresie zrównoważonego rozwoju, co zwiększa wartość zawodową uczestników oraz ich firm.

Name: IOWA GREAT LAKES ASSOCIATION

אקומטר – מעבדה אינטראקטיבית פורצת דרך לחקר הקיימות ומשבר האקלים 
העולם בו כולנו חיים, נמצא במשבר סביבתי עמוק שיפגע וישפיע על הדורות הבאים. הדורות הבאים הם תלמידי בתי הספר היום, שבעתיד ינהיגו את העולם. חובתנו כמחנכים להעמיק את הידע וההבנה ולהעלות את המודעות של תלמידנו למשבר הסביבתי ולעודדם ולהניעם לפעילות פרו – סביבתית.
מהו אקומטר? אקומטר הינה מערכת טכנולוגית חינוכית שמטרתה העלאת המודעות והשפעה על התנהגות תלמידים וקהילות באמצעות הפיכת ההתנהגות היומיומית של צריכת משאבים - חשמל ומים, לנראית, מעניינת ומזמנת למעורבות. האקומטר הופך את הכללי והמרוחק לקרוב אל התלמידים ולשלהם. הנתונים ממחישים לתלמידים את הקשר בין המעשים שלהם לבין התוצאות. 
	אקומטר מציג באמצעות ממשקים  גרפים - דיגיטאליים מגוון נתונים לגבי צריכת המשאבים בבית הספר בזמן אמת ובהתייחסות השוואתית לעבר. 
	אקומטר יסייע בהפחתה של צריכת המשאבים (חשמל ומים) ויביא לחסכון בעלויות.
	אקומטר נגיש באמצעות סמארטפון, מחשב או צגי LCD.
	אקומטר ישתלב בתוכניות הלימודים  ויקדם מודעות סביבתית בת קיימא.
	אקומטר יניע לפעולה ויעצים את תחושת המסוגלות של תלמידים ותלמידות.
	אקומטר יזמן למידה פעילה וחווייתית שתקדם הבנה ובמיומנויות: חשיבה מערכתית,
איסוף ועיבוד נתונים, אוריינות דיגיטאלית וחקר מדעי.
מה אנחנו מציעים:
	מעטפת פדגוגית הכוללת תוכניות ומערכי שיעור וליווי והנחיה פדגוגית.
	התקנה והפעלה טכנית של המעבדה לחקר קיימות ומשבר האקלים.
	תמיכה טכנית שוטפת.

Name: THE GREEN MIND
Description:
THE GREEN MIND organisation was established on November 12, 2020 by seven high school students. It is completey run by the youth to recover the beauty of our nature to it's extreme best form again. We, humans have already caused our earth much pain. Now it's time to realize and understand our true duty to our country as well as the mother Earth. Together, we all will flourish with our nature's best form, and nourish it properly. 

Currently, we organize social awareness events publicly and educate youngsters about sowing, bowing, nurturing, watering and growing plants. We have planted more than 50+ plants in the city of New Delhi in only four months of starting.

Our future scope is to focus on Climate Change Education (CCE) among the kids and enhance their knowledge thoroughly on the broad concepts of sustainability and climate crisis.

Engageons-nous pour un avenir plus vert !

Name: North Atlantic Aquatic Connectivity Collaborative (NAACC)
Description: The North Atlantic Aquatic Connectivity Collaborative (NAACC) is a network of individuals from universities, conservation organizations, and state and federal natural resource and transportation departments focused on improving aquatic connectivity across a thirteen-state region, from Maine to West Virginia. See our webpage for some of our stream crossing assessments.

Name: Net Zero Audits
Description:
𝗡𝗲𝘁 𝗭𝗲𝗿𝗼 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝘁𝘀 is the place where we make environmental compliance work for you as a strategic advantage. Our scope of expertise includes ESOS Energy Audits, SECR Energy Reporting, and Net Zero Consultation, helping businesses gain clarity and confidence to meet regulatory requirements while identifying opportunities for long-term efficiency and growth.

We know that following the rules of schemes like ESOS Phase 3 is not easy. Therefore, we provide a modular suite of services that are a cost-effective means of compliance, and a qualified Lead Energy Assessor is always there to guide you. The whole journey, from evaluation to final submission, is where we locate the potential of organisations in reducing energy consumption, thus saving costs and benefiting the environment with minimum disruption.

We offer accurate and clear energy and carbon reporting solutions to companies that fall under the SECR framework, thus facilitating the drafting of Directors’ Reports that are both accountable and high-performing.

Our commitment extends beyond compliance. Through our Net Zero and GHG consultancy services, we support businesses in building a credible pathway toward carbon neutrality, aligning with the UK’s Net Zero 2050 goals. Every recommendation is evidence-based, practical, and aligned with internationally recognised standards such as ISO 14064-1 and ISO 14064-3.

Together, we can help you understand your environmental impact, reduce it effectively, and lead with integrity in the transition to a low-carbon economy.

Dr Mike Walker, PhD
ESOS Lead Auditor | SECR | Net Zero Consultation | GHG Emissions Consultation
ISO 14064-1 | ISO 14064-3 Verifier & Validator
 www.netzeroaudits.co.uk

Name: Envfy
Description:
Envfy Services Private Limited is at the forefront of climate risk management and sustainability solutions. We specialise in measuring, managing, and mitigating climate risks while driving businesses toward net-zero emissions. Our approach is rooted in innovation, and we're dedicated to unlocking the full potential of climate solutions, including carbon sinks, community services, emission reduction, circularity, and green projects. By optimising these initiatives, we make a significant impact in reducing greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions.

Our Initiatives:
* Intensive Modern Farming
* Forest Protection Projects
* Community Empowerment Initiatives
* The Compressed Biogas Project

Vision:
Our vision is to redesign lifestyles by embracing diversity and inclusion, promoting equity and trust, and fostering innovation in processes and technology, all leading to a net-zero future.

We cater to industries that are committed to sustainable development practices and aspire to achieve net-zero emissions, paving the way for a greener and more sustainable world.

 Visit our website to learn more about our solutions and how we can collaborate for a sustainable future.

Description: Préparation d'espaces verts avec gazon naturel, arbres ornementaux et fruitiers et rosiers, ainsi que préparation du sol pour les particuliers, les institutions publiques et privées, les villas, les hôtels, les zones de divertissement et de loisirs et les projets de logements ADL.

Name: Zero Loss
Description: We at Zero Loss are just people with amazing zeal towards helping the environment, who have come together to address different problems that undermine the efforts of humans as a society in trying to live in harmony with nature.

Name: Indigenous Women Rangers Network
Description:
Our network is making a difference by providing a platform for Indigenous women and girls to gain visibility and recognition, while protecting our land, air and water for future generations. This includes providing opportunities for networking, health and wellbeing, and community-led projects. We also provide training and mentorship and support to Indigenous women and girls to help them reach their goals.
Creating opportunities and exploring career pathways for Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander women who are dedicated to maintaining their country and culture is the goal of the Indigenous Women Rangers Network.

Name: Nirrwara Global
Description: Nirrwara Global is a distinguished First Nations-owned and operated company headquartered in Queensland, Australia, renowned for its pioneering role in providing innovative solutions within the realms of carbon management, reconciliation, offsets, biodiversity credits, and environmental social governance (ESG). With a steadfast commitment to sustainability, social responsibility, and indigenous empowerment, Nirrwara Global has emerged as a global leader in bridging environmental conservation and economic prosperity while promoting ethical business practices.

Name: Narragansett Bay Estuary Program
Description: The Narragansett Bay Estuary Program is the only stakeholder-led organization pursuing place-based conservation across the Narragansett Bay region in Massachusetts, Rhode Island, and Connecticut. Our work spans boundaries to provide independent convening, scientific data analysis, and watershed project funding. We support often under-funded pre-project steps, including studies, assessments, and engineering design. Guided by science and the shared will of the partnership, we pursue lasting solutions to the region’s inseparable environmental and social challenges.

Name: Autumn Peltier
Description:
Indigenous Activist. International Children’s Peace Prize nominee. Known as the “Water Protector” the teenage activist fights for water-rights for indigenous peoples. In 2019 she was appointed Chief Water Commissioner by the Anishinabek Nation. She has spoken in front of the United Nations, World Economic Forum and other world leaders, demanding clean drinking water on indigenous reserves. Peltier is one of the leading youth environmental activists of the world. 
Our platform works with The DreamCatcher Foundation & Healthy First Nations actively providing short term solutions across First Nations communities in Canada while we look for a partnership with Government.

Name: UnitedMetricAssociation
Description:

Our mission is to empower organizations worldwide through robust ESG indicators, sector-specific sustainability frameworks, global reporting standards, and high-quality certification tools.
We serve governments, companies, public institutions, and civil society actors, offering guidelines, training programs, and performance metrics to drive impact, compliance, and long-term value.
 Together, we’re shaping a sustainable, transparent, and equitable future.
 Learn more at: www.unitedmetric.com

Name: NYS Center for Clean Water Technology
Description: The New York State Center for Clean Water Technology (CCWT) is a nationally unique effort, launched in 2015 to create a bridge between research institutions, regulatory agencies and private sector resources to efficiently overcome knowledge and technology gaps in regional water quality restoration solutions, and to serve as a platform to attract industry support and compete for large federal grants.

Name: Europejskie Centrum Czystego Powietrza | European Clean Air Centre (ECAC)

Name: CO2enzo
Description:
Wil jij met jouw bedrijf ook impact maken en ben jij als MKB of zelfstandige ook bezig met het onderwerp Maatschappelijk Verantwoord Ondernemen (MVO)? Dan is klimaatcompensatie – ofwel CO2-compensatie – waarschijnlijk ook een belangrijk aandachtspunt binnen jouw (duurzame) bedrijfsvoering. 

Klimaatcompensatie is het compenseren van de CO2-uitstoot waar jij als mkb-bedrijf verantwoordelijk voor bent. Zorg er altijd eerst voor dat je de CO2-uitstoot zoveel mogelijk vermindert of voorkomt. De CO2-uitstoot die daarna toch vrijkomt kun je bij ons lokaal of nationaal compenseren.

Goed voor jouw bedrijf én de wereld. Een kleine ondernemer stoot jaarlijks ongeveer 5 tot 10 ton CO2 per persoon per jaar uit. Help het milieu door deze CO2 te compenseren bij CO2enzo!

Name: LIFE Fagesos
Description:
LIFE FAGESOS project addresses the critical challenges posed by global climatic changes, aiming to mitigate one of the most severe threats - the outbreak of Alien Invasive Plant Pathogens. Our focus lies in safeguarding forest ecosystems, particularly those facing the escalating impact of Phytophthora diseases.
In the Mediterranean basin, evergreen oak and chestnut ecosystems are witnessing a surge in these diseases, fueled by rising temperatures and an increased frequency of extreme weather events. 
LIFE FAGESOS recognizes the urgent need for improved tools and strategies to empower challenged forest ecosystems. Our mission is to enhance their adaptation to the outlined issues, ultimately ensuring the preservation of these vital natural carbon sinks. #ClimateAction #EnvironmentalPreservation #Sustainability

Name: Paradise Restoration Foundation
Description:
Tropical forests disappear at a rate of 30.000 ha per day - an equivalent of 50.000 football fields.

Nature, when left alone, restores rainforests within 250-300 years.
For Nature this is not a problem - for us Humans, it is!

With the combination of ancient Mayan knowledge, permaculture, agroforestry and modern technology, we can restore a tropical forest within just 20-30 years.

Our initiator Dr. Bernd Neugebauer proofed this and has re-created paradise with Chan Ká Vergel. A place where nature, animals and humans co-exist and collaborate to survive together.

We want to scale this project and as well as bringing it's magic to other places across the globe.
Together, we can restore a rainforest paradise like this with only 1€/m2.

Join us and reconnect with nature!

Name: Quinault Division of Natural Resources
Description:
The Quinault Division of Natural Resources (QDNR) is entrusted with the care, protection, and sustainable management of the 208,000-acre Quinault Indian Nation, located on the southwestern corner of Washington’s Olympic Peninsula—between the snow-capped Olympic Mountains and the Pacific Ocean.

QDNR manages forests, fisheries, wildlife, water, and cultural resources across Quinault lands and within the Nation’s Usual and Accustomed Areas, including the ocean. Our stewardship balances sustainable timber harvest and fisheries management with the needs of fish, wildlife, and ecosystems to ensure a lasting legacy for future generations. Cultural sites such as the canoe stand—a grove of old-growth cedar trees maintained for traditional canoe building—reflect the deep respect embedded in our work.

For the Quinault people, natural resources are inseparable from cultural identity, health, and economy. As a place-based Nation, our worldview is rooted in the understanding that people are a part of nature, not apart from it. Protecting these lands and waters safeguards not only ecosystems, but also the social, spiritual, and economic well-being of our community.

With a dedicated team of nearly 90 scientists, field technicians, program managers, and support staff, QDNR oversees timber stewardship, freshwater and ocean fisheries, wildlife and cultural resource protection, air and water quality, and sand and gravel operations. We also manage Tribal enrollment, provide cultural resource review for outside agencies, and house the Geographic Information System (GIS) program, which delivers mapping, data management, and remote-sensing services to the Nation.

Name: Thanry Côte d'Ivoire
Description:
Le groupe Thanry est une entreprise leader dans l’exploitation forestière en Côte d’Ivoire. Le groupe exerce son activité d’exploitation forestière dans le respect de l’environnement et des hommes. L'utilisation de moyens modernes de gestion et de communication et, surtout, la compétence de plus de 1000 personnes qui composent cet ensemble, nous permettent de garantir le respect de la qualité et des délais dans la réalisation de vos ordres. 

Depuis sa création, le Groupe Thanry poursuit des travaux de reforestation. Le groupe mène chaque année deux types de travaux : les reboisements compensatoires et les reboisements pour l’aménagement des forêts classées. À travers ses activités de reboisement, le groupe Thanry à déjà reboisé 12 107 ha soit environ 2 518 000 arbres depuis 2004.  

Le groupe Thanry, avec son projet carbone 2024, participe à la lutte contre le dérèglement climatique et la déforestation en se positionnant sur le marché du crédit carbone volontaire pour des projets de reboisement et de conservation des forêts. L’objectif fixé est la plantation de plus de 3 millions d’arbres. Ce projet accomplira alors, au terme des 27 ans, une séquestration de 5 233 104 tonnes de CO2 à partir des valeurs par défaut du GIEC. 

Ces actions s’inscrivent dans la vision du groupe Thanry sur le besoin d’avoir un impact positifs autour de ses activités. Cela démontre notre engagement envers l'intérêt général et notre responsabilité sociale en tant qu'entreprise. En effet, le groupe Thanry reconnaît que ses activités ont un impact sur la société dans son ensemble et qu'il est donc de notre devoir de contribuer au bien-être de la communauté. Notre démarche vise à créer une synergie positive entre nos activités économiques et l'intérêt général, dans une logique de développement durable.

Name: BalticPFASResolve
Description:
BalticPFASResolve – Tackling PFAS Pollution in the Baltic Sea

BalticPFASResolve is a cross-border initiative co-funded by the Interreg Central Baltic Programme, aiming to reduce emissions of PFAS (per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances) into the Baltic Sea. The project runs from August 2025 to July 2028 and brings together 11 partners from Sweden, Finland, Estonia, and Latvia.

PFAS are persistent chemicals that pose serious risks to water quality and ecosystems. BalticPFASResolve addresses this challenge through a combination of preventive, regulatory, and technical remediation measures, focusing on key pollution sources such as municipal wastewater, stormwater, and firefighting activities.

The project is structured into four work packages:
• WP1: PFAS Source Tracking and Remediation Programmes.
• WP2: PFAS Analysis, Mitigation and Remediation at Water Utilities.
• WP3: Stormwater Remediation Pilots.
• WP4: Awareness Raising and Mitigation at Airports, Fire Stations, and Training Sites.

Key activities include:
• Developing a PFAS tracking and mitigation tool for municipalities and water utilities.
• Launching joint monitoring and remediation programmes.
• Testing innovative technical solutions in stormwater systems and wastewater treatment plants.
• Promoting collaboration with firefighting brigades and airport rescue services

By fostering cross-border cooperation, BalticPFASResolve enables partners to share knowledge, develop scalable solutions, and contribute to PFAS policy development at the EU level.

Lead Partner: County Administrative Board of Stockholm, Sweden

Other Partners: Universities, municipalities, water associations, and regional authorities across the four participating countries.

For more information, visit our webpage or contact:

We are a grassroots nonprofit organization founded in 2016 by Louise Delisle, an African Nova Scotian resident of Shelburne. Our mission is to combat environmental racism and improve health outcomes for the African Nova Scotian and working-poor community in Shelburne.

SEED gained recognition for our work addressing environmental concerns and received the Group Award at the 2018 Nova Scotia Human Rights Awards Celebration. We were also featured in the internationally acclaimed documentary "There's Something in The Water," directed by Elliot Page, based on Dr. Ingrid R.G. Waldron's book of the same name.

In Shelburne, our community resides primarily in the south end, which was used as a landfill for industrial, medical, and residential waste for 75 years. SEED represents a grassroots response to the environmental injustice faced by our community, aiming to address environmental racism and promote equitable health outcomes.

Join us in our mission to challenge environmental racism, empower communities, and create a sustainable future. Together, we can make a significant impact! #EnvironmentalJustice #CommunityEmpowerment #SocialChange

Name: HJS Emission Technology Ltd.
Description:
HJS Emission Technology was founded in 1976 with its headquarters based in Menden, Central Germany. HJS employs approximately 450 people who are engaged in the development, production and marketing of modular exhaust systems for reducing emissions for all road, rail, construction and marine applications.



In continuation of 12 years of extremely successful expansion in to the UK market, an agreement has been reached with our existing exclusive UK partner Emission Engineering Ltd (EEL) to integrate the EEL UK team into the HJS Company Group. This move will strengthen our ability to better meet the demands of our customers going forward continuing to serve new and existing customers from our established premises in Swindon. The existing team members will remain with HJS UK Ltd ensuring that existing relationships can be maintained and new relationships developed.

Mark Cooper will be heading up business development in the UK and we will continue to offer our innovative solutions for emission reduction and look forward to the continued support of our customers in the future.

As well as HJS’s well known, market leading solutions for emission aftertreatment systems for automotive applications, we are also launching an exciting new product portfolio which include construction applications and industrial filtration solutions.

Name: Clean Way Mobilidade Verde
Description:
Acesse nosso site e descubra mais sobre Logística Verde: www.cleanway.eco

Somos uma startup comprometida com a transformação do transporte rodoviário através de práticas inovadoras e sustentáveis. Utilizando tecnologia de ponta, implementamos estratégias ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) no setor rodoviário, responsável por 25% das emissões globais de gases de efeito estufa.

Nossa missão é atender às crescentes demandas por práticas ambientais responsáveis, proporcionando benefícios tangíveis tanto no curto quanto no longo prazo. A conscientização imediata e os ganhos ambientais futuros são parte do nosso compromisso com a qualidade de vida. Cada tonelada de CO2e neutralizada representa um passo em direção a um planeta mais saudável para todos nós.

Explore como podemos contribuir para um futuro mais verde em www.cleanway.eco.

Description: La sostenibilidad ha pasado de ser un acto meramente filantrofico a ser un componente esencia del ADN de las compañias. Name: AUPE - Acteurs Unis Pour l'Eau
Description:
L'association AUPE - Acteurs Unis Pour l’Eau rassemble agriculteurs, collectivités, acteurs de l’eau et partenaires du territoire autour d’un objectif commun : améliorer durablement la qualité de l’eau sur les captages prioritaires de l’est de la Mayenne.
Face aux enjeux croissants de pollution diffuse, notamment liée aux nitrates et aux produits phytosanitaires, AUPE met en œuvre un dispositif de Paiement pour Services Environnementaux (PSE). 
Ce dispositif volontaire récompense les pratiques agricoles favorables à la préservation de la ressource en eau, tout en soutenant une agriculture durable et ancrée dans le territoire.

Name: Australian Holistic Mgt Cooperative
Description:
AHMC welcomes farmers interested in or transitioning to regenerative agriculture, with Holistic Management education and practical implementation support.
- Members can choose to do ecological monitoring on their farms to check their landscape function is improving. 
- The Ecological Outcome Verification on farms, provides those farmers, with an improving Ecological Health Index, market access with the Land to Market seal, this is backed up with a chain of custody. 
- Members benefit from support, education & regional field days

Name: GoutteaGoutte/GocciaaGoccia
Description:
L’objectif général du projet Goutte à Goutte est d’identifier les freins administratifs et technologiques qui empêchent aujourd’hui les entreprises du secteur agro alimentaire de baisser leurs consommations d’eau dans leurs activités respectives. Nous visons l’efficacité des pratiques et des systèmes de production en utilisant l’innovation technologique et les solutions numériques pour promouvoir une utilisation durable des ressources en eau. 
Le projet vise à identifier et accompagner les entreprises grandes consommatrices d’eau sans pour autant compromettre la durabilité économique des activités de production.
Le projet est à destination des TPE et PME du secteur alimentaire, tel que les boulangers, pâtissiers, fabricants de glaces, fabricants de conserves, fabricants de boissons, brasseurs, fabricants d’huiles situées dans les Alpes-Maritimes, le Piémont (Province de Cuneo) et la Ligurie (Province d’Imperia).

Le projet est financé dans le cadre du programme Interreg VI-A France Italie ALCOTRA 2021-2027

Name: Green Door Initiative
Description: GDI envisions a world where everyone irrespective of racial background, zip code and income bracket thrive in a healthy environment free from pollution which impacts the air, water, natural resources, and the built environment. Where environmental racism is a distant memory for generations to come and environmental justice is a reality for all.

Name: IBU Verify GmbH
Description:
Die IBU Verify GmbH ist eine eigenständige Verifizierungsstelle für Umweltinformationen mit Schwerpunkt.  Als neutrale dritte Partei prüfen wir Umwelt-Produktdeklarationen (EPDs) auf Vollständigkeit, Nachvollziehbarkeit und Konformität mit den geltenden Regelwerken.
Unsere Verifizierung schafft Vertrauen – gegenüber Bauherren, Planenden, Politik und Öffentlichkeit – und ist ein zentraler Beitrag zur Glaubwürdigkeit von Umweltinformationen im Bauwesen.
 Unsere Kernaufgaben:
Verifizierung von EPDs nach EN 15804+A2
Prüfung auf Einhaltung von Programmregeln und normativen Vorgaben
Sicherstellung einer konsistenten, methodisch korrekten Darstellung von Umweltwirkungen
Auf Anfrage: Kritische Prüfung von Lebenszyklusanalysen (LCAs)
Zusammenarbeit mit nationalen und internationalen EPD-Programmen
Als unabhängiger Akteur agieren wir strikt getrennt von Erstellung, Beratung oder wirtschaftlichen Interessen – für maximale Transparenz und Neutralität.
 Sitz: Berlin
 Aktiv in: Deutschland, Europa & darüber hinaus
 Kontakt: info@ibu-verify.com | www.ibu-verify.com

Name: Geneva Lake Environmental Agency
Description: The Geneva Lake Environmental Agency is determined to maintain Geneva Lake's resources by protecting, preserving, and enhancing a desirable lake and watershed quality, through monitoring, protection, and education.

Name: POSEIDON International
Description:
Vision:
To be the source of data used to drive marine quality improvements, ensuring sustainable and thriving marine ecosystems, measure and validate projects designed to make the Metro Manila Marine Ecosystem a healthy, productive and safe environment for future generations.  
Mission:  
Our mission is to collect and analyze data on marine ecosystems, leveraging our expertise to provide accurate and timely reports that empower decision-makers and stakeholders to take proactive measures for the conservation and recovery of our precious marine resources. Through our dedication and commitment, we strive to create a sustainable future where marine life thrives, and the health of our oceans is safeguarded for generations to come.
We will remain transparent, collaborative, and steadfast in our drive to make the Metro Manila Marine Ecosystem

Name: TNT-Chiers-Alzette asbl
Description: Au sein de l'asbl Territoire Naturel Transfrontalier, les communes transfrontalières de Differdange (L), Saulnes (F), Hussigny-Godbrange (F), Herserange (F) et Haucourt-Moulaine (F) réunissent leurs forces pour améliorer la qualité de vie et à préserver la nature sur leur territoire. Faisant partie d'un périmètre géographique homogène établi sur trois vallées (Chiers, Moulaine, Alzette) unies par un passé industriel commun, les acteurs du territoire (communes, associations citoyennes, ...) se mobilisent aux travers d'actions destinées à la population et à tout public désireux de connexion à la vie locale et à son environnement.

Name: B20 Club of Indiana
Description:
The B20 Club of Indiana is a collaboration between the Indiana Soybean Alliance and the American Lung Association. It recognizes and supports select Indiana-based fleets running on biodiesel blends of 20 percent or higher.

The B20 Club of Indiana welcomes both public and private fleets, including municipalities, park districts, trucking companies, mass transit, airport transportation and more. Member fleets must have at least 15 vehicles operating on biodiesel blends of 20 percent or higher at least six months of the year.

Name: Initiative for Life Concern
Description:
The organization is very much concerned about the continued threat of plastic waste and climate changes on the livelihoods of community members in addition to increased vulnerability of young people and women in our community. The concern was sparked by the loss of life of my own livestock due to eating of plastic waste and also i lost my own relative as she was trying to carryout unsafe abortion because she was still young at the age of 14 years. With such cases, as an organization we started a campaign of mobilizing communities towards ending plastic wastes and climate changes, ending sexual violence and women empowerment. We have programs on; plastic waste management, SMART agriculture where we promote organic farming and natural crops, and then a program on livelihoods where we mainly focus on empowering women and young people with hands on skills, financial literacy and empowering women to participate in the whole process of agriculture chain right way from planting, harvesting, marketing and planning for the money. We do also have a program for the young people where we mainly promote safe spaces for the young people as platforms for learning, sharing and accessing services such as sexual reproductive health services to be able to protect themselves from violence, promote their resilience and be able to maximize their full potentials. We do have a program on community education on infectious and non infectious diseases. All our programs are community driven and community led right way from the design, implementation and monitoring. 
As an organization, we believe in partnerships and networking to be able to address the community challenges. 
We are a community based organization, located in Rwenzori region in Uganda neighboring Democratic Republic of Congo. We have policies that govern the organization, we have Board of directors and the secretariat. We have hosted experts from a cross the world to support us in organization strengthening.

Name: Indiana Agriculture Nutrient Alliance
Description: The Indiana Agriculture Nutrient Alliance’s primary objective is to improve education and awareness of effective best management practices. Because farmers are in the best position to determine the practices that are most appropriate on their own farms to achieve reductions in nutrient loss, the alliance will increase partnerships with existing programs to improve nutrient management and soil health and, ultimately, Indiana’s water quality.

Name: Mandacaru Consultoria Ambiental
Description:
A Mandacaru Consultoria Ambiental nasceu do sonho de sua fundadora, filha de Araripina, que ao retornar à sua cidade natal percebeu a necessidade de serviços especializados na área ambiental. Inspirada pela crescente conscientização ambiental de consumidores e indústrias locais, a empresa foi criada para atender demandas desse segmento e contribuir para a sustentabilidade da região.

Com sede em Araripina-PE, o nome “Mandacaru” faz referência à planta nativa do semiárido da caatinga, simbolizando solidez, resiliência e compromisso. Assim como essa planta majestosa que desafia as adversidades, a Mandacaru Consultoria Ambiental se compromete a oferecer soluções ambientais sustentáveis, adaptadas às necessidades de cada cliente.

Nossa missão é transformar empresas através da implementação de práticas sustentáveis que integrem economia e cuidado com o meio ambiente, promovendo um futuro mais verde e equilibrado.

Name: Kajaani kampus
Description:
Kajaani kampuksesta luodaan vastuullinen, innovatiivinen ja yhteisöllinen opiskelu-, yritys- ja palvelukeskittymä. Kampusalue toimii työelämälähtöisen opiskelun ja kestävän kehityksen edelläkävijänä inspiroiden opiskelijoita, henkilökuntaa ja koko yhteisöä toimimaan vastuullisesti kestävän tulevaisuuden puolesta.

Tavoitteenamme on luoda vastuullisesti ja innovatiivisesti toimiva oppimisen, tutkimuksen ja yhteisöllisyyden keskus. Tavoitteena on myös se, että kampusalueen toiminnallinen ja rakenteellinen kehittäminen lisää aitoa työelämäyhteistyötä ja kiinnittää opiskelijoita alueen yrityksiin jo opintojen aikana,

The Kajaani Campus is being developed into Finland's most responsible learning and business 
hub. Responsibility is evident in the campus's operations by promoting sustainable development 
in both studying and business activities. Additionally, responsibility means implementing highquality, results-oriented, and work-life-oriented education while supporting individual well-being. Each student is treated as an individual, creating a personal and customized study path 
with support services. The core of campus development should also focus on supporting the 
well-being of those working in the area, fostering a sense of community, and creating new and 
innovative opportunities for studying and working through functional development. The goal of 
area development is also to attract other service users to the campus area and thereby increase 
the utilization rate of services in the area and ensure their continuation.

Name: Go Beyond Dreams
Description: At Go Beyond Dreams, we believe lasting change is built through collaboration. We don’t deliver off-the-shelf solutions — instead, we co-design programs with schools, community leaders, and corporate partners, ensuring every initiative reflects the real needs on the ground. Acting as facilitator, implementer, and reporter, we connect corporate responsibility with authentic community progress.

Name: We Care Siegel
Description:
We Care ist ein Nachhaltigkeitsstandard für Unternehmen der Lebensmittelbranche. Er unterstützt bei der Umsetzung und Zertifizierung unternehmerischer Verantwortung – sowohl am Standort als auch entlang der Lieferkette.

Der Standard hilft, gesetzliche Anforderungen wie CSRD, CSDDD oder das LkSG praxisnah umzusetzen – und stärkt glaubwürdige Nachhaltigkeitskommunikation entlang der gesamten Wertschöpfungskette.

Träger von We Care ist das Forschungsinstitut für biologischen Landbau (FiBL) Deutschland e.V.

Name: Global Environment Facility Small Grants Programme (GEF-SGP) Nigeria
Tampa Bay Surveillance Project
Description:
The Tampa Bay Surveillance (TBS) Project is a five-year, NOAA-funded collaboration led by the USF College of Marine Science and USF College of Arts and Sciences, with partners at Eckerd College and the University of South Carolina. Our mission is to understand the scope and impact of contaminants in Tampa Bay, from legacy chemicals such as PCBs and DDT to emerging threats like PFAS, pharmaceuticals, and microplastics.

Through water, sediment, invertebrate, and fish sampling; fish health analysis; community surveys; and risk assessments, we provide science that informs policy and helps protect both environmental and human health. Companion projects include Barnacle Baseline, which uses barnacles as natural sentinels to track pollution, and Tampa Bay REACH, which studies the combined effects of contaminants on ecosystems and communities, with a focus on subsistence fishers.

Name: KAZ DE LA BIODIVERSITE
Description: Nous accueillons tout public à la Kaz de la biodiversité et proposons des animations sur mesure.

Name: EnviroPerks
Description: EnviroPerks is a customer loyalty program that rewards its members for being loyal waste hauler customers. By providing added value in the form of discounts and rewards, customers of participating haulers can save more than they spend on their monthly hauling service. Using a simple online interface, members use earned loyalty points to choose from hundreds of EnviroPerks rewards and thousands of no-points-needed Perks+ discounts. EnviroPerks strives to lead the way in hauler customer loyalty through its exclusive program.

Name: Aranyamitr
Description:
About AranyaMitr

Welcome to AranyaMitr – where nature gets its biggest cheerleader! We’re all about turning passion for the planet into action. Think of us as matchmakers for trees and their perfect spots or freedom fighters for feathered friends.

We’re here to make green living cool, inspiring everyone to step up and be a friend to the forest. Whether it's saving the environment one small act at a time or dreaming up big, bold ideas, AranyaMitr is the place where nature lovers unite to make the world a little wilder, greener, and a whole lot friendlier!

Name: Ozark Compost & Swap
Description: Ozark Compost & Swap is making diverting food waste convenient, accessible, and fun by picking up directly from your home or business. Partnering with other local businesses for our swap service, we are helping reduce household waste by providing every day cleaners, coffee and more all in reusable containers right at your door.

Name: Friends Of The North Fork Of The Shenandoah River
Description:
Friends of the North Fork has been an active voice for the health of the river since 1988. Our primary program areas are education, science, and advocacy. We engage volunteers for river clean-ups, monitoring, and various other activities. In 2014 we became the official “community support organization” for Seven Bends State Park. 

Friends of the North Fork of the Shenandoah River Inc. is a private, nonprofit, tax-exempt organization, governed by a volunteer board of directors who report to our members at the annual meeting each Spring. Our Executive Director leads a small paid staff based out of our office in Woodstock, Virginia. Friends’ annual operating budget runs about $150,000 or more annually. We are supported by about 350 member households and businesses from around the Valley and points beyond.

Our River Is Our Great Connector

Our river and its watershed connect us all. Just as each stream and tributary is integral to the river’s quality and flow, every person and their actions in our watershed are integral to the health of our community. We collectively share in the enjoyment of, stewardship of, and responsibility for the North Fork. We all have the right to equitable access to the ecological, aesthetic, recreational, economic, and social benefits that the river provides. Friends of the North Fork of the Shenandoah River (FNFSR) commits to bringing more diverse voices representing a broader range of different perspectives into the work we do in order to make our great connector healthier and more equitably accessible for all.

Name: AirATP
Description:
Bienvenue sur la page officielle d'AirATP, votre source fiable pour surveiller la qualité de l'air dans les stations et gares du réseau RATP. 

Notre mission est de fournir des informations en temps réel sur les niveaux de pollution de l'air ainsi que des bilans réguliers pour assurer la transparence autour de la santé publique.

Name: Avalon International Corporation
Description:
Bacteria is a never-ending problem.      Our products provide simple and easy solutions to your bacteria problems.      We bridge the gap between microbiology and industry. 

Bug Check bacteria test kits allow you to do the testing yourself – on site.  It lets you know if action is needed. 

Sump Soda Coolant Conditioner ends foul odor in MWF.

Preventive maintenance allows you to take corrective action that prevents damage to your products, reduces equipment downtime, and prevents employee health issues. 

https://avalongateway.com/

Name: Plant Based Future
Description: PBF is a company dedicated to assisting the corporate world to educate their staff about the threats of global warming in a way they brings about sustained commitment to make a difference, at a personal level.

Name: Emerald Keepers
Description:
Generations of people have enjoyed the pristine beauty of Coronado and its beaches, bays, and parks. Emerald Keepers is the only civic non-profit organization in the City of Coronado whose sole purpose is to address local needs related to environmental stewardship and sustainability. Increasing levels of trash and pollution of our waterways and air threaten the well-being of residents, the economic success of our city, and our children’s future. Emerald Keepers’ provides ecologically-focused leadership to foster awareness, provide a forum for discussion and debate, and promote achievable public-private, community-driven solutions. Emerald Keepers’ community-based programs and educational outreach encourage community involvement while fostering pride in Coronado. 

PO Box 181212, Coronado, California, 92178

Name: MiMMEA House
Description:
At MiMMEA House, we are committed to advancing the global bioeconomy through innovative research, community empowerment, and sustainable practices.  Explore our initiatives and be a part of the change today.
MiMMEA House is a non-profit organization headquartered in Uganda with a mission to advance the global bioeconomy for sustainable development and universal well-being. We focus on pioneering innovation in bioconvergence, promoting environmental stewardship, fostering equitable access to resources, and enhancing human health. Our projects align with global sustainability goals and emphasize collaboration, research, and advocacy.
We engage with international institutions, government bodies, and industry leaders to build capacities in green technology, sustainable agriculture, and the bioeconomy, particularly in East and Central Africa. MiMMEA House is actively exploring partnerships in the United States, aiming to further its objectives in advancing the bioeconomy and sustainable development.

Core Competencies
•	Biorefinery and Green Chemistry: Under license of proprietary technology from Nkazi Phyto, our biorefinery enables the sustainable extraction and synthesis of bioactives from post-harvest agricultural waste and underutilized botanical resources.
•	Sustainable Agriculture & Resource Management: We drive innovation in bioeconomy, transforming post-harvest agricultural waste into high-value bioactives, reducing waste and promoting sustainability.
•	Environmental and Public Health Initiatives: Through collaboration with SERVIR and other space data initiatives, we promote the use of environmental data for disease surveillance, zoonotics management, and health system strengthening.
•	Capacity Building and Training: MiMMEA House provides workshops, training, and technical exchanges on sustainability, green technologies, and innovation.
•	Global Advocacy and Policy Development: We actively participate in shaping policies and frameworks that support green economie

Name: Delmarva Land and Litter Collaborative
Description:
DLLC brings together representatives from chicken companies, farming, regulatory agencies, academia, and environmental groups in a collaborative and mission-driven manner.

The complex challenges facing the integration of food production, environmental protection, rural economies and communities cannot be solved by single-faceted approaches. The challenges cross boundaries, and the solutions need to as well.

Name: Africa Partnership on Climate Change Coalition (APCCC)
Description:
The Africa Partnership on Climate Change Coalition (APCCC) is a non-profit organization headquartered in Bufula B, Budondo sub-county, Jinja district. Established eight years ago, APCCC focuses on climate change mitigation and adaptation. Its team comprises 15 professional members (including five females), interns from Uganda Christian University, and 14 volunteers. The operational staff includes five members, three of whom are females. APCCC draws on expertise from various fields, including environment, climate change, agriculture, natural resources, health research, social work, and community development.

In alignment with the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), particularly SDG 13 on climate action, APCCC has affiliations with key organizations, including the Africa Adaptation Knowledge Network (UNEP ROA), The Busoga Kingdom, Butembe Chiefdom Tourism and Antiquities Ministry, and ten other Chiefdoms in the Busoga Kingdom. It also holds a five-year Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Uganda Christian University Faculty of Environment and Kampala University Faculty of Agriculture and Natural Resources for internship placements and research in climate change adaptation.

APCCC's core activities include awareness and sensitization, research, capacity building, demonstration, empowerment, innovation, education, advocacy, policy influence, and networking, all focusing on Article 4 of the United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change. The organization is governed by a competent and diversified board of directors responsible for policy-making and strategic direction.

Name: World Cycling Day
Description: This is the one day when people around the world celebrate the virtues, benefits, and history of cycling, discuss the latest equipment trends, and work to recognize the economic and social contributions of human-powered energy at the local, regional, national, and international levels.

Name: TerraLearn
Description: Terra Learn es una iniciativa la cual se encarga de la realización de proyectos con base en catalizar la conciencia ambiental y social, fomentando la adopción de prácticas sustentables y el compromiso con los Objetivos de Desarrollo Sostenible de las Naciones Unidas.
Location: Ciudad de México, Ciudad de México

Name: Ourtala.id
Description:
Ourtala is a non-profit organization established since April 8, 2021, derived from the words "Our" and "Bentala," meaning "Our Earth". Ourtala aims to raise environmental awareness, promote sustainable lifestyles, and educate the younger generation and the wider community about caring for the earth.

Through collaborative initiatives, Ourtala hopes to have a tangible impact in the form of behavioral changes, increased socio-environmental awareness, and the creation of a community that is more aware of the importance of protecting the earth for our shared future.

Symbolizing a shared responsibility for protecting the planet.

Name: Recycle Dalat
Description: Recycle Dalat aims to protect the environment and develop a green community in Da Lat, Vietnam through 3 criteria: Cognition-Recycle-Restoration. These criteria are linked to 3 respective parts of the project: (1) Raising awareness on environmental issues and support for vulnerable communities; (2) Classifying and recycling plastic wastes; (3) Planting trees in national parks to restore degraded forests. Recycle Dalat aims to develop a green community in Da Lat through our activities. We place particular emphasis on youths and vulnerable communities, helping them embark on a journey to a more sustainable and responsible lifestyle.

Name: PQG for Quality and Environmental Services
Description: PQG delivers impartial, competent, and efficient inspection, training, and certification services. We support organizations across Egypt, MENA region, and the GCC in achieving compliance and improving performance in line with international best practices.

Name: Eco-Tadede Green Ventures
Description:
Eco-Tadede is a sustainability-driven enterprise committed to promoting eco-conscious trade and innovation.
We connect communities with environmentally friendly products, services, and practices, aiming to reduce ecological impact and foster a greener, more equitable future.
From sustainable sourcing to community engagement, Eco-Tadede stands at the forefront of ethical and responsible business.

Name: Ndhiwa Mountain Movers Youth Group
Description: The Ndhiwa Mountain Movers is a youth-led self-help group dedicated to promoting and enacting climate action and poverty reduction initiatives in the Ndhiwa community. Founded on April 21, 2022, the group's aim is to empower young people to spearhead the fight against the damaging effects of climate change and raise awareness about the urgency of taking action. Through educational programs and community outreach efforts, Ndhiwa Mountain Movers is working towards a more sustainable future for everyone. Climate action is among the 17 sustainable development goals aimed at transforming the world. Breathing fresh air and having access to clean water and a toxin-free environment is a human desire. Environmental legislation encompasses many laws and regulations aimed at regulating human interaction with nature to reduce harm to the environment and improve public health.

Name: 5 Strona sp. z o.o.
Description: Nie jesteśmy organizacją ekologiczną. Jesteśmy akcją społeczną. Akcją tworzoną przez  grupę ludzi, którzy zachęcają innych do tego aby wzięli sprawy w swoje ręce i zadbali o swoje najbliższe otoczenie. Nie piszemy manifestów ani nie mamy ,,filozofii”,  które by nas określały i sytuowały w określonych dziedzinach. Jesteśmy ,,działaniem,”  która nie wyklucza i daje możliwość zaangażowania każdemu, kto chciałby choćby w najmniejszym stopniu zmienić swoją okolicę. Stawiamy na lokalne społeczności, ale myślimy globalnie.

Name: Društvo DOVES-FEE Slovenia
Description:
Namen društva je informiranje in izobraževanje mladih in drugih javnosti o vseh vprašanjih s področja okolja, vzgoje in izobraževanja na področju varstva okolja ter spodbujanje razvoja turizma, dviga kakovosti turizma z udejanjanjem načel trajnostnega razvoja, vse v sodelovanju z lokalnimi, regionalnimi, nacionalnimi in mednarodnimi organizacijami.

V doseganju svojih namenov in opredeljenega sodelovanja ima seznanjanje in prizadevanje za uveljavitev mednarodnih standardov FEE – mednarodne organizacije “Foundation for Environmental Education” – posebno mesto.
Svoj namen Društvo DOVES-FEE Slovenia uresničuje skozi svoje programe, ki niso zgolj usmerjeni na prihodnost, ampak vplivajo na spremembe danes in vsak dan. Ekošole, Mladi poročevalci za okolje, Znanje o gozdovih izobražujejo, proučujejo in istočasno tudi stimulirajo, medtem kot programa Modra zastava in Zeleni ključ vplivata na izboljšanje okoljskih kazalnikov namestitvene industrije in turističnega gospodarstva.

Priznanje s strani UNESCA kot vodilne svetovne organizacije na področju okoljske vzgoje in vzgoje za trajnostni razvoj priznava kot vodilna v svetu na področju okoljske vzgoje in trajnostni razvoj, dokazuje, da je naša moč v članih nacionalnih organizacij, ki delijo prepričanja in vsakodnevno izvajajo FEE programe z veliko učinkovitostjo. Zaradi svoje predanosti in izjemne prodornosti so lokalne organizacije tiste, ki dajejo FEE-ju pomembno vlogo v današnji družbi. In temu sledi tudi naša organizacija.

Name: HEALTHY BUILDING INSTITUTE OF AMERICA (HBIA)
Description:
The Healthy Building Institute of America is focused on..  THE FUTURE

* HEALTHIER * SAFER * CLEANER *

CLEANING, SANITAZATION, AND BIO-DECONTAMINATION Expert Guidance
for Safer Residential & Work Environments w/ Resiliency 

As the Novel Corona-virus pandemic continues to unfold, organizations, families, and businesses are finding themselves in uncharted territory. Important decisions must be made to manage the health and safety of staff, clients, and residents/patients, and individual family members while limiting service disruptions as much as possible.  Leadership and family heads are faced with making these critical decisions using limited resources and sometimes with conflicting information. With the rapidly evolving situation and the barrage of information from various news outlets, we understand it is hard to know what information is accurate and based on scientific, medical and engineering truth.

Healthy Building Institute of America (HBIATODAY) strives to become your trusted resource. Our goal since the first day we opened our door was to provide organizations, businesses, and families with accurate information and expert guidance to help navigate these turbulent times.

For over 16 years, our institute has helped with daily operation and implementation delivery of  safer work environments, residential benefits, and simply ensuring and building healthy buildings. 

Our board (We Call Them Our TEAM) consist of occupational health professionals, alliance partners of medical professionals, bio-safety specialists, industrial hygienists, and engineers that apply their expertise in a variety of ways to help through challenging times and COVID-19 is just such a challenge we have faced head-on.

How can the HBIATODAY help your facility?
